Have I done something to make you question your prior support for my campaign? With just FOUR days until my March 19th primary, I need you to take a moment to affirm your support for my re-election campaign. For liberty, Jim Jordan Don't want to receive our emails? | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Lara Trump
subject: It’s official. I’m the new Co-Chair of the RNC.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I’m devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they’ve done to America.
Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life – and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

| |

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5c8ef2c5beed4655aec737e97bf77d38&_e=NPa5EAJ0uF_a8nuQ1y2vhEvJj8hy9P8WbkjqtZIPhgHSxp65WTBDyNBLtjxx3ztlhdczNLt03GSMqbPoFaiSyb4BxOa_OICnW1Md-nnDdcBx724cBKvZf5wXgL26T-uJsq4PEH24k_qXkVHlQkpFu3pOgov0Ga7fwgr87Jv2obk2nrvlulq5YGiiy28eSLo1gn-2nXuVDucS7pRANIL3lTg571xmtnE2r87g4uEaSGHej2CKk8Kszvy4NyR0fjyBStRJ2x4eq3o_ZxbjdrGB_iqWxPsukA-182nYCUUr_03Fp-8-D8ZS-WI53ixuoWWaaPwUoxVgDLgXid6gKH-JQA6ezoCgvlzCYE_dktPormvH4wNH0JrcYl5cSwxCkkQeKb1YxI4eA_LWAM5zFQqVCz1iNKdGP-IZbUU6gAZh8CE%3D "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.

it from outside sources.”

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FANI WILLIS FOR COMMUNICATIONS WITH JACK SMITH,
PELOSI COMMITTEE

District Attorney Fani Willis and Fulton County, Georgia, seem to have
provided false information about having no records of communications
with Jack Smith and the Pelosi January 6 committee.

We filed a Georgia Open Records Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=31630&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLWphY2stc21pdGgtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMjgwNS9dbGF3c3VpdD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=14315ea434ba0942e61af0d48251b023ee641792a87e0e36d4271cb0237a2d7d
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=31606&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLWphY2stc21pdGgtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMjgwNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=688508329e21ad3fd5d66d7b6b7b16c9328876a6b96289c9cabbaa143cb6d8eb]
against Willis and the county for records of any communication they
had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee
(_Judicial Watch Inc. v. Fani Willis et al._
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=31606&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLWphY2stc21pdGgtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMjgwNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=688508329e21ad3fd5d66d7b6b7b16c9328876a6b96289c9cabbaa143cb6d8eb]
(No. 24-CV-002805)).

We sued in the Superior Court of Fulton County, GA, after Willis and
the county denied having any records responsive to an August 2023
Georgia Open Records Act request for:

> All documents and communications sent to, received from, or relating
> to Special Counsel Jack Smith or any employees in his office.
>
> All documents and communications sent to or received from the United
> States House January 6th Committee or any of its employees.
We state in the lawsuit that Willis’ and the county’s
“representation about not having records responsive to the request
is likely false.” We refer to a December 5, 2023,
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=31631&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvM0lxS09yb11sZXR0ZXI/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=92a479e21a6767f76fa6032c71a4696839e4a92efaaab51e6d2ef3bb675670c1
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=31608&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvM0lxS09ybz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=739461a155d0cf2563d7a439823d8abd2410a3fb5c26cce7d9a331e5a1ec7389]
from House
Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan to Willis that cites a

plainly responsive to the request, yet it was neither produced to

exemption from production under the Open Records Act.”

We also cite recent news reports and other records which “indicate
that representatives of Willis’s office traveled to Washington, DC,
and met with January 6 Select Committee staffers in April, May, and
November 2022, as Willis proposed in her December 17, 2021 letter
...”

> promoted by Bill and Hillary Clinton. The Clinton-backed power and
> port venture is the biggest and most expensive failure mentioned in
> the probe, which was ordered by a Florida congresswoman who at the
> time confirmed a “troubling lack of progress and accountability”
> in Haiti reconstruction projects. All these years later many
> Haitians still live in deplorable, shanty town tent cities and a
> never-ending epidemic of cholera keeps claiming lives. Nearly half
> of the Haitian population does not have enough food
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=29738&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2ZwLm9yZy9zdG9yaWVzL2hhaXRpLWNhbnQtd2FpdC1wZW9wbGUtYnJpbmstaHVuZ2VyLWxldmVscy1yaXNlLXdhcm5zLWZvb2Qtc2VjdXJpdHktcmVwb3J0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e10608762874359806027915b78a2726cac2a03f6b37cd2d027a2408a07fb97a],
> according to the United Nations.
>
> At the beginning of last year the Biden administration awarded Haiti
> another $56.5 million
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=28804&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtZ2l2ZXMtaGFpdGktNTYtbWlsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a1a45c1d5abd05216a490edb5d3398118044a6081acaef9dcd9e35a032b913e0]
in
> humanitarian aid, explaining that it was “for the people of Haiti
> in response to the country’s humanitarian crisis and cholera
> epidemic.” A few months later the administration sent another $54
> million
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=29730&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2FyaWJiZWFuLWNsaW1hdGUtZnVuZGluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a98d44dac0712c100cf09bd7290ad709910c28d158a7562d04e57f19798a906e]
> under the auspice of Caribbean climate funding. The government
> claimed the money would counter the island’s ongoing
> “humanitarian crisis,” including gang violence on civilians that
> has prevented Haitians from accessing critical food, safe drinking
> water and other basic supplies. The recent turmoil should make it
> even tougher for aid to reach the Haitian people, though the U.S. is
> not addressing that in its latest allocation. It is unknown where
> exactly the money will go and how it will be spent since the
> administration only mentions that the funds “will support the
> World Food Program (WFP), UNICEF, and NGO partners.”

FLORIDA SHERIFF: ‘FEDERAL POLICY DRIVES ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIME’

Thank goodness for those who speak up against the Biden border
invasion. A Florida sheriff has seen the evil consequences up close,
as our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=31592&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVtYW4tdHJhZmZpY2tpbmctcmluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ac0516837a10fcd79eed1204e5629ea6c68d82a0fe84b0e7aeff3d1a1f3b7af5].

> No American state, not even Republican-led Florida with its strict
> law to mitigate the negative impact of record-breaking illegal
> immigration, can escape the detrimental effects of the Biden
> administration’s catastrophic open border policies. A major human
> trafficking operation recently busted by a multi-agency task force
> in central Florida helps illustrate that illegal aliens are not just
> victimizing communities that offer them sanctuary. The problem is
> spreading nationwide, even to areas where local governments do not
> welcome illegal aliens or shield them from federal authorities.
>
> In central Florida’s Polk County, which has a population of around
> 780,000, authorities just dismantled a large-scale human trafficking
> ring that resulted in the arrest of hundreds, including 21 illegal
> immigrants, involved in acts related to soliciting prostitutes,
> offering to commit prostitution, or aiding and abetting prostitutes.
> Authorities coined it “Operation March Sadness 2024
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=31643&F=T&&hash=bbf93faa0aef2681eafac85d0dec37b67cad7e58482086373b02360f681f3b7b

> receive government assistance. Illegal drugs such as fentanyl,
> heroin, methamphetamine, and cocaine were also seized in the sting

> officials say.

> The illegal immigrants arrested in the operation are recent arrivals
> from Chile, Cuba, Guatemala, Mexico, Peru, and Venezuela. During a
> televised press conference
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=31645&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj15c1pIWTZaQVhFMCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=79a0682447768468f88d0c384b910d32c4044153ba6490117dc0018cbc5c0456]
Polk County Sheriff
> Grady Judd blasts the federal government for failing to enforce

> several victims also in the U.S. illegally so they could not be

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67477&L=31646&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaWNlLmdvdi9uZXdzL3JlbGVhc2VzL2ljZS1sYXVuY2hlcy1wcm9ncmFtLXN0cmVuZ3RoZW4taW1taWdyYXRpb24tZW5mb3JjZW1lbnQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0011f81db6c5bcc9010696da08b58a8bf6a04e6e9575ad9b89725ef071456e4f]

clean_body: CIA and Jan 6 Blockbuster News! [INSIDE JW] Records Show CIA Deployed Bomb Techs, Dog Teams to DC on January 6 [] January 6 continues to get even more interesting. It turns out that the CIA was involved in the response to the disturbance. We received [ pages [] of Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) records from the Department of Justice in a FOIA lawsuit that show that the CIA deployed personnel to Washington, DC, on January 6, 2021. We forced the release of the records through a June 5, 2023, [ [] after the Justice Department failed to respond to an August 10, 2023, FOIA request for records and communications regarding shots being fired inside the U.S. Capitol, as well as requests for ATF Special Response Team assistance on January 6, 2021 (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:23-cv-01608)). The ATF records include a series of text messages under the heading “January 7 Intel Chain [ in which two separate references to participation by the CIA are made. One [ [] that “two CIA bomb techs” are assisting with “a pipe bomb scene on New Jersey and D ST SE.” Another references “several CIA dog teams on standby [ Group texts contain a 4 p.m. hour message by persons whose names are redacted regarding [ explosive devices [] found at the Democratic National Committee (DNC) building and one at the Republican National Committee (RNC): “Train traffic is stopped.” “It appears the powerplant is unfounded....” “Upper west Terrance of the capital breached by protesters.” “USCP is sending out a Mutual Aid request.” “Capital Police may be moving resources inside.” “Protesters are cutting tarp at bottom of scaffolding and moving up through that.” “FYSA-FC1, WASH1, SAC, ASAC responded to Capitol....” “2 explosive devices at DNC.” “One at rnc one at dnc.” The “Intel Chain” also reports on the shooting of [ Babbitt [ “Shots fired house floor. 1 civilian down with a gun shot [sic] wound to the chest on the 2nd floor. Gunshot victim has been extracted. Shooting was officer involved.” A separate series of [ messages [] is included in the records. In the 2 p.m. hour on January 6, 2021, the texts read: “West Terrace has been breached [redacted] ... Explosion reported on the rotunda steps [redacted]. Shots fired at rotunda.” Shortly thereafter, another set of texts report: Party 1: “VP stuck inside last I heard.” Patry 2: Copy.” Party 1: “Capitol PD shot someone dead on house floor. Dead.” Party 2: “Christ. What was the final in the devices real or not [redacted].” Party 1: “Clearing Capitol now with bomb techs. Lots of damage.” Party 2: “Damn that’s scary. So sad. Thx for keeping me in the loop brother. I was able to get I [sic] go to my team and the Director before they heard it from outside sources.” The “Intel Chain” also reports that members of Congress are being evacuated to [ McNair [], which is located about two miles south of the Capitol: “Capitol has been transferred to Fort McNair.” “It's an alternate location so they can continue their work.” A heavily redacted series of [ messages [] from redacted sources state, “Command post is at JERSEY and D St SE.” Three additional recipients are added to the text group at 1:21 p.m., one of whom reports: “Just made contact with [redacted] FBI is reporting an additional 3 possible devices for a total of 5 now.” A response follows: “Do you have the locations of the other devices?” The reply is: “Not yet, the FBI is going to pass it on. I believe one was located at the gates to the Power Plant.” The following text states: “LEO’s [Law Enforcement Officers] being attacked on the west side of Capitol with pieces of the restraining fence. Some officers injured.” We are extensively investigating the events of January 6. In February 2024, we filed a [ [] on behalf of Aaron Babbitt, the late Ashli Elizabeth Babbitt’s husband, and Ashli Babbitt’s estate against the U.S. Department of Justice for all FBI files on Ashli Babbitt, an U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. In October 2023, we [ [] that we received the court-ordered [ [] of James W. Joyce, senior counsel in the Office of the General Counsel for the Capitol Police, in which he describes emails among senior officials of the United States Capitol Police (USCP) in January 2021 that show warnings of possible January 6 protests that could lead to serious disruptions at the U.S. Capitol. In September, we received [ [] from the Executive Office for United States Attorneys, a component of the Department of Justice, in a FOIA lawsuit that detailed the extensive apparatus the Biden Justice Department set up to investigate and prosecute January 6 protestors. A [ review of records [] from that lawsuit highlighted the [ declination memorandum [] justifying the decision not to prosecute U.S. Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd for the shooting death of Babbitt. In January 2023, [ [] from the Department of the Air Force, Joint Base Andrews, MD, showed U.S. Capitol Police Lieutenant Michael Byrd was housed at taxpayer expense at Joint Base Andrews after he shot and killed Babbitt. In November 2021, we [ [] multiple [ [], [ [ [] and [ records [] from the DC Metropolitan Police Department about the shooting death of Babbitt. The records included a [ phone video [] of the shooting and an audio of a brief police interview of the shooter, Byrd. In October 2021, United States Park Police [ [] related to the January 6, 2021, demonstrations showed that on the day before the January 6 rally featuring President Trump, U.S. Park Police expected a “large portion” of the attendees to march to the U.S. Capitol and that the FBI was monitoring the January 6 demonstrations, including travel to the events by “subjects of interest.” JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FANI WILLIS FOR COMMUNICATIONS WITH JACK SMITH, PELOSI COMMITTEE District Attorney Fani Willis and Fulton County, Georgia, seem to have provided false information about having no records of communications with Jack Smith and the Pelosi January 6 committee. We filed a Georgia Open Records Act [ [] against Willis and the county for records of any communication they had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Fani Willis et al. [] (No. 24-CV-002805)). We sued in the Superior Court of Fulton County, GA, after Willis and the county denied having any records responsive to an August 2023 Georgia Open Records Act request for: All documents and communications sent to, received from, or relating to Special Counsel Jack Smith or any employees in his office. All documents and communications sent to or received from the United States House January 6th Committee or any of its employees. We state in the lawsuit that Willis’ and the county’s “representation about not having records responsive to the request is likely false.” We refer to a December 5, 2023, [ [] from House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan to Willis that cites a December 2021, letter from Willis to then-House January 6 Committee Chairman Bennie Thompson. In that letter Willis requested assistance from the committee and offered to travel to DC. Jordan writes: Specifically, you asked Rep. Thompson for access to “record [sic] includ[ing] but . . . not limited to recordings and transcripts of witness interviews and depositions, electronic and print records of communications, and records of travel.” You even offered that you and your staff were eager to travel to Washington, D.C, to “meet with investigators in person” and to receive these records “any time” between January 31, 2022, and February 25, 2022. We argue: “Willis’s letter to [former] Chairman Thompson is plainly responsive to the request, yet it was neither produced to Plaintiff in response to the request nor claimed to be subject to exemption from production under the Open Records Act.” We also cite recent news reports and other records which “indicate that representatives of Willis’s office traveled to Washington, DC, and met with January 6 Select Committee staffers in April, May, and November 2022, as Willis proposed in her December 17, 2021 letter ...” We state that a January 2024, Politico [ [] titled “Jan. 6 committee helped guide days of Georgia Trump probe” and a January 2024, [ [] from the House Judiciary Committee to Fulton County Special Prosecutor Nathan J. Wade are examples that “Such meetings plainly had to be coordinated and likely generated communications if not other records about or memorializing these meetings.” Any such records would be responsive to our request, the lawsuit states. On January 30, 2024, we announced that we filed a [ [] against Fulton County for records regarding the hiring of Wade as a special prosecutor by Willis. Wade was hired to pursue unprecedented criminal investigations and prosecutions against former President Trump and others over the 2020 election disputes. In October 2023, we [ [] the DOJ for records and communications between the Office of U.S. Special Counsel Jack Smith and the Fulton County, Georgia, District Attorney’s office regarding requests/receipt of federal funding/assistance in the investigation of former President Trump and his 18 codefendants in the [ County indictment [] of August 14, 2023. To date, the DOJ is refusing to confirm or deny the existence of records, claiming that to do so would interfere with enforcement proceedings. Judicial Watch’s litigation challenging this is continuing. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR TRANSCRIPTS OF BIDEN SPECIAL COUNSEL INTERVIEWS We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) [ [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for records of all Special Counsel interviews of President Biden (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-00700)). We filed the lawsuit in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Department of Justice failed to respond to a February 8, 2024, FOIA request for “all transcripts, audio recordings, and video recordings of all interviews of President Biden conducted during the course of the investigation led by Special Counsel Robert Hur.” On February 5, 2024, Hur [ [] the “Report of the Special Counsel on the Investigation Into Unauthorized Removal, Retention, and Disclosure of Classified Documents Discovered at Locations Including the Penn Biden Center and the Delaware Private Residence of President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.” In the report, Hur called Biden a “well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory” and declined to charge Biden with a “serious felony:” We have also considered that, at trial, Mr. Biden would likely present himself to a jury, as he did during our interview of him, as a sympathetic, well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory. Based on our direct interactions with and observations of him, he is someone for whom many jurors will want to identify reasonable doubt. It would be difficult to convince a jury that they should convict him-by then a former president well into his eighties-of a serious felony that requires a mental state of willfulness. Prior to the finalization of the report, the White House issued [ letter [] to the Special Counsel’s office attacking the report’s “treatment of President Biden’s memory,” and added “there is ample evidence from your interview that the President did well in answering your questions ...” The Biden Justice Department needs to stop protecting Joe Biden, follow the law, and release the transcript and any recordings of his interviews. The written transcript [] was released almost immediately after Judicial Watch filed its lawsuit, but we still are interested in any audio or videos of Biden’s interviews with the special counsel – so stay tuned for more. HAITI GETS MILLIONS MORE FROM U.S. AFTER GANGS TAKE OVER, BILLIONS IN AID PERISH Does anyone seriously believe that throwing more taxpayer money at Haiti will do any good? The country is in gang-infested ruin, and yet more of your tax dollars are on the way. Our Corruption Chronicles blog explains []. Rife with fraud and corruption, the U.S. government’s multi-billion-dollar Haiti aid program has failed miserably to help citizens of the impoverished island, yet the Biden administration is sending more money as violence and lawlessness grip the country. Armed gangs have overrun most of the capital of Port-au-Prince and political instability has plateaued, but the American taxpayer dollars keep flowing with no oversight though billions in assistance have vanished since an earthquake struck Haiti nearly a decade and a half ago. This week Secretary of State Antony Blinken announced that the U.S. is sending another $33 million in humanitarian assistance [] to the Caribbean nation to provide in-kind food assistance, nutrition support, essential health services, improved access to clean water, and prevention and response to gender-based violence, among other critical humanitarian activities. “Since February 29, organized criminal groups have escalated violence, exacerbating the humanitarian situation for Haitians,” says the government press release announcing the recent allocation. “Displaced people are struggling to access food, health care, water, hygiene facilities, and psychological support, further compounding their already dire needs.” The document reveals that the U.S. remains the single largest donor of humanitarian assistance to Haiti, providing tens of millions of dollars in assistance in the last year alone. “The United States will continue to stand with Haitians during this challenging time, working to save lives and alleviate suffering caused by the humanitarian crisis,” the government writes. Since the 2010 earthquake Uncle Sam alone has provided Haiti with over $5.6 billion [] to help the nation bounce back but 14 years later the situation is more dire for the island’s 12 million residents and no one really knows what happened to the money. The funds were supposed to provide Haiti with “life-saving post-disaster relief as well as longer-term recovery, reconstruction, and development programs,” according to the State Department, which confirms that after another earthquake in 2021 the U.S. “again mobilized a whole-of-government effort to provide immediate assistance at the Haitian government’s request.” Haiti’s reconstruction and development will continue for many years, the State Department predicts, adding that in the last few years alone it has doled out hundreds of millions of dollars in humanitarian and health assistance for Haiti. Even before the natural disasters the U.S.—under both Democratic and Republican administrations—has dedicated enormous amounts of money to help Haiti despite systemic lapses in the programs it funds. For instance, a costly initiative to build housing failed miserably after the U.S. spent $90 million [] and tens of thousands of Haitians remain homeless a decade later. The Clinton Foundation and Clinton Bush Haiti Fund also came up with some $88 million for earthquake recovery but Haiti remains a disaster, the poorest country in the western hemisphere. Even before the tremor a federal audit [] revealed that hundreds of millions of American taxpayer dollars were wasted on reckless Haitian projects with the single largest chunk—$170.3 million—going to a failed port and power plant adventure heavily promoted by Bill and Hillary Clinton. The Clinton-backed power and port venture is the biggest and most expensive failure mentioned in the probe, which was ordered by a Florida congresswoman who at the time confirmed a “troubling lack of progress and accountability” in Haiti reconstruction projects. All these years later many Haitians still live in deplorable, shanty town tent cities and a never-ending epidemic of cholera keeps claiming lives. Nearly half of the Haitian population does not have enough food [], according to the United Nations. At the beginning of last year the Biden administration awarded Haiti another $56.5 million [] in humanitarian aid, explaining that it was “for the people of Haiti in response to the country’s humanitarian crisis and cholera epidemic.” A few months later the administration sent another $54 million [] under the auspice of Caribbean climate funding. The government claimed the money would counter the island’s ongoing “humanitarian crisis,” including gang violence on civilians that has prevented Haitians from accessing critical food, safe drinking water and other basic supplies. The recent turmoil should make it even tougher for aid to reach the Haitian people, though the U.S. is not addressing that in its latest allocation. It is unknown where exactly the money will go and how it will be spent since the administration only mentions that the funds “will support the World Food Program (WFP), UNICEF, and NGO partners.” FLORIDA SHERIFF: ‘FEDERAL POLICY DRIVES ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIME’ Thank goodness for those who speak up against the Biden border invasion. A Florida sheriff has seen the evil consequences up close, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. No American state, not even Republican-led Florida with its strict law to mitigate the negative impact of record-breaking illegal immigration, can escape the detrimental effects of the Biden administration’s catastrophic open border policies. A major human trafficking operation recently busted by a multi-agency task force in central Florida helps illustrate that illegal aliens are not just victimizing communities that offer them sanctuary. The problem is spreading nationwide, even to areas where local governments do not welcome illegal aliens or shield them from federal authorities. In central Florida’s Polk County, which has a population of around 780,000, authorities just dismantled a large-scale human trafficking ring that resulted in the arrest of hundreds, including 21 illegal immigrants, involved in acts related to soliciting prostitutes, offering to commit prostitution, or aiding and abetting prostitutes. Authorities coined it “Operation March Sadness 2024 [ [ recently confirmed that more than a dozen of the 66 identified prostitutes were likely human trafficking victims. Law enforcement officials issued 70 felony charges and 288 misdemeanors and the suspects’ criminal histories include a combined 879 felonies and 1,150 misdemeanors. At least 11 suspects told detectives they receive government assistance. Illegal drugs such as fentanyl, heroin, methamphetamine, and cocaine were also seized in the sting as well as 17 firearms. The eldest person was 73 and youngest 16, officials say. The illegal immigrants arrested in the operation are recent arrivals from Chile, Cuba, Guatemala, Mexico, Peru, and Venezuela. During a televised press conference [] Polk County Sheriff Grady Judd blasts the federal government for failing to enforce immigration laws. During the segment the sheriff, who oversees a force of about 1,800, introduced a poster board from the podium with mug shots of the illegal immigrant suspects and silhouettes of several victims also in the U.S. illegally so they could not be identified. Above the mugshots, in large black letters the poster read: “Federal Policy Drives Illegal Immigrant Crime and Victimization.” Grady pointed to one of the suspects on the board and provided a larger mug shot for the media, explaining that he came from New York with three females who are controlled by a human trafficker that sets up their appointments, posts ads online and tells them where to go. The prostitutes then fly to major metro centers where they set up their appointments for sex, said the sheriff, who was first elected in 2004 and has been reelected four times since. “We have a crisis at the border,” Sheriff Judd said. “And because of the crisis at the border we have people that are victimizing illegal folks, forcing them into the sex trade because we allow these criminals in the country illegally.” Unlike a growing number of law enforcement agencies nationwide that have adopted sanctuary policies, the Polk County Sheriff’s Office (PCSO) fully cooperates with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) when it encounters criminal illegal immigrants in its jurisdiction or jails. Under a partnership known as 287(g), PCSO honors ICE detainers and notifies the federal agency of inmates in the country illegally so that they can be deported. A few years ago, PCSO enlisted in a collaborative federal initiative, known as Warrant Service Officer [] [) program, that expands the immigration enforcement powers of local police after training officers to perform certain duties typically carried out by federal immigration agents. “The WSO program will protect communities from criminal aliens who threaten vulnerable populations with violence, drugs and gang activity by allowing partner jurisdictions the flexibility to make immigration arrests in their jail or correctional facility,” Acting ICE Director Matthew Albence said when the program was launched in 2019. To further deter illegal immigrants from coming to the Sunshine State, Florida also passed a law [] [ sanctuary cities in the entire state. The measure also requires local police to fully comply with federal immigration authorities and authorizes law enforcement agencies to transport an alien unlawfully present in the U.S. under certain circumstances. Public universities and colleges must also abide by the law. Even with the strict measures, it appears Florida cannot escape the wrath of the unprecedented illegal immigration crisis created by the Biden administration. name: Colin Allred
subject: Texas has never elected a Black Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64336?t=6&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ) Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz and become the first ever Black Senator from Texas. If you’re already with me, [will you split a donation between me and the Voter Protection Project to help power my grassroots campaign? →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64336?t=7&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64336?t=8&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ)
---
All the way back in 1870, Hiram Rhodes Revels, a pastor and State Senator from Mississippi, was elected as the first Black US Senator. Since then, we've come a long way as a country. **But representation – like our democracy – is a work in progress, and I believe we can do better.**

Black Americans have long faced _far too many_ obstacles like: discrimination, lower pay, higher job instability – not to mention the racist voter suppression laws that Texas Republicans like Ted Cruz have championed, which make it harder for certain folks to vote.

**The bottom line is this: It's essential that our government reflects the people it represents.**

I'm ready to defeat Ted Cruz this November and fight to build a more perfect union for my boys and every kid in Texas. But unlike Ted Cruz, I don't have corporate special interests footing the bill for my campaign.

**To win, I need a massive movement of grassroots supporters to step up and join me in this fight.** [Please, will you split a donation of $10 or more between me and the Voter Protection Project to power my campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, become the first Black Senator from Texas, and be the leader Texans deserve? →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64336?t=9&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64337?t=10&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64338?t=11&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64339?t=12&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64340?t=13&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64336?t=14&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ)
I'm so grateful to have you fighting with me.

– Colin
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=13476%2E878179%2E7HAwaZ)

body:

Peter,
**Right now, crucial programs like SNAP, Social Security, and Medicaid are at a crossroads:**
**The House Republican Study Committee Budget Proposes Harsh Changes to Social Security **_(Center for American Progress)_

**House GOP Panel Releases Budget That Would 'Destroy Social Security as We Know It' **_(Common Dreams)_
These lifelines for the working class face threats every day from the far-right MAGA Republicans who do not understand or care about the struggles of everyday Americans. The solution? Electing a Democratic supermajority in both the Senate and the House.
**President Joe Biden needs allies in Congress who will work tirelessly to protect and expand these vital programs. But we can only achieve this with a strong Democratic presence in both houses.** That's where you come in.
We must ensure that the elderly, the disabled, and working class families have the support they need. But to make this a reality, we need a Democratic supermajority — and for that, we need your grassroots support.
[_**Can we count on you to help us build a future where these essential programs are safeguarded? Jon Tester proposes a constitutional amendment declaring that corporations are NOT people – undoing the disastrous _Citizens United_ ruling.

**IF** we don’t all use our voices to demand an end to dark money, we’ll lose all hope of passing this historic amendment.

**BUT IF** we all speak up, we can push Congress to act and finally restore our democracy and return power to the people – not special interests!
[**So we’re calling on you: Chip in $7 before midnight to end _Citizens United_ and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/39449?t=8&akid=20989%2E4449941%2Egz2isV)

subject: Joseph Biden's Appeasement Is Dangerous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
Biden's release of $10 billion in funds today to Iran is extremely dangerous. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/joseph-bidens-appeasement-is-dangerous?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| |
---
| |
# Joseph Biden's Appeasement Is Pushing Us Towards War.
, My latest substack article identifies concerns with the actions of Joe Biden today to once again unfreeze $10 billion in assets for Iran in the wake of sending 1000 troops and four ships to the coast of Gaza in opposition to Israel, our ally. This is a dangerous move.

As your Member of Congress I will fight to end this brinksmanship "Carter-style" foreign policy which appeases the terrorists and foments violence and the death of our troops.

Read more below or t[ake my poll and sign up on substack here](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=23707e7d1c&e=5bb5efcda7). And [please support my campaign with your immediate contribution](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=0bf6dccc68&e=5bb5efcda7). Thank you!
Freedom and Victory,
[
Dan Cox, Candidate for Member of Congress (R-MD6)](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=1f8879c20a&e=5bb5efcda7)
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=271c191859&e=5bb5efcda7)
### Biden unfreezing $10 Billion in Iranian-linked assets today endangers our military and homeland.
[DAN COX](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=9282620b7e&e=5bb5efcda7)
MAR 15, 2024

Share MARCH 15, 2024. After three U.S. Service members were killed in Jordan and thirty others seriously injured just six weeks ago, Joe Biden’s National Security Advisor John Kirby has announced the release by the United States of an additional $10 Billion of Iranian frozen money today. This after Biden released $6 Billion in frozen Iranian assets last September just before the infamous October 7th attack by Hamas terrorists on Israel. Before World War II, Winston Churchill called out concerns of British Prime Minister Chamberlain’s “Peace in our time” signed deal with Hitler in Munich. It was nothing more than smoke screen over the telegraphed weakness. It was appeasement.
##### _Sgt. William Jerome Rivers, 46, Spc. Kennedy Ladon Sanders, 24, and Spc. Breonna Alexsondria Moffett, 23. PHOTO: US Army Reserve Command, AP_.
Joseph Biden appears to be our Chamberlain. Kirby said at [today’s presser](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=90b3df9e30&e=5bb5efcda7) in defense of the release of funds, "None of this money goes to the mullahs. None of this money goes into Tehran. The sanctions relief that is provided actually goes to vendors that provide humanitarian assistance to the Iranian people," he told Fox News White House correspondent Jacqui Heinrich... "Not only do the Iraqi people not suffer because of this, the Iranian people aren't going to suffer because of this." Instead, it is the whole earth that may suffer for it - most assuredly America and Israel. But if Mr. Kirby is claiming that withholding the $10 billion from access by the Iranian government is somehow harming the people of Iran, his statement is illogical. Think: if the U.S. government identified these funds as likely to enrich the nuclear and terror programs of Iran such that it was frozen, it makes no sense that the money’s release now for Iranian “humanitarian assistance” would change that concern. Kirby wishes us to overlook that we already have the mullah’s word for it: they will use it the money “however” they see fit, as Iran told NBC. And that is what they did in killing our troops while they slept in their barracks on January 29th this year. They were from the 718th Engineer Company, a US Army Reserve unit based out of Fort Moore, Georgia. Shame on this feckless decision today. Common sense shows more US troops could die from these release of funds. Where is the outrage in the Biden admin for killing our soldiers?!!! How dare they give Iran more money just six weeks later. According to reporting today, experts are calling Biden’s move dangerous and will push the world towards nuclear escalation. "This waiver helped subsidize the murder of three American soldiers in Jordan and non-stop attacks on the U.S. Navy and American-owned ships in the Red Sea," Richard Goldberg, a Senior Advisor with the Foundation for Defense of Democracies said in a statement on Thursday. "Continuing to give Iran access to billions will only further fuel terrorism, missile proliferation and nuclear escalation." The only thing that has changed is that three more U.S. service personnel are dead and thirty wounded from an Iranian-backed drone. This action by the Biden Administration today will endanger both our troops and Navy, as well as our homeland. Additionally, Biden’s deployment of [1000 service men and women and four Navy ships ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=262fae84ff&e=5bb5efcda7)to intervene in Israel’s War against Hamas is seriously flawed and dangerous. Make no mistake - Biden’s actions are not for humanitarian purposes. They are to send a message of appeasement to Iran, the state-sponsor of terrorism fomenting the violence in the Middle East and funding terror worldwide. And it is doing so while placing our troops in harms way. Congress should act with immediacy to pass legislation freezing the funds under federal law [like they did last fall ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=f407d74b9b&e=5bb5efcda7)when Biden unfroze the $6 billion to appease Iran - just before October 7 attack sparking war in Israel. There is a clear pattern that Joe Biden is following. Receive threats from Iran - and here even the deaths of American soldiers, then release billions to Iranian-connected agencies and call it “aid.” That is appeasement or worse, enablement. The result from the last release of funds was another war in the Middle East still ongoing. The Biden administration’s feckless release of another $10 billion for Iran this time could mean an even greater escalation of war in the region, or beyond. As my veteran grandfather always told me, when a liberal Democrat president is losing his re-election they always get us into war to try and save re-election since a war time president has always won a second term. But America is awake to this. Biden and his administration will be the first to lose even if they do get us into war, God forbid. May God save the United States of America and our honorable men and women in uniform.
* * *
_© Daniel Lewis Cox, 2024. Candidate for U.S. House of Representatives, CD6-MD. Daniel L. Cox, J.D., Esq., was a Pi Sigma Alpha political science honors society member in college and holds a bachelor’s degree in Government with an emphasis in National Security from the University of Maryland University College (now University of Maryland Global Campus). He is a former State Delegate for Frederick, Maryland from 2019-2023, and is a practicing constitutional litigation attorney for the last 19 years, having studied national security law under a former Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Admiral Vern Clark, and a former Attorney General of the United States, at his alma mater, Regent University School of Law._ _www.coxforcongress.org_

clean_body: Biden's release of $10 billion in funds today to Iran is extremely dangerous. | | | | | | | Joseph Biden's Appeasement Is Pushing Us Towards War. , My latest substack article identifies concerns with the actions of Joe Biden today to once again unfreeze $10 billion in assets for Iran in the wake of sending 1000 troops and four ships to the coast of Gaza in opposition to Israel, our ally. This is a dangerous move. As your Member of Congress I will fight to end this brinksmanship "Carter-style" foreign policy which appeases the terrorists and foments violence and the death of our troops. Read more below or t. And . Thank you! Freedom and Victory, Biden unfreezing $10 Billion in Iranian-linked assets today endangers our military and homeland. MAR 15, 2024 Share MARCH 15, 2024. After three U.S. Service members were killed in Jordan and thirty others seriously injured just six weeks ago, Joe Biden’s National Security Advisor John Kirby has announced the release by the United States of an additional $10 Billion of Iranian frozen money today. This after Biden released $6 Billion in frozen Iranian assets last September just before the infamous October 7th attack by Hamas terrorists on Israel. Before World War II, Winston Churchill called out concerns of British Prime Minister Chamberlain’s “Peace in our time” signed deal with Hitler in Munich. It was nothing more than smoke screen over the telegraphed weakness. It was appeasement. Sgt. William Jerome Rivers, 46, Spc. Kennedy Ladon Sanders, 24, and Spc. Breonna Alexsondria Moffett, 23. PHOTO: US Army Reserve Command, AP. Joseph Biden appears to be our Chamberlain. Kirby said at in defense of the release of funds, "None of this money goes to the mullahs. None of this money goes into Tehran. The sanctions relief that is provided actually goes to vendors that provide humanitarian assistance to the Iranian people," he told Fox News White House correspondent Jacqui Heinrich... "Not only do the Iraqi people not suffer because of this, the Iranian people aren't going to suffer because of this." Instead, it is the whole earth that may suffer for it - most assuredly America and Israel. But if Mr. Kirby is claiming that withholding the $10 billion from access by the Iranian government is somehow harming the people of Iran, his statement is illogical. Think: if the U.S. government identified these funds as likely to enrich the nuclear and terror programs of Iran such that it was frozen, it makes no sense that the money’s release now for Iranian “humanitarian assistance” would change that concern. Kirby wishes us to overlook that we already have the mullah’s word for it: they will use it the money “however” they see fit, as Iran told NBC. And that is what they did in killing our troops while they slept in their barracks on January 29th this year. They were from the 718th Engineer Company, a US Army Reserve unit based out of Fort Moore, Georgia. Shame on this feckless decision today. Common sense shows more US troops could die from these release of funds. Where is the outrage in the Biden admin for killing our soldiers?!!! How dare they give Iran more money just six weeks later. According to reporting today, experts are calling Biden’s move dangerous and will push the world towards nuclear escalation. "This waiver helped subsidize the murder of three American soldiers in Jordan and non-stop attacks on the U.S. Navy and American-owned ships in the Red Sea," Richard Goldberg, a Senior Advisor with the Foundation for Defense of Democracies said in a statement on Thursday. "Continuing to give Iran access to billions will only further fuel terrorism, missile proliferation and nuclear escalation." The only thing that has changed is that three more U.S. service personnel are dead and thirty wounded from an Iranian-backed drone. This action by the Biden Administration today will endanger both our troops and Navy, as well as our homeland. Additionally, Biden’s deployment of intervene in Israel’s War against Hamas is seriously flawed and dangerous. Make no mistake - Biden’s actions are not for humanitarian purposes. They are to send a message of appeasement to Iran, the state-sponsor of terrorism fomenting the violence in the Middle East and funding terror worldwide. And it is doing so while placing our troops in harms way. Congress should act with immediacy to pass legislation freezing the funds under federal law Biden unfroze the $6 billion to appease Iran - just before October 7 attack sparking war in Israel. There is a clear pattern that Joe Biden is following. Receive threats from Iran - and here even the deaths of American soldiers, then release billions to Iranian-connected agencies and call it “aid.” That is appeasement or worse, enablement. The result from the last release of funds was another war in the Middle East still ongoing. The Biden administration’s feckless release of another $10 billion for Iran this time could mean an even greater escalation of war in the region, or beyond. As my veteran grandfather always told me, when a liberal Democrat president is losing his re-election they always get us into war to try and save re-election since a war time president has always won a second term. But America is awake to this. Biden and his administration will be the first to lose even if they do get us into war, God forbid. May God save the United States of America and our honorable men and women in uniform. © Daniel Lewis Cox, 2024. Candidate for U.S. House of Representatives, CD6-MD. Daniel L. Cox, J.D., Esq., was a Pi Sigma Alpha political science honors society member in college and holds a bachelor’s degree in Government with an emphasis in National Security from the University of Maryland University College (now University of Maryland Global Campus). He is a former State Delegate for Frederick, Maryland from 2019-2023, and is a practicing constitutional litigation attorney for the last 19 years, having studied national security law under a former Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Admiral Vern Clark, and a former Attorney General of the United States, at his alma mater, Regent University School of Law. www.coxforcongress.org | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC. | Copyright © 2024 Dan Cox for Congress, All rights reserved.

For the third week in a row now, far-left agitators have come to my house early in the morning chanting hateful slogans, ringing bells, screaming and hollering. They claim to be protesting the military operations in Gaza, _but their real goal is to wake up my neighbors, harass my family, and attempt to intimidate me because I am a conservative Republican and a threat to the far-left network working to transform our country._ **[Again - I won’t be intimidated by these leftist malcontents and their liberal paymasters. clean_body: But I need your help to stand strong| | | Peter, UPDATE * I’m furious. For the third week in a row now, far-left agitators have come to my house early in the morning chanting hateful slogans, ringing bells, screaming and hollering. They claim to be protesting the military operations in Gaza, but their real goal is to wake up my neighbors, harass my family, and attempt to intimidate me because I am a conservative Republican and a threat to the far-left network working to transform our country. You can use this secure link to contribute: Sadly, this is now common in American politics thanks to the far-left non-profits that fund political agitators seemingly everywhere on every issue. We see protesters blocking traffic, interrupting campus speeches, screaming hatred on the streets, and even attempting to vandalize artwork in museums. Now they’ve come to my home...again and again... Because radical leftists refuse to tolerate any dissent. They have always used physical violence and intimidation to put pressure on their political opponents. Now that the far left has infiltrated the Democrat Party, these hateful tactics are going mainstream. But I won’t back down for one second. When I look outside my window at the screaming mob, I only grow more resolved and committed to fighting for what’s right. Thanks in advance for your help. Patriots like you are the reason we’re going to defeat the far-left radicals and save America in November! For Liberty, | | Ted Cruz Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| | _**First,**_**** Measure 110 was passed decriminalizing hard drugs and promising to help homelessness and drug addiction. _**Then,**_**** Oregon became the highest-ranked state for fentanyl deaths in 2023. _**Now,**_ Oregon lawmakers are hoping to reverse the damage they’ve caused in our communities. **Oregon has seen a 1500% increase in overdose deaths since 2020- the largest increase in the entire country. **
---
| | | [ I SUPPORT REVERSING MEASURE 110 ](http://links.lorichavezderemerforcongress.com/els/v2/ex2jTgw~vjfe/M3piRndFUVZ6ZEcyak1neVpEZ2RIVG1WT1lHM0NQQXNtT3FORGtLeFNIY3hFZjV6T013OS95cmlHbWwvT2pJMnJ4eGRROEd1Vk52YUgxcERjd01BYVplVy9ncytrV3JpNGNkbFp5M1ZEZW89S0/)

I am committed to prioritizing the safety of our communities, putting America and Oregon first, supporting our veterans, empowering farmers, improving transportation and infrastructure, and addressing homelessness. Thank you for all your support! \- Lori Chavez-DeRemer

clean_body: Oregon to Reverse Decriminalization | | | | | | This has been a long time coming, Peter, | | | | | | First,** Measure 110 was passed decriminalizing hard drugs and promising to help homelessness and drug addiction. Then, Oregon became the highest-ranked state for fentanyl deaths in 2023. Now, Oregon lawmakers are hoping to reverse the damage they’ve caused in our communities. Oregon has seen a 1500% increase in overdose deaths since 2020- the largest increase in the entire country. | | | | | This is extremely sad for our state. Oregonians deserve better than another radical policy that over promised and severely under-delivered. Measure 110 has been a complete and utter disaster from the beginning. We must do better to help those with addictions rather than enabling them. Radical Left policies that willingly harm Oregonians should never be allowed to pass. If we’re going to make a better future for Oregonians, we must support re-criminalizing hard drugs. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Research Team | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Note For You, From Lori Chavez-DeRemer Thank you for your unwavering support as we strive to build a stronger, safer, and more prosperous future for Oregon. I am committed to prioritizing the safety of our communities, putting America and Oregon first, supporting our veterans, empowering farmers, improving transportation and infrastructure, and addressing homelessness. With your continued support, we can work together to implement effective measures and policies that will positively impact the lives of our residents and the overall well-being of Oregon. Thank you for all your support! \- Lori Chavez-DeRemer | | | | | CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 | | | | | | | If you love Oregon as much as Lori does, claim your official Love Oregon T-Shirt! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Ancient Christianity: a free course from Hillsdale
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDc2LWY3ZWU5ZGJmNGNhMzQ3MjI5YzhlNzA0N2E5NzExZjkzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL29ubGluZS5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2xhbmRpbmcvYW5jaWVudC1jaHJpc3RpYW5pdHk_c2M9MDA3MDhOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFuY2llbnRjaHJpc3RpYW5pdHlfb2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHJhaWxlcl9iZ19BRV9MTE80NzQ3NSJ9/kALlxsx--msvr2JWE5UQlQ)
---
| | Dear Friend,

What strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire—all while authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic parishes in the United States?

How about the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that forced many houses of worship to close?

These news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it seems like **faith in America is under siege.**

That’s one reason we released our free online course, **“Ancient Christianity.”** I hope you’ll enroll today using this secure link:
**
**[](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDc2LWY3ZWU5ZGJmNGNhMzQ3MjI5YzhlNzA0N2E5NzExZjkzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL29ubGluZS5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2xhbmRpbmcvYW5jaWVudC1jaHJpc3RpYW5pdHk_c2M9MDA3MDhOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFuY2llbnRjaHJpc3RpYW5pdHlfb2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHJhaWxlcl9iZ19BRV9MTE80NzQ3NSJ9/LdF1F_OpyOGhwljOKLY0gw)
**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDc2LWY3ZWU5ZGJmNGNhMzQ3MjI5YzhlNzA0N2E5NzExZjkzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL29ubGluZS5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2xhbmRpbmcvYW5jaWVudC1jaHJpc3RpYW5pdHk_c2M9MDA3MDhOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFuY2llbnRjaHJpc3RpYW5pdHlfb2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHJhaWxlcl9iZ19BRV9MTE80NzQ3NSJ9/oeCMnU2iRwWCm4z0bsE4vQ)**

The course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same time, they shaped the Christian church and established the foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

Looking back at the Christians of the past, we can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and set an example for us to follow, especially in our strange times.

**Their examples of “faith that overcomes” can inspire us today.** Enroll in “Ancient Christianity” offered by Hillsdale College today!

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

name: Lara Trump
subject: It’s official. I’m the new Co-Chair of the RNC.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life – and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4lc3kqg3heg8b02bn5h8vi9j688h0q8obguq3t8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecpj4cdh2bs "Lara Trump")
---

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi9tre8s7a0s1u7krope6id3qifedtgb22sdprrg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecpj4cdh2bs "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.
---
| | | [PLEASE: DONATE $10](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z77m42kruhqn6gencnbakgf8uhmc27psb6s0ug60_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecpj4cdh2bs "PLEASE: DONATE $10")
---

---
| | | [PLEASE: DONATE $50](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2iebt5pflk1fciafueosiccv3u37v3cajo9qrq8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecpj4cdh2bs "PLEASE: DONATE $50")
---
| | | [PLEASE: DONATE $100](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrk6keurmop2oagjto84orlqmcaldknl6pmuhob0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecpj4cdh2bs "PLEASE: DONATE $100")
---
Folks like you are the beating heart of the Republican Party. Everything we're going to accomplish in the next election is because of your hard work, your dedication, and your support.

**Thanks for everything you do for our country. It 's inspiring. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.**

God bless you. God bless America.

_- Lara Trump_

---

---

I'm launching my brand new _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zou5k4ssp6oae4r3d3hfsk3oq1879cpedc5p9mu8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecpj4cdh2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z41o62k3ok894310qain2qk0luqfb3flefi1qlfg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj6c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlhp0hqk5ik0vthr96nh93diun9cfusou6ei5utg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj6c1h2bs) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvnvgrce0ou19054rbl8ba7kjcjrk56f18qbc778_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj6c1h2bs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvf9pco1hpdcbld351vm30hvfhd0697soi1cmsdo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj5c9h6aoj246h22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj6c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zik14ht8j5etau0nvat3j3f265ojuoi7lo3pmt60_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj6c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zal2s9t6p0ctitqg3sflq97p0r943tjnjoi7ghmo_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj6c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Lara Trump
subject: I’m the new RNC Co-Chair!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life – and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt946lr6tanovug1totvvun9cc11o0j5ngv7u51g_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj7c9h2bs "Lara Trump")
---

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsvbcrcodmlu6sto7h988ldrsv846so8rekf17ig_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj7c9h2bs "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.
---
| | | [PLEASE: DONATE $10](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrvejj3hv5bsod158809jgc52p02bsrpkudbk7o8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj7c9h2bs "PLEASE: DONATE $10")
---
| | | [PLEASE: DONATE $25](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z99tslq78u2nj3qufdiavn7iitma4f04nrlvmhv8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj7c9h2bs "PLEASE: DONATE $25")
---
| | | [PLEASE: DONATE $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8load06nu1ibgsf6psmdf7jfoffp6gccmr1k8s0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj7c9h2bs "PLEASE: DONATE $50")
---
| | | [PLEASE: DONATE $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc1dq822ft5i429fstais0bem1md4m4d0ali2kp8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj7c9h2bs "PLEASE: DONATE $100")
---
Folks like you are the beating heart of the Republican Party. Everything we're going to accomplish in the next election is because of your hard work, your dedication, and your support.

**Thanks for everything you do for our country. It 's inspiring. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.**

God bless you. God bless America.

_- Lara Trump_

---

---

I'm launching my brand new _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj66cs6nakq88qlcmo7l9rps8asdonoh5br4bvpg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj7c9h2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

Majority Leader Steve Scalise

Third: The Biden-Harris Campaign put together what could be the biggest Liberal fundraiser in history headlined by _JOE BIDEN + BARACK OBAMA + BILL CLINTON._

The worst part? Our Majority is about to SHRINK even further to a two-seat margin next week.

name: Lara Trump
subject: I’m the new RNC Co-Chair!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life – and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkbfvjhad4ndfouf80nqms89481h77c8gv8qti30_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj3c5h2bs "Lara Trump")
---

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmhvivs9lshokmsaj6pmdq7bd2imcohdfii74a0g_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgecoj3c5h2bs "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.
---

Folks like you are the beating heart of the Republican Party. Everything we're going to accomplish in the next election is because of your hard work, your dedication, and your support.

**Thanks for everything you do for our country. It 's inspiring. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.**

God bless you. God bless America.

_- Lara Trump_

name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Answers to the Great Questions of the Christian Faith
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| |
Dear Friend, Hillsdale has a video we’d like to share with you today. It’s the trailer for our free online course,** [“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-HbLrr5dEKC5iqT50_7sQ)** **You can watch your video and register for the course below: ** **_[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/c-s-lewis-on-christianity](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)_**
---
| | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| | C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him perhaps the most important apologist of the twentieth century. That’s why we have produced this course, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” The goal is to share his profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

But how do you explore the depths of Lewis’s writings on these fundamental topics in a seven-lecture course? This is also why we’re thrilled to have Dr. Michael Ward—one of the leading scholars of C.S. Lewis—as the instructor for this course. Dr. Ward is a distinguished teaching fellow at Hillsdale College and a professor of theology at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s_ The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! **After watching the trailer, I hope you’ll want to join us and learn from C.S. Lewis by[registering for this free online course](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.). You can easily do so on the same page as the video****. ** This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of the Christian faith. That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis—enjoy your sneak peek! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online LearningHillsdale College
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDc2LTgyYzQ2YWM1MGU1ODQ4NjViNmViMDM2MDM5Y2M2YzAzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/iqvUA5SBi5Izryfih4e9Ow) to unsubscribe.
---
