name: Steve Garvey #6
subject: Strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Help me hit a home run

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt3ld138e12p6o2rpeuvvhq2eltvssrvglonk4qg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgeao36chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4nrk1rgk1mb9jocdsg4ikgvksg3qgp5tgp3hdi8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgeao36chh2bs)
---
| | Friend, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfklhvesv8qufuc0ad08ucv1gdvovrl7502tpfkg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgeao36chh2bs)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvvq8ohcvo57i9itdh5hd0i83cj5vhafg5nstl5g_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clgeao36chh2bs)**
---
| | Sincerely,

---

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: they’ve got it coming
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Remember hearing about that viral video of the undercover reporter from _Project Veritas?_

The one that exposed a Missouri Planned Parenthood facility who were bragging they transport underage girls across state lines for abortions every day – _without their parents’ knowledge?_

Well, Missouri’s Attorney General, Andrew Bailey, is _**SUING_** Planned Parenthood for trafficking minors out of state to get abortions!

_**_And this is right when pro-abortion radicals are trying to put an abortion referendum on the ballot in Missouri to END the state’s abortion prevention law_!**_

Pro-Life Friend, I believe we now have built up a head of steam in Missouri, as Show-Me State voters are going to be enraged at how Planned Parenthood is breaking the law, targeting kids, and flat-out _DECEIVING_ parents!

That’s why it’s time to STOP this abortion referendum from reaching the ballot in Missouri and elsewhere with the new **“ _DECLINE TO SIGN_ ”** digital ad we designed to run in referendum states!
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-skdduil-duchtdja-y/)
**[But I’m counting on YOU to help us run these ads with your most generous contribution of $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 TODAY](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-skdduil-duchtdja-j/)!**

As you’ll see, this ad explains why **_NO VOTER**_ should ever agree to sign anything that would put human life on the ballot.

In many states, that’s how ballot referendums start – with canvassers asking other people for their signatures to put an issue on the ballot.

You see, to gather signatures, pro-abortion activists often lie about what the ballot measures they support would do – saying it’s for “healthcare freedom,” which is meant to confuse voters.

They do the same thing once an issue is voted on too. It’s far more effective than you’d imagine.

**In fact, in Ohio’s referendum fight last year, one GOP pollster told me that ONE-QUARTER of the people who voted to legalize late-term abortion were actually pro-life!**

_So, running these ads is critical to exposing the TRUTH to voters and informing them why they should never sign onto an abortion referendum_.

Not only that, but the cheapest and easiest way to kill a pro-abortion referendum is to stop it from happening!

That’s exactly what our **“ _DECLINE TO SIGN_ ”** ad is designed to do.

**_If you’re sick of the (FALSE!) narrative that pro-lifers can’t win referendum fights, then this is our opportunity to change it_.**

What the Abortion Lobby is doing in Missouri is truly SICK, Pro-Life Friend.

But this also gives you and me a real chance to defeat the Abortion Lobby’s pro-abortion referendums both in Missouri and across the nation – **[if you can help me raise the resources to run this ad now, before it’s too late](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-skdduil-duchtdja-i/)!**

You see, the deadline for the Abortion Lobby to gather the signatures they need to put abortion on the ballot is May 5th.

**_So, right now is “CRUNCH TIME” if we’re going to stop them from getting the signatures they need_.**

And this campaign is how we’re going to do it.

**[So, will you please consider making a contribution to _Students for Life Action_ to help us fight these pro-abortion referendums and show just how much is on the line in 2024](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-skdduil-duchtdja-d/)?**

You see, with the 2024 elections right around the corner, we have a real chance to stop the Abortion Lobby in its tracks and end their vile acts of abuse against minor girls.

It’s time we make our voices heard and plaster our pro-life ad in every house in America!

Thank you for everything you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

P.S. – Missouri’s Attorney General Andrew Bailey recently filed a LAWSUIT against Planned Parenthood for illegally trafficking minors out of state to get abortions!

It’s critical we help shine this light on how abusive the Abortion Lobby is, which is why _Students for Life Action_ just crafted a heartfelt ad that we’ll be running in Missouri and other states where pro-abortion referendums are making their way to the ballot!

**[So, please help us run the ad you can see when you CLICK HERE with your most generous contribution TODAY](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-skdduil-duchtdja-h/)!**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: they’ve got it coming
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Remember hearing about that viral video of the undercover reporter from _Project Veritas?_

The one that exposed a Missouri Planned Parenthood facility who were bragging they transport underage girls across state lines for abortions every day – _without their parents’ knowledge?_

Well, Missouri’s Attorney General, Andrew Bailey, is _**SUING_** Planned Parenthood for trafficking minors out of state to get abortions!

_**_And this is right when pro-abortion radicals are trying to put an abortion referendum on the ballot in Missouri to END the state’s abortion prevention law_!**_

Pro-Life Friend, I believe we now have built up a head of steam in Missouri, as Show-Me State voters are going to be enraged at how Planned Parenthood is breaking the law, targeting kids, and flat-out _DECEIVING_ parents!

That’s why it’s time to STOP this abortion referendum from reaching the ballot in Missouri and elsewhere with the new **“ _DECLINE TO SIGN_ ”** digital ad we designed to run in referendum states!
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-skhdthd-duchtdja-y/)
**[But I’m counting on YOU to help us run these ads with your most generous contribution of $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 TODAY](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-skhdthd-duchtdja-j/)!**

As you’ll see, this ad explains why **_NO VOTER**_ should ever agree to sign anything that would put human life on the ballot.

In many states, that’s how ballot referendums start – with canvassers asking other people for their signatures to put an issue on the ballot.

You see, to gather signatures, pro-abortion activists often lie about what the ballot measures they support would do – saying it’s for “healthcare freedom,” which is meant to confuse voters.

They do the same thing once an issue is voted on too. It’s far more effective than you’d imagine.

**In fact, in Ohio’s referendum fight last year, one GOP pollster told me that ONE-QUARTER of the people who voted to legalize late-term abortion were actually pro-life!**

_So, running these ads is critical to exposing the TRUTH to voters and informing them why they should never sign onto an abortion referendum_.

Not only that, but the cheapest and easiest way to kill a pro-abortion referendum is to stop it from happening!

That’s exactly what our **“ _DECLINE TO SIGN_ ”** ad is designed to do.

**_If you’re sick of the (FALSE!) narrative that pro-lifers can’t win referendum fights, then this is our opportunity to change it_.**

What the Abortion Lobby is doing in Missouri is truly SICK, Pro-Life Friend.

But this also gives you and me a real chance to defeat the Abortion Lobby’s pro-abortion referendums both in Missouri and across the nation – **[if you can help me raise the resources to run this ad now, before it’s too late](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-skhdthd-duchtdja-i/)!**

You see, the deadline for the Abortion Lobby to gather the signatures they need to put abortion on the ballot is May 5th.

**_So, right now is “CRUNCH TIME” if we’re going to stop them from getting the signatures they need_.**

And this campaign is how we’re going to do it.

**[So, will you please consider making a contribution to _Students for Life Action_ to help us fight these pro-abortion referendums and show just how much is on the line in 2024](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-skhdthd-duchtdja-d/)?**

You see, with the 2024 elections right around the corner, we have a real chance to stop the Abortion Lobby in its tracks and end their vile acts of abuse against minor girls.

It’s time we make our voices heard and plaster our pro-life ad in every house in America!

Thank you for everything you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

P.S. – Missouri’s Attorney General Andrew Bailey recently filed a LAWSUIT against Planned Parenthood for illegally trafficking minors out of state to get abortions!

It’s critical we help shine this light on how abusive the Abortion Lobby is, which is why _Students for Life Action_ just crafted a heartfelt ad that we’ll be running in Missouri and other states where pro-abortion referendums are making their way to the ballot!

**[So, please help us run the ad you can see when you CLICK HERE with your most generous contribution TODAY](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-skhdthd-duchtdja-h/)!**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

### **We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot**
**Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.****With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.****The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.****As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.****The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.****Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.****Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality.**
---
### **Press Release**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Alaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting** _**Anchorage, Alaska**_**– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans.****"This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."****The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.****This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger).****"We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."****The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state.****"We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **We Did The Impossible**
---
**We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024**
---
---
|
---
#### **The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon**
---
In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon

Share with 5-10 people. | | | | (Disclaimer, We did not make this website and do not support the alternative voting method that is promoted on the website. Please read the whole thing) | We will be at the District 31-36 Republican Convention in Fairbanks Today. We are going to Update 150 Fairbanks Republicans on Our Fight Against you are in District 31-36 make sure to attend 1201 Hoselton Rd, Fairbanks, AK Pay for your ticket here 1, 8, 25, 26, 27, 28, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36 Convention is Tomorrow March 16th. If you need to know what your district is, go to this link scroll to the bottom and type in your address and it will tell you who your State Senator and State House of Representative is, whatever district your State House of Representatives is, is your district number. Search on your district convention. | Sign Up To Join this Fall, We plan to take him Silver Salmon Fishing, We plan to Take Him on a Glacier Tour, and We plan on going to the Alaska State Fair. If you would like to stay updated on Our Plans, Want to Meet Scott Presler, or if you would like us to come to your group or community event, please reach out and we will see what we can schedule. Planning Mid to Late August for him to be in Town. Dates Coming Soon, Stay Tuned. | We ran a poll for 7 days, here are the results | Who’s Team are You on? Team Alaska or Team Soros WE DID IT!!!, We are in Scott Presler might be coming to Alaska to help us GOTV for our Repeal of Rank Choice Voting | | There are some that feel I am being too mean to the GOP Leadership. I do not think so, I think they should be accountable for their inaction (No Assistance on the Repeal of Ranked Choice Voting). The Arizona GOP, Idaho GOP, Hawaii GOP all invited me with Open Arms, The Alaska GOP was nonexistent. I am not talking about local GOP groups, or individuals. I am discussing the Alaska GOP Leadership. Why the obvious disdain for Citizen Driven Politics? We received more help from other State’s GOP. The Alaska GOP Leadership did not help us, let’s get a real leader. Jerry Ward Out of all the candidates running to be GOP Chairman, Jerry Ward was essential to our success, we support Jerry Ward for Chairman of the Alaska GOP. Learn how to be a delegate and vote in your district for Jerry Ward for GOP Chairman. | | We need better Representation in the Alaska Republican Party. Jerry Ward was President Trump Alaska Campaign Manager, if President Trump Appointed Jerry Ward, who is also an Alaskan Native and a Vietnam Veteran. One of Jerry Ward's goals is to eliminate need a GOP Chair who will fight for Alaskans. The GOP to this day has not helped us. Let's elect leadership who will fight for Alaska. | | | We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality. Press Release FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEAlaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting Anchorage, Alaska– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans."This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger)."We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state."We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon. | | We Did The Impossible We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024 | The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter. The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets. Their new Incorporation is their top donor. Federal Court Halts Biden Admin’s Corporate Emissions Disclosure Rule

An appellate court paused the Biden administration’s corporate
emissions disclosure rule on Friday. The U.S. Court of Appeals for the
Fifth Circuit granted Liberty Energy’s request for an administrative
stay against the Securities and Exchange Commission’s (SEC) corporate
climate risk and emissions disclosure rule, according to a court
filing.

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Changing my party registration to Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Please read my full statement:

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I've thought about changing my party registration to Democrat. The reason? Unlimited campaign funding, every ounce of the media monopoly in my corner feeding me softball questions, fewer threats against my family & friends, fewer threats from the deep state.

__**Then I remembered, I'm not a coward.**__ I'm not a socialist. I'm an America First conservative & former Navy SEAL who served combat tours in Iraq and eastern Europe and risked his life to defend the conservative values that once made America the greatest nation on earth.
**This is Ryan Zinke, patriot and conservative representative for Montana, and I can 't be bought.**
**I 've shed too much blood, sweat and tears for my beloved country over the past three decades to even consider selling out for any reason whatsoever. **
Biden is mobilizing substantial resources to defeat me and regain control in Washington because I won't back down. As a Navy SEAL who proudly endorses Donald Trump, Biden and the Democrats simply cannot afford to keep me in the House another 2 years, so they've painted a bullseye on my back.

I'm devising my next counter-attack, but it will require reinforcements. I'm humbly asking for your assistance in hitting our first major fundraising goal before midnight tonight. **[A contribution of just $4 will make a huge impact on our campaign and help protect the House majority:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkrapbl4b3avhdk5kloedsa2ta7lpan99jc34hj0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clge1or6chh2bs "A contribution of just $4 will make a huge impact on our campaign and help protect the House majority:")**

---

clean_body: Please read my full statement: | | | | | Friend, I've thought about changing my party registration to Democrat. The reason? Unlimited campaign funding, every ounce of the media monopoly in my corner feeding me softball questions, fewer threats against my family & friends, fewer threats from the deep state. Then I remembered, I'm not a coward. I'm not a socialist. I'm an America First conservative & former Navy SEAL who served combat tours in Iraq and eastern Europe and risked his life to defend the conservative values that once made America the greatest nation on earth. This is Ryan Zinke, patriot and conservative representative for Montana, and I can 't be bought. I 've shed too much blood, sweat and tears for my beloved country over the past three decades to even consider selling out for any reason whatsoever. Biden is mobilizing substantial resources to defeat me and regain control in Washington because I won't back down. As a Navy SEAL who proudly endorses Donald Trump, Biden and the Democrats simply cannot afford to keep me in the House another 2 years, so they've painted a bullseye on my back. I'm devising my next counter-attack, but it will require reinforcements. I'm humbly asking for your assistance in hitting our first major fundraising goal before midnight tonight. name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkU9vnDAQxT-NuYH8D8MeOKzEUlXKplWiturJcuyBtTTGyDat8u0r0t17rm_-_N7M-3XVV-PRr8uzCTDMmHTKejX65hFrQLClzreYiuaUy5qKmiktKjdQdnJSVjCwjtG2Z1Kw6jbM1AnbyvaNcyMFk7brpDMcTlLMrWBz5YdjDxVM0U4q0TaUu171slUna5Q69URSg5BKMycAF4NZHfo3SOU9wRZTaWwMFQ63UrZMxJnwifAJt-bwm51BaMDthE8f1mMyWNuICAvUeU9_4P0YEFO2RIyUtr18plzyJ3oev42Xyyvhai9B57gnC0SMW4p5A1v8utxLAZzfAxEjBOPxLloTNuOX9ZAfXH3n6gf3f2dcC6yFiPH1x8vPy--v1_OXi_5-rqenl_rxmioNbvvrEX1WHZF0OVAfh5fPJvQvAAD__0TXmDs)

| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkU9vnDAQxT-NuYH8D8MeOKzEUlXKplWiturJcuyBtTTGyDat8u0r0t17rm_-_N7M-3XVV-PRr8uzCTDMmHTKejX65hFrQLClzreYiuaUy5qKmiktKjdQdnJSVjCwjtG2Z1Kw6jbM1AnbyvaNcyMFk7brpDMcTlLMrWBz5YdjDxVM0U4q0TaUu171slUna5Q69URSg5BKMycAF4NZHfo3SOU9wRZTaWwMFQ63UrZMxJnwifAJt-bwm51BaMDthE8f1mMyWNuICAvUeU9_4P0YEFO2RIyUtr18plzyJ3oev42Xyyvhai9B57gnC0SMW4p5A1v8utxLAZzfAxEjBOPxLloTNuOX9ZAfXH3n6gf3f2dcC6yFiPH1x8vPy--v1_OXi_5-rqenl_rxmioNbvvrEX1WHZF0OVAfh5fPJvQvAAD__0TXmDs) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkU9vnDAQxT-NuYH8D8MeOKzEUlXKplWiturJcuyBtTTGyDat8u0r0t17rm_-_N7M-3XVV-PRr8uzCTDMmHTKejX65hFrQLClzreYiuaUy5qKmiktKjdQdnJSVjCwjtG2Z1Kw6jbM1AnbyvaNcyMFk7brpDMcTlLMrWBz5YdjDxVM0U4q0TaUu171slUna5Q69URSg5BKMycAF4NZHfo3SOU9wRZTaWwMFQ63UrZMxJnwifAJt-bwm51BaMDthE8f1mMyWNuICAvUeU9_4P0YEFO2RIyUtr18plzyJ3oev42Xyyvhai9B57gnC0SMW4p5A1v8utxLAZzfAxEjBOPxLloTNuOX9ZAfXH3n6gf3f2dcC6yFiPH1x8vPy--v1_OXi_5-rqenl_rxmioNbvvrEX1WHZF0OVAfh5fPJvQvAAD__0TXmDs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Changing my party registration to Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Please read my full statement:

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I've thought about changing my party registration to Democrat. The reason? Unlimited campaign funding, every ounce of the media monopoly in my corner feeding me softball questions, fewer threats against my family & friends, fewer threats from the deep state.

__**Then I remembered, I'm not a coward.**__ I'm not a socialist. I'm an America First conservative & former Navy SEAL who served combat tours in Iraq and eastern Europe and risked his life to defend the conservative values that once made America the greatest nation on earth.
**This is Ryan Zinke, patriot and conservative representative for Montana, and I can 't be bought.**
**I 've shed too much blood, sweat and tears for my beloved country over the past three decades to even consider selling out for any reason whatsoever. **
Biden is mobilizing substantial resources to defeat me and regain control in Washington because I won't back down. As a Navy SEAL who proudly endorses Donald Trump, Biden and the Democrats simply cannot afford to keep me in the House another 2 years, so they've painted a bullseye on my back.

I'm devising my next counter-attack, but it will require reinforcements. I'm humbly asking for your assistance in hitting our first major fundraising goal before midnight tonight. **[A contribution of just $4 will make a huge impact on our campaign and help protect the House majority:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znqt63g06sv0e6jkcasgvpjuaa3kdda1uravi5pg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob1cph2bs "A contribution of just $4 will make a huge impact on our campaign and help protect the House majority:")**

---

Our deadline is looming, and the future of our campaign hangs in the balance. Your contribution will stop our campaign from falling apart.
**A small contribution of just $5 or $10 will make a significant impact on the future of this campaign.[Please chip in $5 before midnight to help us keep Montana RED.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhhp9dg34f53pqgrbhv7qje4hlacek6j8updkqio_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob1cph2bs "Please chip in $5 before midnight to help us keep Montana RED.")**
Thank you,
**Ryan Zinke (MT-01)**

name: Larry Klayman
subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zus1c5vev0us2svvc057ucclcnciskr69l8r0cd0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob3cdh2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zojpshpb2j04i85046j5c3ejao43ha8jh520j9i8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob3cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd7l2n55riafvepuqdev5trd3qqjglq0u0eitva8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob3cdh2bs)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what’s really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8ojuu812ljnbgsqr10sgt42vu1pskosk4j22cjg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob3cdh2bs)**

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4qjmuv09pdnc9d9f4imh3ojt8iktcmal52gp26g_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob3cdh2bs)**

name: John Rich
subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?"

My buddy Kirk Cameron did some research and discovered a shocking truth about the culprit putting disgusting materials in school libraries.

It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help).
It's not even school boards.
It's Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows, Huckleberry Finn, and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd0lfvmht4aker6sblis8ak4fvepolhl6dvvtem8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob7c9h2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf4rg02i80k5r34k0tmfat9e2rpedekdola8iqag_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob7c9h2bs)

I joined Kirk Cameron recently in Nashville to promote wholesome and age-appropriate book fairs for kids. It's called SkyTree Book Fairs, and Kirk helped jumpstart this amazing organization.

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zugfhbvqrlc8uoa67le6dpttec8e7ld4o2aqv2fg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob7c9h2bs)

SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9jb4p655pk64vrb36jii802djfthgbe4dbs9mag_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob7c9h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znml9ogqc1drbn3b41shhnbmv21gp0op3ulh8oeg_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob7c9h2bs)

The Woke and radically leftwing Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances.

It's the same with our kids' literature.

[You can be the reason why kids are saved from dangerous woke ideology. My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring school fairs to more public schools across the country. It costs roughly $4,500 for SkyTree to host a book fair.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za0debpe1lnaqbh5v6d0pth503i98kf7arsaj4b0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie0ob7c9h2bs)

John Rich

It's not even school boards. It's Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows, Huckleberry Finn, and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. I joined Kirk Cameron recently in Nashville to promote wholesome and age-appropriate book fairs for kids. It's called SkyTree Book Fairs, and Kirk helped jumpstart this amazing organization. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. The Woke and radically leftwing Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It's the same with our kids' literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich P.S. Here's a photo of Kirk Cameron and I. Together, we are supporting SkyTree Book Fairs to promote wholesome, family-friendly books to kids in schools. SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkb2O3DAMhJ9G7mTo33bh4oCDq1wQpEkpaCXKK0CSDVre27x94EVSpUk6AuTH4Qx_fNgPl3Kq61dXYI4ZLR62PezhXabZoaNbjMknl61gQlEmKTdWdmFmfApKdTDzgTM9aiZUd599VEyHmx_8KFkc5BD5pBUf41WpSXdpvvYwyQ0blRFjDyJOkxQ3r5WUYroRxVwGbH1EgLAVV0NON8D2E2HfsPV-K12e763tB5FvRCxELAf4E6H_TBUhXBNELA1coZePdAARy8tMw7PsFKun_u4S0v3C5YIXjqmuRL43PIEIc7ZivSu7S2sl8v330cp-e6PLl--851yJSdnGleFSG8oHbYgw8LQthf8AXjpbbVDbJf6gMSP9ExER5nnWx9-NDuewf6ac02EGothaXMqvZNq_P_FXAAAA__97L5uZ "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.

name: Steve Garvey #6
subject: Strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Help me hit a home run

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfm9o5hh6sk3ng8tv7r098jrl0go7dfrkqdei28g_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie2oj7chh2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zslut0m72gul31t9v23mqbvokjpi6tscdcavq5go_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie2oj7chh2bs)
---
| | Friend, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6l7037ldcu4l1vg09s8eb5pjl0g11tuc2dnm5f0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie2oj7chh2bs)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z92prit2f6hdks1mhf17i82erp9eq9tphf4dkpm0_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie2oj7chh2bs)**
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze5i88dfikja93bq1o8j4dfr8frpsgunae3bmlf8_rp22sh2s8i6ep30clie2oj7chh2bs)
---

clean_body: Help me hit a home run | | | | | Friend, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his ActBlue allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I must win this race. | | Sincerely, | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| Thank you, Team Prescott
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
2024 finds America is at a crossroads, and you have a choice to make, Peter.
As a successful businessman, devoted family man, proud Granite Stater, and experienced New Hampshire citizen legislator, I've made my choice to fight for American values.
That's why I'm running against Chris Pappas for New Hampshire's 1st Congressional Seat.
Now will you make the choice to stand with me?

| These are unprecedented times - the division, the wars, and the corruption you see on the news probably keeps you up at night.
That's why you need a strong, experienced, Republican fighter to go to battle for you, and for America.
But right now, you're stuck with my opponent, Chris Pappas, whose primary objectives include advocating for open borders and forcing costly "green" initiatives down your throat.
And frankly, Peter, we have bigger fish to fry.
You don't need a member of Congress who focuses on helping the DC special interests.
You need a member of Congress who will make America safer, more prosperous, and more affordable for all Americans.
That's what I vow to do if I'm elected this November - can I count on you to help me get there?
[If so, please make an Election Year contribution of at least $25 to help poise our campaign for victory on November 5th.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aO4HNk0vcoB2guORvjQv31p78S76N_fl0yrQm8s8KgOw6B2rmuLBYXZVEn_g2mgGS1g7DorSNt9_6mP3WaSGxgdZV3bVml76kL0adcBQJI3htvP13xSbkDUJRuh-NmDzfLTnj5FZUi6BRZ0pTS3Ql55GweK0s6lILq3nkJa7R_47KKM34P98jRblgQmDqN9uMiQ6qKdYmENEx1iTic_DseGyxpdC7GgNv7RgDsn_yTr_dsmT5Z9fcZZIDQ_elCoAGw6D1r60N8cY43SS0Hu9getlfZFV7CxZIB4dDgRQtYpww1InDIEBfcse3AmSwVxZTrnmNmrpyTWCURwSMdKiaw==&c=OkhsjV0kZIndrG6_H5NJF4uw-ioq3lJpwqfv7Q-KKeILeKB2Zmso3g==&ch=BlV2bi68ytNpb3HFkDc6eQINdguCr7nt4X7xptXOjqc48IqTFCI0cw==)

| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

clean_body: We just wanted to double-check before it’s too late. | | | | == | Peter, We just wanted to check in and make sure you got Russell Prescott's last e-mail. Have you made your choice yet? | | == | | == | Thank you, Team Prescott \---------- Forwarded message --------- 2024 finds America is at a crossroads, and you have a choice to make, Peter. As a successful businessman, devoted family man, proud Granite Stater, and experienced New Hampshire citizen legislator, I've made my choice to fight for American values. That's why I'm running against Chris Pappas for New Hampshire's 1st Congressional Seat. Now will you make the choice to stand with me? == | | == | | == | These are unprecedented times - the division, the wars, and the corruption you see on the news probably keeps you up at night. That's why you need a strong, experienced, Republican fighter to go to battle for you, and for America. But right now, you're stuck with my opponent, Chris Pappas, whose primary objectives include advocating for open borders and forcing costly "green" initiatives down your throat. And frankly, Peter, we have bigger fish to fry. You don't need a member of Congress who focuses on helping the DC special interests. You need a member of Congress who will make America safer, more prosperous, and more affordable for all Americans. That's what I vow to do if I'm elected this November - can I count on you to help me get there? == Thank you, | == | Russell Prescott Republican for Congress NH-01 | == | Follow Russell on Social Media: | == == == | == | A note from Russell... The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington. Thank you. -Russell Peter \- Forward this message to 5 FRIENDS AND FAMILY MEMBERS and help us raise awareness for our mission to achieve a better future for New Hampshire. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de0512ea2a7545f1962c5fed1d69a4fc&_e=Na94RrHEUulh08FsV-Ki5vuyaRrrekZSyu9moBd11zxpasDLuovuylVB0rAXqo_y-EuDt0NDXVKoedUAi1NlrY3SFLVdKEWYQcG3UKiIreDsNtxoD3r0AtPUhzA7dpPU9cFcYIMIsLNVbz81k9pm3wabo5vLeH4aKILgluDF0UiOPNlR-USabGYc9KS6HlEXPESU1Uk1XWU5ovi0wqmkQWeuPcIAz5RkdM8ZvtRUgM73-o4Kif-KWZlF8WmHR5szQflnSn_Hs6o0SiTYvcqawsOJmySsKE8jLkVIfgq06m0YznkaygySFzCz0eWZ3gtkzLBXB-DDvfcfVnZuuIAWCxnTdeLVbCfKNlMEb4HaEbMPa3QZo0q-WOxVWVjwYOPPRNw9OjZsB6IdVfkoOsoPfLYEV3eeb1vj0cwlHwnWL2A%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de0512ea2a7545f1962c5fed1d69a4fc&_e=Na94RrHEUulh08FsV-Ki5vuyaRrrekZSyu9moBd11zxpasDLuovuylVB0rAXqo_y-EuDt0NDXVKoedUAi1NlrY3SFLVdKEWYQcG3UKiIreDsNtxoD3r0AtPUhzA7dpPU9cFcYIMIsLNVbz81k9pm3wabo5vLeH4aKILgluDF0UiOPNlR-USabGYc9KS6HlEXPESU1Uk1XWU5ovi0wqmkQWeuPcIAz5RkdM8ZvtRUgM73-o4Kif-KWZlF8WmHR5szQflnSn_Hs6o0SiTYvcqawryj_z_3qTssff5RSVgQJ7w-reMfN7z8MoMY8nlU-azhGYlLyKBNNyKkYisvtoWl0LYMJJv2Qmhb5_ZvBrpPEYcVWgZ_I7ZqBbJF1EyWitwpm1-SZ7QwcjW8ouZarTkA1D104Y9ytoTgLmIUuhEwIOA%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de0512ea2a7545f1962c5fed1d69a4fc&_e=Na94RrHEUulh08FsV-Ki5vuyaRrrekZSyu9moBd11zxpasDLuovuylVB0rAXqo_y-EuDt0NDXVKoedUAi1NlrY3SFLVdKEWYQcG3UKiIreDsNtxoD3r0AtPUhzA7dpPU9cFcYIMIsLNVbz81k9pm3wabo5vLeH4aKILgluDF0UiOPNlR-USabGYc9KS6HlEXPESU1Uk1XWU5ovi0wqmkQWeuPcIAz5RkdM8ZvtRUgM73-o4Kif-KWZlF8WmHR5szQflnSn_Hs6o0SiTYvcqawkvC_xIVjt407wMq_AumkVpK2SXBF4EkTi2TEreIp5_X6Az7oS5BSlDiiAJHvhkjJBwcMGmU7d18oUfKfMqRjEJTOJARlkTkFAH7RxWTGZZPRX-c5K0Jzjl-bLG_dWTQmXu7VJHHSbdNsqNisd22cq8%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | Friend, It’s official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I’m humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fCaprbh507jjQSCDqjC9hQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2AVCP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9wYTdjMzMyMmViOGJlNzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzEzX0JER19TR0NBX1lPR0kzX1JFVl9QUi1QQS1BRlImdXRtX3RjPUFGUi0yMDI0MDMxNlcDc3BjQgpl78Zq9WVJiWc-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** There’s no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it’s so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That’s why I’m humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fCaprbh507jjQSCDqjC9hQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2AVCP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9wYTdjMzMyMmViOGJlNzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzEzX0JER19TR0NBX1lPR0kzX1JFVl9QUi1QQS1BRlImdXRtX3RjPUFGUi0yMDI0MDMxNlcDc3BjQgpl78Zq9WVJiWc-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

body:
Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life – and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Rw5yV-MqZ0eIf_C-rLUQnw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2AZuP0TaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvbGFyYS10cnVtcC1ybmMtY2hhaXItcC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzE0X1BBLUNCMS4xMTM1NzFfdDE0NjEzNTYtMTc1NiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNDAzMTRfUEEtQ0IxLjExMzU3MV90MTQ2MTM1Ni0xNzU2JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXR2LWNiLTIwMjQwMzE2Jnh1bnY9dHYtY2ItMjAyNDAzMTZXA3NwY0IKZe_7avVlPUxInlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "Lara Trump")

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Rw5yV-MqZ0eIf_C-rLUQnw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2AZuP0TaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvbGFyYS10cnVtcC1ybmMtY2hhaXItcC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzE0X1BBLUNCMS4xMTM1NzFfdDE0NjEzNTYtMTc1NiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNDAzMTRfUEEtQ0IxLjExMzU3MV90MTQ2MTM1Ni0xNzU2JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXR2LWNiLTIwMjQwMzE2Jnh1bnY9dHYtY2ItMjAyNDAzMTZXA3NwY0IKZe_7avVlPUxInlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr3PWGznVNFnFBMMTXhpLg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2AbmP0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1TVVJWRVlJTUFHRV9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAzMTZXA3NwY0IKZe_9avVlSTaRRlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr3PWGznVNFnFBMMTXhpLg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2AbmP0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1TVVJWRVlJTUFHRV9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAzMTZXA3NwY0IKZe_9avVlSTaRRlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr3PWGznVNFnFBMMTXhpLg~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2AbmP0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1TVVJWRVlJTUFHRV9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAzMTZXA3NwY0IKZe_9avVlSTaRRlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

# Saturday, March 16, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1926, Robert H. Goddard, the father of American rocketry, launched his first liquid rocket in Auburn, Massachusetts. It went 41 feet up in the air. ([Photos and More Info](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskTGTmzAQhX-N6MRIKyFCQeG5jDsnZUqPQCvYREaOJExo8tszBymuuOq9ffvmK3Z_3O43S4GW6Zt9YF98vNux0AvvikvDQd915XqPCKgq7GUrRdMZqXQ19yAdtIOxw2h1g4PU3rdONoCia1VjfEU9CNBCSSO6xihZK9tq3xqvLLZaf3FMC3RUYqp_RlrKjD7s8YWpHuOjCv1cyjMzdWFwZXDdtq1ebLb1FF8MrjPlEtPO4No1fEebMrdT5FN0ziaXuaeUCw_0eyXH_YoBHU9x_IXlwCmmLn-ZuhT8U5j6-n1h0IC42TTOh5PmXd5O38GHacZD8juoAbE-z5Qyg7dhPcO44MdumeM6zedqi2twh3um-CJ3Nh4x_ccWO1CgstdV6t1zoxAom5ZpMT0sheMy5dM__QsAAP__OX-L-A)) Sunday is St. Patrick's Day! The Editor has fond memories of experiencing Chicago's traditional celebration, and we hope you make some great memories of your own this weekend. Here are some [facts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71u8yAUxvGrgQ2LL0M8MLyLt7xrR-sEDvFpSbAMiuW7r9KhU-ffIz36f1yXK1Ch5_0_PDD0XBeInV64GKGc0HaxPIWMqNFwDMorOU5OGcvXANJc8iS1H-UNjB3llJO5WYUR1SXixCloqa00yslpdEYNBrzN3mUD6K29JGYlJup1Hz4rPfuKuZz1hfsQ64OXsPa-NWb-MT0zPR_HMazUet3PtzM997pRbEzPrYsN-k7xq4kE53u8VnFAEw3o-Yt8D2k7qBRqzjMr7w-g8vPV_yz_DgAA___9YFsp) about the legendary Saint: he was British; he was kidnapped and sold into slavery at 16; he escaped captivity and felt compelled to enter the priesthood; and he Christianized Ireland. ([Read More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71u8yAUxvGrgQ2LL0M8MLyLt7xrR-sEDvFpSbAMiuW7r9KhU-ffIz36f1yXK1Ch5_0_PDD0XBeInV64GKGc0HaxPIWMqNFwDMorOU5OGcvXANJc8iS1H-UNjB3llJO5WYUR1SXixCloqa00yslpdEYNBrzN3mUD6K29JGYlJup1Hz4rPfuKuZz1hfsQ64OXsPa-NWb-MT0zPR_HMazUet3PtzM997pRbEzPrYsN-k7xq4kE53u8VnFAEw3o-Yt8D2k7qBRqzjMr7w-g8vPV_yz_DgAA___9YFsp)) Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGngS0WcGewB4ZKkae6a0eLmMO-FpvIoan69lXUsRl_6Zv-93EaA2fel7ewka-pTGGufKcJTtqeDE4oo09EhkCS106rtrcaUK4-mUQxzemiQtd1vQvu0W1ndboYjEayN8qgAm1V31rQDQSHydkEgRxiFwUqilzL0XwU3utKKf-UOx3NXDaZ_Vrr9SbgRZhBmOE_EWYYw8LzK--fDwMDCTjH6zfnzDfrBKplC5z_rP2qm4AzKnn450bWpwN-AwAA___P01wQ).
