## Nathan Wade Withdraws From Trump Case
Special prosecutor [Nathan Wade withdrew](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAUhZ_G3oj4uYZ4YOiSLV07WgQuzq0wWOQ2Ud--crt2Ojo6OtKn7-O6XAMVqut72NBzbkuITE9cjFBWaFhgTD4jajQjeuWUnGarDIx3r45UMTidowFUEwZQt4wYXL4pqUbyWmqQRlk5T9aokwkOsrPZBHQA5zSAxETc-umzUeU75vLdnthPsW1j8Xfm_TGYt0FfBn0Je8XX45iO0pliwUFfVmx9pSCwYGRqVVBNFHnDyiKHSuJFpdBDcP_admHlzaU0W9A5zphdlCa5aT5LO2tjII7dp_3vYd0Act0ClV8c_lfOTwAAAP__J5plUg) Friday from the Georgia election interference case against former President Donald Trump. Wade, who has been [romantically linked ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuxCAQBNCvgQ4LdjmwC4o07i5tSgvD4iPC5mSTs_L3kZM23UhvpNF83Ke7zyVvy7tfybVUJx9aftGEQhkBetI8ukQEhJycskreBqNQ84eTEL3BHqMfokFp5x5MUqGfe4vDzc48O5CgJSojh5tB1aG3OlmT0JPVuo9MS4q51b37rHlrD0rlu75o70JdeXGP1p4HwzcGI4PxPM8uzMdG53E5g_GKF-RS8iHa_rU-xUJ1X7IXIEEKKhRarpsI_iAGI99dfP7VjWVaLqvP5Xes_Xv9JwAA___deVoY)to Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis, said his withdrawal was in the "interest of democracy." Wade's resignation came hours after Judge Scott McAfee said that in order for the case against Trump to continue, Willis had to either "step aside" or Wade could "withdraw." McAfee also hinted at a [gag order](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u7CAUBp8GOlb821tQ3Mbd3jalhc0Bs8LGguON8vbRJm3KT580I83HY374XPKR_vsdHMY6-xXzC2bFhGVSz5oGFwEkKApODIKbuxVK082NSq9xuS9BGBEtH8VozLCORmjOo1eSZie51FwJy-_GKnFTftBxsFF5GLQeA9EcQsbabs-aD9wglq_6gnZb606L2xDPTtQ_IiciJ9xgy6W8PyKnBukqHnM9iJzWejVki0cs0ImctFF6tJZhu_azswS1pezZ8woJWL9Sgo6dJZ9YbQEaO2vveSnAYm3sM5eS3xTaXDh_lx2I5mn3-UdP8c9Q3wEAAP__uQBq_w) for Willis if she continued to make public statements about Trump and other defendants.
## Killer Storms Strike the Midwest
A massive storm system rolled through several states Thursday night, [producing tornadoes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQxvGnMZsR5zMGBg9d2NK1I7rgI77WMZGxgvr2VaqO3T7pt3z6f1yWC0mSfHunO_u67QutVZ68oAanjV1sE_zGbBgb9jBA108O0DbRG3brOOLY9xPAeqUeEOA6TY4GtOM0NuJNZ2yH4Lqpdwgt0mC3wW1IPFg7BmU7DlL30n7ukmvkLX3vTy7tut-b5GOtj0PhmzKzMvN5nm2-rpnP4-XKzK_5AqYauSgz11iYdWAK-uAnF9Z_pqPUQ0sOQpl0LSSJi35Q-dJlzQQWewNN8eFxSkpyuEHZ7nYnSb9X6r9hfgIAAP__8XpkxQ) that destroyed homes and businesses and left three dead in Ohio. According to the National Weather Service, an EF2 tornado touched down near Orchard Island in west-central Ohio and caused severe damage to several communities. [You can see photos of the damage here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQRn8N3oiOA2N7YOjClq4dLWLOMRXkLEMS9d9X7tz5-6T39L6u8zWknB73z1DItZXnsLT0ollLZSWa2XTRrURIuiOnBgX9ZJU23eaiHWGNoKZp6YGMRhhVjzcKEYbRYN8lh4AGtLIw9Variw6DWQe76kCDMWMUBiimxsflm9OjbbTmH37RcVm4dNltre1V6A-BXqCvOy3teJYHvas6HwI9bwL9wvlZbs8q0J-bQH9iBXrQAr3qBfoYSriT3DduXCVviWWlFx0ka-OjVNkdLu7vlHOqdhAG7iWk_KfR_o3yGwAA__-vEWF2). Tornadoes also struck [parts of Indiana and Kentucky,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vgzAQQH-N2Yz8FVMGD13Y0rUjuthHuAbsCF9i5d9X6dztSW95et_n-Qy0Ub5-wY6BlzJDZHribKX20rjZdSksiAZth0EPWp1Gr63r1oAX77RWBsflhNqapHWM4EerYhoHd-koGGWcstqr8eSt7i0Mbhn8YgEH5z6ScAoTcTn6n0KZV1y2V3ni0ceyd1tYme9V2E9hJmGm1lofLzVjq28vzPRGYab6qHeMjElyOTKkglUmBF6rTLDDFeVOqWFlWVYqknIiyCBvmPkRby9hpu4I6d5o26j6QTh13YG2vwj-d8lvAAAA__-zBGTD) leaving a similar trail of downed trees, powerlines, and destroyed homes. A tornado coupled with baseball-sized hail is thought to have hit Little Rock, Arkansas, too. Unconfirmed reports of tornadoes were also made in Illinois and Missouri.
## America's Most Valuable Stamp
A rare 1-cent postage stamp from 1868, featuring the likeness of Benjamin Franklin, [could fetch up to $5 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LtuhDAQheGngW6QbxgoXKSh27Qp0YDH4MgXhJ1F-_bRpk59vuLo_3osD_TBp_0TI5nq8oJb9U9aJHANQi2qtcYRCZItGT5w1k-aS9UeRq3Ie4mrWiche1pJo5x67qxbBY6jbb0RTCgmuWZTryXvJA7KDdpJpEGp0TaKkfU1X9139qke5MIrP-nqthzbYI5az9LIj0bMjZjv--5K9PUoOXlMEfc3a8RcIl4VEt3lrY4XIHDYKFU4c6m4E5SK8YQt_wQLhUIAly_oIfoQfE7ARzaNclKsEXN7GXve76HooVFsj-jD35_6b53fAAAA__8Sp2al) at auction. The 1-cent "Z-grill" stamp has been called "America's Most Valuable Postage Stamp" because of its zig-zag indentations, "Z-grill", impressed on the stamp to prevent reuse. Only one other stamp with the indentations is known to exist. Billionaire investor Bill Gross, [nicknamed the "Bond King,"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSpiAQhJ9Gs7EQUDQwuMTsv_RCC2HQuUOxYO539-233Hizr7o76O4_r-VlKdK5_bYHThzSYh3TGxcFbQ9SL7r2U0CUqGqcWtOKbuxbpet90qMZTWfDKrwS6EY3eNvpMKLUQzB-qGmSQmqh2l6MXa_aRlmjg-mDsmi0HnylBXrilJu_iU7eMcTP9MbcuHTUcdqZr1KpX5WcKznf992sNud0lsev5Gwzk4tYKjmv6fTwj84NVooRtpxKASpQMD7jYH-Y7XGBSzGiY0on3MQ7pBMBPy50jB44QUB2O_y_Hu7goBifqG5lN_Za1nny1_2IpTeVFtthKX7X5R_P-woAAP__vvty8A) owns the stamp. He's been known to sell valuable stamps and donate the proceeds to charity. The inverted "Jenny" stamp sold for more than $2 million, [a U.S. record, last year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAUhZ8GbzeCy18yMHTxlq4dLQwXhxabCFCqvn2VqGPXc44-HX0f1-Xqc8nH9u53ciPVxYeRH7RIEAZQLWqKLhEhyYmcsILrixFSTTenTUhaaGujSojinELQnuxFoF1JeJqyQ46KS2H4RRspTtJblaxJ0pNV6hyZ4hTzqO30WfMxbpTKT31QO4W6T8Xdxrh3Jt8YzgznunZqfyXD-YlmOHPJcF5zKbkePjeCtR4RvvKxwTOFrdXeIXfoNGBU6FQKeGgUaouwNvKvrd6hD7_fGc5Tc_H-_SR2Y5ni2-5zeT0a__r5DQAA___12Gbl). A 1-cent magenta stamp issued in British Guiana in 1856 and sold in 2021 holds the global record at $8.3 million.

| Flying together with: [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFrwzAUhH_N82YjvSc_JYOGgvGWToWORrGeYhUnFraa0n9fVDp2ueO4Gz7u_TJdfFrT4_bq7-JK3CY_l_SUiVrNLZrJNMFFERRqxGmrVX9mTaZZnNUifPJBgiD2c894pqvvxQp6e-K5SQ4VGkWa1bln0h15a6LlSF6sMacARklIZdu7jy09yiJx_d6esnfzdm9Wt5SSD6AXwBFwjNfu4Sta9mWpC8BxD1W6vGSg8UgBaNAGGZDz5xVoQKN6S4A865r-aNq3Mab9KK1GpWqJQEN1Ahqa3YX8ldY1HWzBqNvdp_UXqPx7z08AAAD__31rXzc) [Toxic overload can cause a number of nightmarish changes in your body.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFrwzAUhH_N82YjvSc_JYOGgvGWToWORrGeYhUnFraa0n9fVDp2ueO4Gz7u_TJdfFrT4_bq7-JK3CY_l_SUiVrNLZrJNMFFERRqxGmrVX9mTaZZnNUifPJBgiD2c894pqvvxQp6e-K5SQ4VGkWa1bln0h15a6LlSF6sMacARklIZdu7jy09yiJx_d6esnfzdm9Wt5SSD6AXwBFwjNfu4Sta9mWpC8BxD1W6vGSg8UgBaNAGGZDz5xVoQKN6S4A865r-aNq3Mab9KK1GpWqJQEN1Ahqa3YX8ldY1HWzBqNvdp_UXqPx7z08AAAD__31rXzc) In the early stages, your body tries to expel those toxins by any means necessary. **You may experience ...**
* Intense bloating (leading to a pregnant-looking belly)
* Stinky farts
* Occasional diarrhea
* Excessive urination
* Sore throat
* Occasional heartburn or indigestion
* Mucus overproduction

Many people notice changes to their body odor or excessively oily skin, as well, since their bodies are acting to purge those toxins through their pores. As the toxins gradually accumulate in your system, you may also find impairment to some of your faculties... Most people experience fatigue, memory difficulties, sleep impairment, eczema (and other inflammatory conditions like gout), joint pain, unexplained weight gain, depression, or "brain fog". **[Even worse, certain toxins can disrupt the very hormones that control our metabolism](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFrwzAUhH_N82YjvSc_JYOGgvGWToWORrGeYhUnFraa0n9fVDp2ueO4Gz7u_TJdfFrT4_bq7-JK3CY_l_SUiVrNLZrJNMFFERRqxGmrVX9mTaZZnNUifPJBgiD2c894pqvvxQp6e-K5SQ4VGkWa1bln0h15a6LlSF6sMacARklIZdu7jy09yiJx_d6esnfzdm9Wt5SSD6AXwBFwjNfu4Sta9mWpC8BxD1W6vGSg8UgBaNAGGZDz5xVoQKN6S4A865r-aNq3Mab9KK1GpWqJQEN1Ahqa3YX8ldY1HWzBqNvdp_UXqPx7z08AAAD__31rXzc)...** This class of toxins are known as endocrine disruptors. The most common endocrine disruptors can be found in our everyday hygiene products, detergents, tupperware and so on... Gone unchecked, endocrine disruptors can "turn off" the hormones that control metabolic function. Ultimately making it impossible to lose weight - no matter how strict your diet is or how much you exercise. clean_body: A massive storm system rolled through several states Thursday night, producing tornadoes that destroyed homes and businesses and left three dead in Ohio. | | | | | | Saturday, March 16, 2024 ---|--- Happy Saturday! On this date in 1926, Robert H. Goddard, the father of American rocketry, launched his first liquid rocket in Auburn, Massachusetts. It went 41 feet up in the air. () Sunday is St. Patrick's Day! The Editor has fond memories of experiencing Chicago's traditional celebration, and we hope you make some great memories of your own this weekend. Here are some about the legendary Saint: he was British; he was kidnapped and sold into slavery at 16; he escaped captivity and felt compelled to enter the priesthood; and he Christianized Ireland. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Check out the latest in digestion health advice and products from our sponsors at | Nathan Wade Withdraws From Trump Case Special prosecutor Friday from the Georgia election interference case against former President Donald Trump. Wade, who has been Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis, said his withdrawal was in the "interest of democracy." Wade's resignation came hours after Judge Scott McAfee said that in order for the case against Trump to continue, Willis had to either "step aside" or Wade could "withdraw." McAfee also hinted at a for Willis if she continued to make public statements about Trump and other defendants. Killer Storms Strike the Midwest A massive storm system rolled through several states Thursday night, that destroyed homes and businesses and left three dead in Ohio. According to the National Weather Service, an EF2 tornado touched down near Orchard Island in west-central Ohio and caused severe damage to several communities. . Tornadoes also struck leaving a similar trail of downed trees, powerlines, and destroyed homes. A tornado coupled with baseball-sized hail is thought to have hit Little Rock, Arkansas, too. Unconfirmed reports of tornadoes were also made in Illinois and Missouri. America's Most Valuable Stamp A rare 1-cent postage stamp from 1868, featuring the likeness of Benjamin Franklin, at auction. The 1-cent "Z-grill" stamp has been called "America's Most Valuable Postage Stamp" because of its zig-zag indentations, "Z-grill", impressed on the stamp to prevent reuse. Only one other stamp with the indentations is known to exist. Billionaire investor Bill Gross, owns the stamp. He's been known to sell valuable stamps and donate the proceeds to charity. The inverted "Jenny" stamp sold for more than $2 million, . A 1-cent magenta stamp issued in British Guiana in 1856 and sold in 2021 holds the global record at $8.3 million. In an interview yesterday, Pence said that Trump "is pursuing and articulating an agenda that is at odds with the conservative agenda that we governed on during our four years." () ➤ The Supreme Court unanimously ruled Friday that public officials using personal social media accounts to make official statements can "sometimes" be sued for blocking critics or deleting comments. () ➤Also at** the Supreme Court on Friday: justices rejected an emergency appeal by a West Texas A&M University student group that was blocked from staging an on-campus drag show. () ➤ **Republicans responded to a letter sent by The White House on Friday, demanding that the House end the impeachment inquiry, by saying that Congress had that authority, not the White House. () | Flying together with: In the early stages, your body tries to expel those toxins by any means necessary. You may experience ... Intense bloating (leading to a pregnant-looking belly) Stinky farts Occasional diarrhea Excessive urination Sore throat Occasional heartburn or indigestion Mucus overproduction Many people notice changes to their body odor or excessively oily skin, as well, since their bodies are acting to purge those toxins through their pores. As the toxins gradually accumulate in your system, you may also find impairment to some of your faculties... Most people experience fatigue, memory difficulties, sleep impairment, eczema (and other inflammatory conditions like gout), joint pain, unexplained weight gain, depression, or "brain fog". ... This class of toxins are known as endocrine disruptors. The most common endocrine disruptors can be found in our everyday hygiene products, detergents, tupperware and so on... Gone unchecked, endocrine disruptors can "turn off" the hormones that control metabolic function. Ultimately making it impossible to lose weight - no matter how strict your diet is or how much you exercise. | ➤ Aaron Donald, a three-time Defensive Player of the Year for the Los Angeles Rams, announced his retirement Friday after 10 seasons in the NFL. "I'm blessed to be able to conclude my NFL career with the same franchise that drafted me," he said. (-) ➤ **A two-hour delay for a swarm of bees at the Indian Wells tennis tournament in California ended when a bee expert captured the bees using a vacuum. () ➤The Los Angeles Dodgers renewed Andrew Toles' contract for the sixth time to allow the ex-outfielder, who hasn't played since 2019 due to a bipolar and schizophrenia diagnosis, to continue to receive health benefits. Experts are now pointing to a little-known condition... But, what exactly is toxic overload? You might not realize this, but ... | Ladies and Gentlemen: our most-clicked stories of the week. Enjoy! ➤#1: The list of the oldest bars in every state is a nice mix of history, nostalgia, and fun. The Editor can vouch for the fried chicken at Eischen's Bar in Okarche, Oklahoma. () ➤ #2: Data collected by the National Association of Realtors revealed the most expensive housing markets in America. View the map to see the median housing prices in your county. () ➤#3: Successful couples know how to repair their relationship, express positivity, and avoid saying, "You never" and "You always," according to a pair of love researchers. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Kailo is an all-natural pain patch that is designed to relieve pain anywhere on your body in as little as 60 seconds. Kailo doesn't use medicine or drugs, so nothing foreign or toxic enters your body. () | ➤The U.S.Military Academy at West Point has drawn criticism for removing "Duty, Honor, Country" from its motto, a phrase first added in 1898, and replacing it with "Army Values." () ➤ "James Bond" actor Pierce Brosnan apologized for "impulsively" trespassing on Yellowstone's thermal areas. Brosnan said he "deeply regretted the transgressions" and paid $1,500 in fines. () ➤ In a lawsuit filed against Boeing, a California man claimed a seatbelt saved his life when the suction created from the door panel that blew off during Alaska Airlines Flight 1282 tore off his shoes and socks. () ➤ A medical examiner from Duval County, Florida, was dispatched to a Jacksonville home when the owner discovered a partially buried body with two feet sticking out of the ground in the backyard. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Yesterday, we celebrated The Flyover's one-year anniversary! Last March, we sent our first edition to 47 people. Today, we're sending to over 623,000. body:
Can you pronounce epigraph? | | [](https://track.worddaily.com/?xtl=328d4zgxmtvhkum6uhnlhhzkwm9ltjs0e5wk83asudyo0taz4lwr9o6yygsi24ai0vjegqpivk890jjyh6lko7ueap2ib8541uxi1e07ygxp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=safqis)

| | | [](https://track.worddaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=safqis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
[](https://track.worddaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=safqis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
| noun | 1\. An inscription on a building, statue, or coin. 2\. A short quotation or saying at the beginning of a book or chapter, intended to suggest its theme.
---|---
| |
---
| [](https://track.worddaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=safqis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | | "The epigraph of my first book is a clever quote from Dorothy Parker."
---|---|---
| [](https://track.worddaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=safqis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | | "I didn't recognize the man in the statue, but the epigraph said he was the city's first mayor."
---|---|---
| [](https://track.worddaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=safqis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | | "The brief epigraph at the beginning of the book of poetry described the author's love of the wilderness."
---|---|---
| [](https://track.worddaily.com/?xtl=6flr56hjqzbtww37c5iczjnp33tl0tec3lcqvrspsz4i2ga8sxe6u7zfuj2jdku4p8cd1fj5saxk48u9k1cvtdvhk0cbyv96ytv9znmug55ybw6ol2k0ot8o9xoghbl86t1vy1g4x54goigwchn02yjfoy4sdpcyedicq0oc3ocx440cjsxmbz1d9n8wsjyer0cxrl1000o9evwury25o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=safqis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
Ads help keep Word Daily free.
---
| |
---
Greek, late 16th century
| |
---
"Epigraph" is based on the Greek "ἐπιγραφή" ("epigraphḗ"), meaning "inscription." Though the original epigraphs were inscribed upon solid physical works, such as statues, buildings, and coins, the modern usage of "epigraph" mostly refers to short quotes at the beginning of books or chapters, intended to suggest relevant themes. ...

body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](http://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkLsKpDAYRp8mdpFcNGphsSDCFrPNFFvKn5vzgzEhiSP79svspdpm28Ph8PF9f2wPwAPP_RsEN2MpWy5b0Ju_qYcTaanwo2yCiY4ySbnaRGPnXvDRj42b-cBZP_Fp4s1rdkxJY_th4p1jbBithN6OhnkNXCvOGpw_HSa54oyrfmg1kz3zA3SOay-0Jh27koXqWjwLWldMjCnFAyua0sa8N8f8qjUVIr8QsRKx-uycjeGGal5tdu93ayIRq3b7judOfcz0huoyDZqmmIDI9aphK_HKxhG5_CMSoT5CNUQuX59P-nfxHx6cxSsQufyK_WYGQgLcTyKXoIlQEOJ1ViIX0Td5tunG48CiBtKxPQAerYmhqf_19c8AAAD__7BXhiA)

[ ](http://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkLsKpDAYRp8mdpFcNGphsSDCFrPNFFvKn5vzgzEhiSP79svspdpm28Ph8PF9f2wPwAPP_RsEN2MpWy5b0Ju_qYcTaanwo2yCiY4ySbnaRGPnXvDRj42b-cBZP_Fp4s1rdkxJY_th4p1jbBithN6OhnkNXCvOGpw_HSa54oyrfmg1kz3zA3SOay-0Jh27koXqWjwLWldMjCnFAyua0sa8N8f8qjUVIr8QsRKx-uycjeGGal5tdu93ayIRq3b7judOfcz0huoyDZqmmIDI9aphK_HKxhG5_CMSoT5CNUQuX59P-nfxHx6cxSsQufyK_WYGQgLcTyKXoIlQEOJ1ViIX0Td5tunG48CiBtKxPQAerYmhqf_19c8AAAD__7BXhiA) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkLsKpDAYRp8mdpFcNGphsSDCFrPNFFvKn5vzgzEhiSP79svspdpm28Ph8PF9f2wPwAPP_RsEN2MpWy5b0Ju_qYcTaanwo2yCiY4ySbnaRGPnXvDRj42b-cBZP_Fp4s1rdkxJY_th4p1jbBithN6OhnkNXCvOGpw_HSa54oyrfmg1kz3zA3SOay-0Jh27koXqWjwLWldMjCnFAyua0sa8N8f8qjUVIr8QsRKx-uycjeGGal5tdu93ayIRq3b7judOfcz0huoyDZqmmIDI9aphK_HKxhG5_CMSoT5CNUQuX59P-nfxHx6cxSsQufyK_WYGQgLcTyKXoIlQEOJ1ViIX0Td5tunG48CiBtKxPQAerYmhqf_19c8AAAD__7BXhiA)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what’s really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](http://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkLsKpDAYRp8mdpFcNGphsSDCFrPNFFvKn5vzgzEhiSP79svspdpm28Ph8PF9f2wPwAPP_RsEN2MpWy5b0Ju_qYcTaanwo2yCiY4ySbnaRGPnXvDRj42b-cBZP_Fp4s1rdkxJY_th4p1jbBithN6OhnkNXCvOGpw_HSa54oyrfmg1kz3zA3SOay-0Jh27koXqWjwLWldMjCnFAyua0sa8N8f8qjUVIr8QsRKx-uycjeGGal5tdu93ayIRq3b7judOfcz0huoyDZqmmIDI9aphK_HKxhG5_CMSoT5CNUQuX59P-nfxHx6cxSsQufyK_WYGQgLcTyKXoIlQEOJ1ViIX0Td5tunG48CiBtKxPQAerYmhqf_19c8AAAD__7BXhiA)**

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

Every dollar counts.](http://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkLsKpDAYRp8mdpFcNGphsSDCFrPNFFvKn5vzgzEhiSP79svspdpm28Ph8PF9f2wPwAPP_RsEN2MpWy5b0Ju_qYcTaanwo2yCiY4ySbnaRGPnXvDRj42b-cBZP_Fp4s1rdkxJY_th4p1jbBithN6OhnkNXCvOGpw_HSa54oyrfmg1kz3zA3SOay-0Jh27koXqWjwLWldMjCnFAyua0sa8N8f8qjUVIr8QsRKx-uycjeGGal5tdu93ayIRq3b7judOfcz0huoyDZqmmIDI9aphK_HKxhG5_CMSoT5CNUQuX59P-nfxHx6cxSsQufyK_WYGQgLcTyKXoIlQEOJ1ViIX0Td5tunG48CiBtKxPQAerYmhqf_19c8AAAD__7BXhiA)**

name: Lara Trump
subject: It’s official. I’m the new Co-Chair of the RNC.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=943a9c96a5bf4a00bd7386d5dfed64b9&_e=4HX4U67uNgCKN7Jn1ESmRYYNxXXnTQdeDbItsVJr0bSVAvAchhgoldYfg4tZEzNsLXQQ4edfusTJL3cH9ddq3LVk6dautHYKulniSFahfmQsm4NPdo2sL_596k30nWKsSaFC54k2qplqr1cvmwBA5L7y9P9P9T_zbrQE-HiXlnJ61TNTADmhHC6GrTqp8FE-GZt3r0ZqsSF-U-Da0cKcbE8reckH5zas5TxL7XfE0rfxKKUYASQMuekBQTEf2YSF77HOZUQSA39-MTZZycS03fUOvkSADOdUrhFHEHLO9VYIAo8jPl_ViErc9tFDKMT1Zl-Q_bj12u4kcsMxBt4erVR8xa0kbRCQvYNuNerKZpEoeu2MKHIkHxuTEXg9CEMroC-AZKp5KzBYN64bB6_U1QWjk22WgSIyZ__N2z0clLkkKhvmsmdj-En2uuTuuYrx9H5LxLGpzkE1oVFdWPCHrQ%3D%3D "Lara Trump")
---

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=943a9c96a5bf4a00bd7386d5dfed64b9&_e=4HX4U67uNgCKN7Jn1ESmRYYNxXXnTQdeDbItsVJr0bSVAvAchhgoldYfg4tZEzNsLXQQ4edfusTJL3cH9ddq3LVk6dautHYKulniSFahfmQsm4NPdo2sL_596k30nWKsSaFC54k2qplqr1cvmwBA5L7y9P9P9T_zbrQE-HiXlnJ61TNTADmhHC6GrTqp8FE-GZt3r0ZqsSF-U-Da0cKcbE8reckH5zas5TxL7XfE0rfxKKUYASQMuekBQTEf2YSF77HOZUQSA39-MTZZycS03fUOvkSADOdUrhFHEHLO9VYIAo8jPl_ViErc9tFDKMT12xxbnZg3aPa5QGhnWIEFO3nEvaCqh9zWTX3s-4aOytn3_Nz2C5F2RwnwtgAgtj5weTDQks49M0EVcSKw_eFE7u96lPxU3v9pgAW8GLDLjFunUX9slSwaRcm8C7WbFo3cVVKGipORixKNw-oqhh6Y8w%3D%3D "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.

God bless you. God bless America.

_- Lara Trump_

clean_body: Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeating the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish. | | | | | | "Lara Trump" My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump. It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee! Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish. I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history. And my list of priorities is simple:1) SAVE our Conservative House Majority, 2) WIN back the Senate, and 3) ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed: Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states He hired over 300 campaign staff His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date House Democrats raised $100+ million last year And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen." I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America. Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now. | | | "PLEASE: DONATE $10" | | | "PLEASE: DONATE $25" | | | "PLEASE: DONATE $50" | | | "PLEASE: DONATE $100" Folks like you are the beating heart of the Republican Party. Everything we're going to accomplish in the next election is because of your hard work, your dedication, and your support. Thanks for everything you do for our country. It 's inspiring. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. God bless you. God bless America. - Lara Trump | | | "Please take my Election Year Check-In!" I'm launching my brand new "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN" - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f316ddefc0540728d9715b3cdd05548&_e=-gZhfWjkNRVhtIckWbrKwVJVf4LSsQAEUBcn3Cm0OeFN5eUebr6ENZFMVCAMCDDtOA6_velGVHiq1Pr3vh5Z6PCw9avT51TRjxTsiJvmgTValSXyEA3CDkifYjIvjsWyyOoApETRGpbi7kdwbYMkhDQIoyKjz0zdQ2kbxCWxDLtu6PRdQLvIJAaU8REiSzeb1P1YRCpF-EHWp6hCa6TCTZxzBLE6Oc8o-0Wux2V9TjWwgwWRvsbR-0UCRKjWcME4q-h6aBBsuu3YKBxu7HsvnN5gpKJOvnqv7drfY2K4X49fETOm1oK1RzVCsUPgNjAsI8WgsbG8lnF20gl4zjUNL5Y0sgTeZxj0ubvod3XDOg41u51eiES4CR7TA16IGkOR0zcRwlq50LPgQaCus5jJykTRWvxWtiUx1AJCGOdrNHs%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f316ddefc0540728d9715b3cdd05548&_e=-gZhfWjkNRVhtIckWbrKwVJVf4LSsQAEUBcn3Cm0OeFN5eUebr6ENZFMVCAMCDDtOA6_velGVHiq1Pr3vh5Z6PCw9avT51TRjxTsiJvmgTValSXyEA3CDkifYjIvjsWyyOoApETRGpbi7kdwbYMkhDQIoyKjz0zdQ2kbxCWxDLtu6PRdQLvIJAaU8REiSzeb1P1YRCpF-EHWp6hCa6TCTZxzBLE6Oc8o-0Wux2V9TjWwgwWRvsbR-0UCRKjWcME4q-h6aBBsuu3YKBxu7HsvnKBX1Awis-8LuCponq7IylHrVxxONTP668kB6IfK0PN5iSovEt8y_HOaRf73fGbWOJOdnl2SPo2Z7WfIal3Wk_lOOW3qL04Dg2wT6lUGPpyEp6yOWSJjw9BUE-2fgZyFmXuUEUk1KKCzAI5ZGdy7rVw%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. subject: Have you seen what they're doing?
body:
Fellow patriots, I'm reaching out to impress upon you JUST how important it is that we are prepared for Virginia's next state-level election cycle. One week ago, on Saturday, March 9th, we gaveled out of legislative session in Richmond. It was
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018e46d135b1-76580d72-01ba-4916-b3c9-b90e222fce6d-000000/Hx-ugHhRTTGv96v1S7KfClHxNTM=365)
---
| Fellow patriots, I'm reaching out to impress upon you JUST **_how important it is that we are prepared_** for Virginia's next state-level election cycle. One week ago, on Saturday, March 9th, we gaveled out of legislative session in Richmond. It was an **_extremely productive_** legislative session for me, with **13 of my bills headed to Governor Youngkin 's desk for his signature**, bills to help our **veteran population** and ensure our **law enforcement officers** have the tools they need to keep us safe. In the same breath, **_the Democrats_** in control of both the House and Senate **_passed a lot of BAD BILLS_**. Now, I have faith that Governor Youngkin will veto these bills for the sake of our Commonwealth, but it's important that you understand **_EXACTLY_** what is at stake. I've gone ahead and linked some of the most egregious bills that the Democrats **_shoved through_** below. [Senate Bill 2](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=241%26typ=bil%26val=sb2/1/0100018e46d135b1-76580d72-01ba-4916-b3c9-b90e222fce6d-000000/R1N8rHpO5NyrDBr37xgSEQJPxIg=365), introduced by Senator Creigh Deeds (D) is a **_sweeping firearm ban_** that passed both chambers on a party line vote. [Senate Bill 1](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=241%26typ=bil%26val=sb1/1/0100018e46d135b1-76580d72-01ba-4916-b3c9-b90e222fce6d-000000/ekClE3TYxhsm8qloNN07MLKe7Nk=365), introduced by Senator Louise Lucas (D) would massively increase our state's minimum wage and **_force small business owners_** across the commonwealth **_to close their doors permanently_**. [Senate Bill 225](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=241%26typ=bil%26val=sb225/1/0100018e46d135b1-76580d72-01ba-4916-b3c9-b90e222fce6d-000000/ZJN-FQAWnLv-LLU68t2ndcCi4oM=365), introduced by Senator Stella Pekarsky (D) would **_force_** school boards to text parents **_subjective, fearmongering information about their right to keep and bear arms_** , shoving our education system deeper into the political hole it's already in. As you can see below, **_Virginia Democrats are making headlines_**.
---
| | |
---
| These are **_just a few examples of the litany of bad bills_** the Democrats are attempting to shove down our throats, **_the unconstitutional and fiscally irresponsible mandates_** they are attempting to **burden** Virginia's families with. These few bills, along with many more that Governor Youngkin will need to veto or amend, **_are what we can expect_** to pass into law **_if the Democratic party were to take control_** of the House, Senate, and Governor's Mansion simultaneously. Right now, we are holding on to one of the three 'legs of the stool', but that means **we CANNOT take any chances** during Virginia's next state election cycle. **_Preparations have to begin right now_**. I know that folks are focused on the Presidential election and what that means for our country, but we cannot sit idly by **_while the Democrats take over_** our state. I'm asking you to show your committment to _conservative principles_ , to a _free Virginia_ , to _constitutionality_ TODAY by making a contribution. **_Whatever you can afford, whether that is $1 or $1000_**. ** _Every penny counts_** , every dollar is another Virginian reached, another conservative pushed to the polls, another opportunity to spread our winning message that **_WE_** are Virginians and **_WE WILL NOT STAND for the woke Democrat agenda_**. Please, consider contributing to the fight via the links below or at [www.brycereeves.com](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com%2F/1/0100018e46d135b1-76580d72-01ba-4916-b3c9-b90e222fce6d-000000/fmzJ9YW2FRJ_iNHrs-UzPcymY9Y=365).

name: Roger Roth
subject: I am running for Congress to fight for Northeast Wisconsin
body:
Help me fight for America's future. Join our movement! No images? [Click here](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-x/) [](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-r/) Friend,I am running for Congress in Northeast Wisconsin because I believe in America's ability to rise and meet any challenge. It's no secret that under Joe Biden, our nation is in trouble. We need to send real conservatives to Washington to work alongside Donald Trump and get our nation back on track!Bidenomics is destroying our economy. Our debt has skyrocketed to more than $34 trillion. Families are paying an additional $10,000 a year because of choices made by Democrats in Washington.Illegal immigrants stream across our southern border, and our enemies are seizing on our weakness and division - threatening the safety and security of Americans.This must stop. Someone needs to stand up and fight for us: the taxpayers. It is why I am running to represent you in Congress. [Join Our Campaign Movement](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-y/) I was born and raised in Northeast Wisconsin, went to St. Mary Catholic School, and graduated from UW Oshkosh. My wife and I raise our five amazing little boys in Appleton.I'm a 3rd generation Wisconsin homebuilder. I've swung a hammer and operated a small business. To build a future worth fighting for, we need someone who knows our economy relies on small businesses, not mega corporations ready to abandon us for a tax write-off in another country.I've served our nation in the Wisconsin Air National Guard for 18 years. I enlisted out of college, served four tours in the Middle East, and serve as a Captain today. [Support New Leadership In Washington](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-j/) Joe Biden's weakness has emboldened our adversaries. Democrats have opened our border, costing American lives and flooding our communities with deadly fentanyl. I will fight for border security on day one. We must empower law enforcement, end Biden's catch-and-release scheme, and build the wall.I will hold China accountable for sending fentanyl to our southern border and destroying our economy with their COVID-19 coverup. These aren't empty words. I've delivered on conservative priorities by cutting taxes for Wisconsinites by $8.5 billion and authoring legislation advancing Universal School Choice. I stood for Pro-Life causes and ensured that bureaucrats in Madison were held accountable. [Get Involved With Roger's Campaign](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-t/) We know what it will take to get our nation back on track, but the Left is not going to sit this one out. Democrats are planning to spend millions to flip the 8th Congressional District and cost President Trump the margins he needs for victory. We can't let that happen.I'm ready to work for you and I would be honored to have you on our team. Roger [](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-k/) [](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-u/) [](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-o/)[](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-b/) [](https://rothforwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xhihyyd-duljhuiyly-n/) | Learn more at:

| | Friend, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=201a2b38db55457f86359bc9bd806e2c&_e=-h8c7AKCpCzxpWjbofaIx70JiJQOqC4vh0HZZYrFi50KuVTyT3Bti0K7-0lLEDU6NezWrgyBxUPYvGAW6T0Jd0lZZ1nYUPxNzgPG2zx_n_6j9alCxeWBFhVWK9Xj5sl8qWDSJMXa3v6tFJYNomKdx2ql_bjpIpOYGpW0-yuNNS4ZIdNqlMpILCLSbsIjFbijaRO0x_prpSabfRfsTabfp17rQGCXbzzKnPUCVfUUxMcJMqVJACyMgflKw7azE921-ftDwhn1kNqgUw-v5nQG2xMrtsVavmQzt4apJ2tgFYO0Pkwyfl6bLXrov8UBIdvAyaWzq5HnF46Nz3M6QRwCOgLQuOz_4dcsH7XO4rCiptOgd553jkZPVAwwk3rcWnTHUh28GkCRa_fEHfgAyttpUg%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=201a2b38db55457f86359bc9bd806e2c&_e=-h8c7AKCpCzxpWjbofaIx70JiJQOqC4vh0HZZYrFi50KuVTyT3Bti0K7-0lLEDU6NezWrgyBxUPYvGAW6T0Jd0lZZ1nYUPxNzgPG2zx_n_6j9alCxeWBFhVWK9Xj5sl8qWDSJMXa3v6tFJYNomKdx2ql_bjpIpOYGpW0-yuNNS4ZIdNqlMpILCLSbsIjFbijaRO0x_prpSabfRfsTabfp17rQGCXbzzKnPUCVfUUxMcJMqVJACyMgflKw7azE9216Orp2MzIwV_9Nxq-zZ6fxHswBqZ7u1zat1yKshivGV3mBSEzXLyUki8AoWgRLl_fY0qYw-3LWt5FvRCB75rcMaUU_ORFjf3mUlA7K65ZCD0KDPRfMJd2y_I3Nf6j-KUJqTOEcakOn1Y0b1FwsGdIKg%3D%3D)**

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: The NRA is personally attacking me (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The NRA can bash me all they want. We aren’t backing down.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b63873e-67c3-47db-876f-95d0c1715c59/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, I noticed a familiar face in a recent issue of American Rifleman. (Yes, I really read it. You’ve got to keep your friends close and enemies closer, after all.) To no one’s surprise, the NRA took out a full-page ad bashing me — and by extension, all of the folks who are a part of this movement to reform our gun laws, make progressive change, and elect the next generation of bold, young leaders. The ads in these magazines are always good for a laugh — but this kind of stuff also reminds me how scared of us they really are. I’ve said it before, but Gen Z will most certainly outlive the NRA. The gun lobby’s glory days are behind them now. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbfa74ffa-cfb3-4a8d-b93c-188200cd057e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This image is from a real NRA ad in a recent issue of American Rifleman. The best way to fight back against the NRA’s fear-mongering is to show them that we aren’t going away by bringing the school shooting generation into office. [B y splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today, you’ll be playing a big part in powering our work to elect the next generation of leaders and put the NRA and their puppet politicians in the dustbin of history where they belong. Split $25 now to help us do it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e8df417-0820-49de-9f7c-911b1c36b231/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
---
| | |
---
|
---

---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

| | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c54ca8078d8441c696ff5cd7495e13f4&_e=qeHXwbRGSLVFNW4V2fBcK1OxZUOVQ6-NkzRBoNhiwKVKj7-hWU1FQfTzXMCSk7BeZ9cAqW4ZUfYN8Jdiqpwb4WF_PrMwSaaJz9HhCyj-pPVEsgMV6Zmd-g7-Bpt6iMa3i-oLU3AUz0Xz2IAqvG6mTCWaxqSsRAAIHJiftZtihKmMdF-u44KB2zKiFRydC8k5FOuvW83by5eKINoGgam1fyix3ipt782aR6sAcBqKXbNTfsUas4lDoxyBj0DP85cm3e8_cfagzd5k0ry4BBrOPSWkHUQrf-ildgmrSaA3j_svqCgGoL-kqzbUHNRUfELkooxU3E7M9PXVCtRT_2zpc22NLC-7Ob6Uwq_jd5F_4ELveg8BaHQMa18dyO-nYW0-ybW2nt8fJGV9ikCjHtOJvQ%3D%3D)
---
| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c54ca8078d8441c696ff5cd7495e13f4&_e=qeHXwbRGSLVFNW4V2fBcK1OxZUOVQ6-NkzRBoNhiwKVKj7-hWU1FQfTzXMCSk7BeZ9cAqW4ZUfYN8Jdiqpwb4WF_PrMwSaaJz9HhCyj-pPVEsgMV6Zmd-g7-Bpt6iMa3i-oLU3AUz0Xz2IAqvG6mTCWaxqSsRAAIHJiftZtihKmMdF-u44KB2zKiFRydC8k5FOuvW83by5eKINoGgam1fyix3ipt782aR6sAcBqKXbPMouYV9iv97fynAQHnCxjvMMAiv1O1zT1oQ9Pz7HkcZXkn7g_QusWnoU9nd9Nf3xzkoxOaQ9KXhxMYwnU1S75eRe1AECzzBR2fbDvu77oV2sIimqFHvpvC98ejZNkuxqM4zPH3TbI1IvT9ICiHd-nwkVgztsNH8OO0HSDM9wy3HA%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c54ca8078d8441c696ff5cd7495e13f4&_e=qeHXwbRGSLVFNW4V2fBcK1OxZUOVQ6-NkzRBoNhiwKVKj7-hWU1FQfTzXMCSk7BeZ9cAqW4ZUfYN8Jdiqpwb4WF_PrMwSaaJz9HhCyj-pPVEsgMV6Zmd-g7-Bpt6iMa3i-oLU3AUz0Xz2IAqvG6mTCWaxqSsRAAIHJiftZtihKmMdF-u44KB2zKiFRydC8k5FOuvW83by5eKINoGgam1fyix3ipt782aR6sAcBqKXbMc4s5LG6AzXP6YC-zUHK39xLq7xUrIpoNS0Cd8Q6JxP1BgsEFwaDwzVIGPgD_POfd2CvmzW_Jjvb0sl8WAzbljDBLl4QfFptoxdW9sywF3_w7Kxjuc83GMDxKyWH2lTYP0M9PyGmyoFqzTe0fiLxnG-FrSHDM7vM8grYO0zbtVoQ%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: DEI – when will Mississippi leaders lead? Update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571927?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**The University of Florida just fired all their DEI (Diversity, Equity & Inclusion) staff. **The University closed the office of the Chief Diversity Officer, and terminated DEI-focused contracts.

**Florida is taking decisive action against the ‘woke’ mind virus that has been running rampant on US college campuses for years,** banning state dollars being spent on DEI programs in Florida’s universities.
---
|
---
_The ‘woke’ mind virus runs rampant on college campuses with ugly consequences._
| **In Alabama last week, a bill (SB 129) to ban DEI programs in all state institutions, including colleges, was voted through the state legislature.** The University of Arkansas, meanwhile, has decided it will be eliminating its diversity, equity and inclusion division.

**Here in Mississippi, meanwhile, crickets...... **No executive orders. No legislation. No action by the board of Mississippi’s Institutions of Higher Learning (IHL). Why?

**Senator Angela Hill did present a bill to****eliminate DEI programs in any state-funded institution****(SB2402). So, too, did Representative Becky Currie in the House (HB127). Yet both bills died in committee.**

Saying that the bills “died in committee” makes it sound like they were victims of some freak accident. Neither bill, of course, was struck by lightning or afflicted by some random misfortune.

**They failed to come out of committee because those that chaired the relevant committees to which each bill had been referred decided not to allow the bills to proceed.** In the Senate, the two committees in question were Accountability, Efficiency & Transparency, and Universities, chaired by **Sen David Parker** and **Sen Nicole Boyd** respectively. **Would Parker or Boyd have killed the anti DEI bill , I wonder, without tacit approval from Senate leader, Delbert Hosemann? **

In the House, the committee out of which the bill failed to emerge is chaired by **Rep Donnie Scoggin**.
---
|
---
_Who killed the anti DEI bill?_
_Conservatives in other states have taken action against DEI. Why not in Mississippi?_
| “But is an anti DEI bill actually necessary?”, I hear you ask. “Is there really that much DEI here in Mississippi in the first place?”

Perhaps the folk that run the universities said as much when they told the committee chairmen that all was fine and dandy?

**Spend two minutes browsing the University of Mississippi’s website, and it is strikingly clear that it is an institution run by people 100 percent committed to DEI. **

DEI dogma not only influences the way Ole Miss is run. DEI seeks to shape what young people are taught there. Ole Miss’s “Equity in Action” plans, for example, increasingly touch upon almost every aspect of university life.
---
|
---
_Some public universities in Mississippi are 100 percent committed to DEI programs._
| Concealed behind innocuous jargon in the university’s “Pathways to Equity” strategic plan, Ole Miss has an active DEI program that impacts everything from teaching practices, course content and student evaluation. The way I read it, in the name of DEI, Ole Miss even seems to endorse the hiring of some faculty on the basis of race, rather than merit.

**Without any action from the state Senate or the IHL, this is all being done on your tax dollar.** We know this thanks to Shad White, our State Auditor.

Shad White is one of the few leaders to actually show leadership on this issue, and he has tried to calculate how much all this is costing Mississippi taxpayers.

**White’s recent report showed that Mississippi universities spent over $23 million on DEI from July 2019 to June 2023.** Nearly $11 million of state taxpayer funds went to DEI programs, most of which was spent on salaries for DEI employees. **Without any action from our state leaders, DEI spending soared almost 50 percent since 2019. **

In case any legislators reading this (well over half of you do) need reminding why they ought to oppose DEI, here’s a quick reminder.

**The United States is founded on the revolutionary idea that all Americans are created equal.** America might have produced some laws and leaders that failed to live up to that high standard. But as a principle, it has never been bettered.

DEI overturns America’s founding principle, promoting instead the idea that each of us is defined by our immutable characteristics. This is not just profoundly un-American. **DEI ideology takes us back to a pre-modern, pre-Enlightenment idea that we are defined by what we are born. It is a profoundly anti-Western ideology. **
---
|
---
_Elon gets it. When will Mississippi’s leaders?_
| **It is not a coincidence that the ‘woke’ mobs that appeared on Ivy League college campuses after the Hamas terror attacks last October seemed to side with America’s enemies. **DEI proponents are hostile to America and the West.

**DEI demoralizes Americans. It teaches the young to believe that their country is always in the wrong.** It demands that history be rewritten to press the past into a narrative of exploitation.

**How regrettable that conservative leaders in a conservative state should prove so slow to deal with DEI when every state around us seems to be taking action. **

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4321f8ce45&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=1415f44b42) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=1415f44b42).

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Changing my party registration to Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Please read my full statement:

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I've thought about changing my party registration to Democrat. The reason? Unlimited campaign funding, every ounce of the media monopoly in my corner feeding me softball questions, fewer threats against my family & friends, fewer threats from the deep state.

__**Then I remembered, I'm not a coward.**__ I'm not a socialist. I'm an America First conservative & former Navy SEAL who served combat tours in Iraq and eastern Europe and risked his life to defend the conservative values that once made America the greatest nation on earth.
**This is Ryan Zinke, patriot and conservative representative for Montana, and I can 't be bought.**
**I 've shed too much blood, sweat and tears for my beloved country over the past three decades to even consider selling out for any reason whatsoever. **
Biden is mobilizing substantial resources to defeat me and regain control in Washington because I won't back down. As a Navy SEAL who proudly endorses Donald Trump, Biden and the Democrats simply cannot afford to keep me in the House another 2 years, so they've painted a bullseye on my back.

I'm devising my next counter-attack, but it will require reinforcements. I'm humbly asking for your assistance in hitting our first major fundraising goal before midnight tonight. **[A contribution of just $4 will make a huge impact on our campaign and help protect the House majority:](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yG9bbe7i8TqCBjgXvjmUuA~~/AARclAA~ "A contribution of just $4 will make a huge impact on our campaign and help protect the House majority:")**

---
| | [SEND REINFORCEMENTS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yG9bbe7i8TqCBjgXvjmUuA~~/AARclAA~)
---

Our deadline is looming, and the future of our campaign hangs in the balance. Your contribution will stop our campaign from falling apart.
**A small contribution of just $5 or $10 will make a significant impact on the future of this campaign.[Please chip in $5 before midnight to help us keep Montana RED.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yG9bbe7i8TqCBjgXvjmUuA~~/AARclAA~ "Please chip in $5 before midnight to help us keep Montana RED.")**
Thank you,
**Ryan Zinke (MT-01)**
_Navy SEAL in Congress_

Dear Peter,
Team Kennedy has incredible news to share: We won our major ballot access lawsuit in the Gem State of Idaho!
Our lawsuit challenged Idaho's unconstitutional early deadline access for independent presidential candidates to qualify. The early state date requirement for a minimum number of signatures (1,000) was found to be unconstitutional and will now be changed by state legislature or state courts.
_The type of dirty politics that got this unconstitutional law on the books is an example of why Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is running in the first place._
Just like we did in Utah, the Kennedy legal team has now secured a major win in Idaho against the two-party political machine, and we need your help to get Kennedy officially on the Idaho ballot.
Kennedy can only win this fight with your help. [Please make an urgent contribution now, before time runs out.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=idaho_ballot_3_16_24_rs_nd3&n=3)

body:

Congressman Fitzgerald is under attack by the **SAME** people who tried to throw President Trump off of the ballot in Wisconsin! The Minocqua Brewing Company has purchased anti-Trump billboards across the state, including one featuring Congressman Fitzgerald. Can't say it's surprising coming from them, they literally have a woke Super PAC dedicated to pushing their radical agenda.

clean_body: The liberals are losing their minds... or maybe they're drunk.| | | This is almost too ridiculous to be true, Peter. Congressman Fitzgerald is under attack by the SAME people who tried to throw President Trump off of the ballot in Wisconsin! The Minocqua Brewing Company has purchased anti-Trump billboards across the state, including one featuring Congressman Fitzgerald. Can't say it's surprising coming from them, they literally have a woke Super PAC dedicated to pushing their radical agenda. Cringeworthy, right? Since Biden's been in office the radical left has been drunk with power, removing policies that secure our border, cutting our national defense budget, and pushing a woke agenda in our schools, but this is a new low. Attacks like this are just the beginning. The Democrats are going to throw everything at us to try and unseat Congressman Fitzgerald because of his staunch Republican values and his allyship with President Trump. We have to show strength NOW to ensure a resounding victory in November. Thank you,Team Fitzgerald | | | | | | | ---|--- | |

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: An audience of one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
I serve God first

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cac1f6f385f6475bb622b83264786645&_e=Us-m-_Zgj5U_8QRBZdAkJRCMbtpkF9wiL4ZisTxMSuvYyul_mibt8j-f_xd3bocdhAvusuWYYuYRszuMFTIra5EK5Q4u8dTM38DLJcXagJVaEo4swMXMoVsMLF-SKT4aIyeyJ4VE6diWjODN4x2_faakvhzfJGf5vuLdYrHZvOQ9xZxpfeWGytruJ3h81WmX6ffw2cOPBdVgIzOnhoApymfRxpPyXNYHOppJvB4qJi0MSyQRqgecOT5nJwBvulVO0JNw5FiEMI6EvJOxbF2vb3K2sK62C-Ugpdwzi72lyC1ZoWTU-VXF89cqv8LIk_m6VmbnwM12esCGYNEb-sM-tQsgsRnt171F66Js6iS5zvurroCaCyn7Qc8orwTmaNZXSPPzazZukoeNwF39he32OzSMk-13dyFSuB_WSdnq8IoePDI3ZNS5Ncp_-F1YZjBJwqymWqCAHHXZPge5GgCjBi3soLCobCeEGAQ2wXY4v8bOrIf8xH4EHDWeCwmILx4IC9Aek9nNUh47-DpD-1rdTA%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

I'm the product of an unplanned pregnancy.

Born to two teenage parents, every statistic and societal roadblock indicated that I was destined for a life of hardship.

But my parents didn't buy into any of that.

I may have been unplanned, but that did not mean I was unwanted.

Soon after me, three more kids came. And what began as a teenage love story quickly became a family of six. My dad went to work and did whatever he needed to do to make ends meet for our family. That meant putting his life on the line to serve his community in the local fire department.

All my life, I wanted to be like my dad, and there was nothing I dreamed of more than becoming a firefighter just like him.

But on a fateful day in September of 1984, all of that changed.

My dad and his battalion responded to a call that would change all of our lives forever.

By the grace of God my dad made it out of that building alive, but not unscathed. Eighty percent of his body was covered in burns.

From then on, the hardest working man that I knew would not be able to work as a fireman another day of his life. And as the oldest of four kids, it was up to me to step in and help fill the void in our young family.

We're all a product of our experiences, and that moment defined who I am.

My dream of becoming a firefighter like my dad was now discouraged, and I had effectively been launched into the role of a pseudo-parent to my younger siblings overnight.

**Being raised in a Christian household without a lot of means, we put our head down for two reasons:

1\. To pray to God
2\. To get to work**

So, at 12 years old, I picked myself up by my bootstraps and did just that -- got to work.

And to be quite honest, I haven't really picked my head back up since.

From a young boy trying to help his parents make ends meet, to a law student, to a husband and father, and eventually to Speaker of the House, the only thing I have ever been focused on is getting the job done.

My wife might call me a workaholic, but in my mind, I am a man who is focused on the task at hand, and completing a mission.

**[Right now, my mission is to ensure that my kids have the same opportunity to make a life for themselves and achieve their goals like I did.](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cac1f6f385f6475bb622b83264786645&_e=Us-m-_Zgj5U_8QRBZdAkJRCMbtpkF9wiL4ZisTxMSuvYyul_mibt8j-f_xd3bocdhAvusuWYYuYRszuMFTIra5EK5Q4u8dTM38DLJcXagJVaEo4swMXMoVsMLF-SKT4aIyeyJ4VE6diWjODN4x2_faakvhzfJGf5vuLdYrHZvOQ9xZxpfeWGytruJ3h81WmX6ffw2cOPBdVgIzOnhoApymfRxpPyXNYHOppJvB4qJi0MSyQRqgecOT5nJwBvulVO0JNw5FiEMI6EvJOxbF2vb3K2sK62C-Ugpdwzi72lyC1ZoWTU-VXF89cqv8LIk_m6VmbnwM12esCGYNEb-sM-tQsgsRnt171F66Js6iS5zvurroCaCyn7Qc8orwTmaNZXFEXfqBLMvXdGqprDFezJixnxK2ObSEYhkF0e3ILkBaXZ1jx1zcNT4bDoiijk6VcLxctZ1hiML1uzRjmo-DjczD8o9l-zMudRwiRYd0qFJt8yfQvd9p6KvcWrFnpvJyEUX05XKiO0ZlHbXbJS7bNFNQ%3D%3D "Right now, my mission is to ensure that my kids have the same opportunity to make a life for themselves and achieve their goals like I did. ")**

And that means being the kind of conservative, Christian leader in Washington, D.C. that my dad would be proud of.

That alone puts you at odds with the D.C. Establishment, by the way.

I'm not interested in the cocktail parties, or rubbing elbows with different special interest groups.

The Washington Elite and their allies in the mainstream media can cast judgment all they want. That doesn't bother me.

Because at the end of the day, I know that I serve an audience of one -- and that I am doing all that I can with the blessings given to me, and the faith entrusted to me, to glorify God.

**[So, now that you know just a little bit more about me, where I come from, and what keeps me going, I humbly ask if you are willing to stand alongside me in this fight?](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cac1f6f385f6475bb622b83264786645&_e=Us-m-_Zgj5U_8QRBZdAkJRCMbtpkF9wiL4ZisTxMSuvYyul_mibt8j-f_xd3bocdhAvusuWYYuYRszuMFTIra5EK5Q4u8dTM38DLJcXagJVaEo4swMXMoVsMLF-SKT4aIyeyJ4VE6diWjODN4x2_faakvhzfJGf5vuLdYrHZvOQ9xZxpfeWGytruJ3h81WmX6ffw2cOPBdVgIzOnhoApymfRxpPyXNYHOppJvB4qJi0MSyQRqgecOT5nJwBvulVO0JNw5FiEMI6EvJOxbF2vb3K2sK62C-Ugpdwzi72lyC1ZoWTU-VXF89cqv8LIk_m6VmbnwM12esCGYNEb-sM-tQsgsRnt171F66Js6iS5zvurroCaCyn7Qc8orwTmaNZXUFSjO9j28ojQ4NCITBUYiGRSuOuiPQonlB85Evk9QHfo_oBaw3G0eg4pWslhnlJj_EtfN6K56RW-5LEkKgNhCfkSEOkB2dXbWWK8qydF19RQB_GJjqwzPWC7VIv4HM6g24YU0ozCMCmCelkmmydrgA%3D%3D "So, now that you know just a little bit more about me, where I come from, and what keeps me going, I humbly ask if you are willing to stand alongside me in this fight? clean_body: I serve God first | | | | | | Friend, I'm the product of an unplanned pregnancy. Born to two teenage parents, every statistic and societal roadblock indicated that I was destined for a life of hardship. But my parents didn't buy into any of that. I may have been unplanned, but that did not mean I was unwanted. Soon after me, three more kids came. And what began as a teenage love story quickly became a family of six. My dad went to work and did whatever he needed to do to make ends meet for our family. That meant putting his life on the line to serve his community in the local fire department. All my life, I wanted to be like my dad, and there was nothing I dreamed of more than becoming a firefighter just like him. But on a fateful day in September of 1984, all of that changed. My dad and his battalion responded to a call that would change all of our lives forever. By the grace of God my dad made it out of that building alive, but not unscathed. Eighty percent of his body was covered in burns. From then on, the hardest working man that I knew would not be able to work as a fireman another day of his life. And as the oldest of four kids, it was up to me to step in and help fill the void in our young family. We're all a product of our experiences, and that moment defined who I am. My dream of becoming a firefighter like my dad was now discouraged, and I had effectively been launched into the role of a pseudo-parent to my younger siblings overnight. Being raised in a Christian household without a lot of means, we put our head down for two reasons: 1\. To pray to God 2\. To get to work So, at 12 years old, I picked myself up by my bootstraps and did just that -- got to work. And to be quite honest, I haven't really picked my head back up since. From a young boy trying to help his parents make ends meet, to a law student, to a husband and father, and eventually to Speaker of the House, the only thing I have ever been focused on is getting the job done. My wife might call me a workaholic, but in my mind, I am a man who is focused on the task at hand, and completing a mission. "Right now, my mission is to ensure that my kids have the same opportunity to make a life for themselves and achieve their goals like I did. " And that means being the kind of conservative, Christian leader in Washington, D.C. that my dad would be proud of. That alone puts you at odds with the D.C. Establishment, by the way. I'm not interested in the cocktail parties, or rubbing elbows with different special interest groups. The Washington Elite and their allies in the mainstream media can cast judgment all they want. That doesn't bother me. Because at the end of the day, I know that I serve an audience of one -- and that I am doing all that I can with the blessings given to me, and the faith entrusted to me, to glorify God. "So, now that you know just a little bit more about me, where I come from, and what keeps me going, I humbly ask if you are willing to stand alongside me in this fight? " | | I'm not going to lie to you, it won't be easy. But doing what's right rarely is. Thank you for your time and support, | Speaker Mike Johnson * | | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana P.O. Box 6075 Bossier City, LA 71171

body:
| | Hello, Janelle Stelson here! I am on my way to knock on doors to connect with voters in the district to spread our Democratic message, but my team wanted me to reach out to you first. We are still behind on our mid-month fundraising goal that ends at midnight. Before I tell you why this deadline is so important, can you chip in to help us reach our goal? » **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/js-em-mar24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81065229/461280562/-529110805?source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_031624_1_3_MarchMMFR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzY5NGY3MTctOTVlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=42hvonAeNfDRNhJjIpC9IUOmT6Cf6gPWSNvzwK4z_Jg=)** I hate asking for money, but we cannot defeat Congressman Scott Perry if we cannot catch up to him. **Republicans are pouring millions into this district** , because they know Perry is vulnerable against the grassroots movement that we are building. Every dollar we raise will go directly toward our on the ground efforts to flip this district blue and fire extremist Scott Perry. We are getting closer to our first public filing end-of-quarter deadline of the year, and how much we raise before midnight tonight will tell us exactly how much more we need to raise to close the gap with Scott Perry. I would not ask if it was not important: Can you contribute any amount you can right now to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal and fire anti-choice, anti-democracy Congressman Perry once and for all? » **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/js-em-mar24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81065230/461280564/-529110805?source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_031624_1_3_MarchMMFR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzY5NGY3MTctOTVlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=42hvonAeNfDRNhJjIpC9IUOmT6Cf6gPWSNvzwK4z_Jg=)** Thank you,
Janelle

name: Lara Trump
subject: Leave President Trump a personal message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Congratulating him on the HUGE achievement.
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0e74102ecefe4ef692833f570f594dcf&_e=OF23aCvBpiwg5K_MHI6XZXmvOUkdkpBEPZ1sJrFEidEr_gJEim59yiLejRgMl92ZOpFUcBc7Q_BKoy6osP5-EObY39qXmPVMUkyZN_1dc8CxizABoh1HZezu6aX-SKBUUeizvOR2ifdbFFPPrXtQHTa8A9IGkwjhF_Q8wyBhGEjegyXGbMQF4ekfwiL5TseM1kIYxgG8fuhVT_fvFgnv0krPUynuVrW1H5pXrWGAkCSWB8rh3QuNdxKjFGYGGqeS0iQpCB7-UlX06RWp_7QEJtAuY8wREBd_C4ZqZVxMQo1eucNFK80Ciyk3xOTrzyGvmfETADRNzfzdQb_bmZvPc5MGFUSWOYnSslIzzqcl8uZyEJpv6R96RADaVgS083QN2PqWCUcVtopw3ZPQrpVLClMLb2QoZX1omYEWmxUv6Ax_Dsl4tTrpE4H-n8uWVbMfNtbA44MjEZd1KuPV-SvmaPnZKJqy0yKY0aPttuwEeMswl_3jPO0Ydip7Qo4hMMS5)

Peter,

My father-in-law, Donald Trump, just reached another historic milestone in the road to defeating Biden-- securing the 1,215 delegates he needs to become our Party's presumptive nominee.

_**It 's time for EVERY Republican voter to UNITE BEHIND TRUMP and SAVE AMERICA.**_

body:
Peter, I have some alarming news and need to share it with you right away: **Donald Trump is in Ohio today to campaign for his handpicked Senate candidate, Bernie Moreno, and we need your urgent support to fight back.**

With Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate, experts at _CNN_ are calling my seat one of the GOP's best pickup opportunities. That's why national Republicans are going all in to defeat me.

Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs already made a record-breaking ad reservation to flood the airwaves with attack ads – and now, Trump is rallying the Republican base and his MAGA mega-donors to prop up his handpicked candidate.

With everything from the Dignity of Work to reproductive rights on the line in this race, we have absolutely no room for error. **We've set a goal to raise $100,000 before Trump takes the stage, so we're prepared for whatever the GOP throws at us, and I'm counting on folks like you to chip in now:**

name: Ashwin Ramaswami (via Leaders We Deserve)
subject: Why I’m running for State Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’ll be the first Gen Z and Indian American representative in Georgia
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240316-1&t=1&akid=465%2E587540%2EkwmeXo)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240316-1?refcode=em20240316-1&amount=5&refcode2=465_587540_kwmeXo&akid=465%2E587540%2EkwmeXo)
Hi Peter,
My name is Ashwin Ramaswami, and I’m running to represent Georgia’s 48th District in the State Senate. My friends at Leaders We Deserve said I could reach out to you about my critical campaign that has major implications for the future of our state and our democracy.
**I want to explain why I – a Gen Z Indian American with a computer science and law background – am running for office in 2024. And I want to explain why I’m running against an insurrectionist who has been indicted for trying to overturn the results of the 2020 election.** [**This is a bit of a long email, so if you don’t have time to read all the way to the end, please click here to split a grassroots donation between my campaign and Leaders We Deserve.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240316-1?refcode=em20240316-1&amount=5&refcode2=465_587540_kwmeXo&akid=465%2E587540%2EkwmeXo)
_Peter, we are living in a time of dangerous political polarization._ Partisan gridlock has undermined the effectiveness of our government institutions here in Georgia, and the citizens of our state are suffering the consequences.
**In my career so far, I’ve worked under Republican and Democratic administrations in my role as a federal election security civil servant.** My public service has been built on fighting for the free and fair elections that serve as the backbone of our democracy. As a State Senator, I’ll be ready to work across the aisle to pass common-sense legislation on behalf of all Georgians.
The world is changing around us with recent breakthroughs in artificial intelligence and increased reliance on digitalization and automation. Georgia needs elected officials with expertise in the technology of the future. I’ve helped build startups, and my background at the intersection of law and technology makes me uniquely qualified to provide expertise on these issues at the Georgia Capitol.
As a 24-year-old candidate, I am also running to fight for my own communities, including my fellow members of Gen-Z.
**Meanwhile, my opponent, Republican State Senator Shawn Still, was actually indicted as part of the far-right attempts to overturn the 2020 election results here in Georgia.** He’s shown he’s unfit for public office through his support for undemocratic insurrectionists. We don’t need this type of representation in Georgia, and we don’t need our taxpayer dollars supporting someone like Shawn Still.
**In 2022, my Republican opponent Shawn Still self-funded his campaign with $300K of his own money. I don’t have that kind of cash to invest in building our campaign, so I’m relying on grassroots donations to get this campaign across the finish line.**
Georgia Senate District 48 – and our state as a whole – deserves better. I’m ready to break barriers and bring diverse new leadership to the Georgia State Capitol. _**If elected, I’ll be the first Gen Z State Senator in Georgia – as well as the first Indian American legislator, and the only state legislator with a computer science degree.**_
[**Peter, can you split a donation between my campaign and Leaders We Deserve today to help me win critical race in the Georgia Senate? I’d be so grateful to have your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240316-1?refcode=em20240316-1&amount=5&refcode2=465_587540_kwmeXo&akid=465%2E587540%2EkwmeXo)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240316-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240316-1-465&refcode2=465_587540_kwmeXo&akid=465%2E587540%2EkwmeXo)**
Thanks so much,
Ashwin Ramaswami
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240316-1&t=2&refcode2=465_587540_kwmeXo&akid=465%2E587540%2EkwmeXo)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=465%2E587540%2EkwmeXo)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=465%2E587540%2EkwmeXo)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Listen up: Ted Cruz is a disgrace to Texans. It's time to kick him to the curb once and for all — but we can't do it without you. Colin Allred is ready to take the fight to Cruz****like never before. He's not afraid to call out Cruz's lies, corruption, and sheer incompetence. But he needs your help to get the job done. We're not mincing words here: Cruz is a spineless career politician who cares more about his own ambitions than the people he's supposed to represent. He's failed us time and time again. It's time to hold him accountable. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately to The Collective PAC. | | | | | | We're in a battle for the soul of Texas, and we can't afford to lose. The race is tight, but with your support, we can send Cruz packing. Together, we can make history and show Cruz that his days of taking Texas for granted are over. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.
