body:
Hi Peter,

I just got out of a meeting with my team, and I have some news - _we 're behind where we need to be for our mid-month deadline TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT._
In the years since Joe Biden took office, the Democrat party has shown who they truly are.
From green-lighting lawlessness in our cities to ignoring the crisis at our border, they're taking our country down a dangerous path - _all while deep-pocketed liberal elites continue to fund their agenda._
As the Democrats lurch further and further to the Left, they're going to bring in more and more cash. That means we have to DOUBLE DOWN on our efforts to build a war chest capable of beating Tim Kaine in November.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I wish I did not have to ask
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1233%2E135344%2EvDbNb9)

Friends --
I want to share something with you that I feel deeply about: I wish we didn't have to send these emails. It’s why it’s important to me that **I write or edit _every_ email I send.**
I wish we didn't have to ask for donations around FEC deadlines and monthly deadlines. I wish we didn't have to ask people almost daily for a few dollars at a time. I wish we didn't have to send text messages or run ads asking for donations.
But when we started this Senate campaign we made a choice -- and the choice was to reject corporate PAC money.
We made that decision knowing this Michigan Senate race will be one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country, and after having rejected it in all 3 of my competitive House races.
So we have to ask.
We have to ask because when lots donate at once, it adds up quick and ensures we have the resources to fight back.
So like I said, we have to ask. And that is especially important around these quarterly FEC fundraising deadlines -- the next of which is coming up fast. So please:
[**Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan? I don't expect you to donate to every email we send, but I do hope you'll contribute to this one.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240316-1-700&t=2&akid=1233%2E135344%2EvDbNb9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

---

****

Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand the Supreme Court rule on Trump’s immunity NOW, not in a month
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Demand the Supreme Court rule on Trump’s immunity NOW, not in a month](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9126eb18-86f5-4845-b39d-bfa27411eb69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90832933-87d5-4f77-974b-ad9bd78e20b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The Supreme Court will decide whether Trump has immunity from criminal prosecution for the crimes he committed while he was president. But they won't be hearing arguments until late April, which means we won't have a decision until probably the end of June. **[We can't afford to wait that long. Tell the Supreme Court to rule on Trump's immunity claim NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0787c6ff-3754-4a28-a39b-a5b18ca6b6fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** This is an open-and-shut case! Trump's claim that he has full immunity for any crime committed is absurd and wildly dangerous. The Supreme Court's decision on this has massive implications. What could be more important that they need to delay this for two months?! Waiting this long would push Trump's Jan 6 trial further back, allowing the possibility for Trump to win the election and pardon himself. That's not a risk our country can afford to take. [**Sign your name to demand the Supreme Court decide on Trump's immunity NOW – don't delay this critically important decision! >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T067664ef-a929-4736-b1e5-0e9a726d7091/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13dc0f85-7c28-4be6-8d31-44705830aa7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Want to do something else? **[Tell Elon Musk to stop giving a platform to hate](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62aabb8b-64cf-46a5-b029-a7e899ce511d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**)
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1bf4c26-1af7-4e12-ba64-0fb884cca76f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T285cb2b8-0232-439a-9f1e-df9130006db5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta43f70b4-ff0d-4773-92bb-34cfc29e372b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2d43452-3834-4a93-99f9-0fb4e4f4c5f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
This week, news broke that indicted Senator Bob Menendez is eyeing an Independent run for Senate.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81070293/461295857/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI1NzhiMy05OWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sobrNqe8o42DYhvXYknVbUbE8Nqh0iPwOHB-l-A_zlU=&emci=9f78ef5a-e0e2-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=092578b3-99e3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=26261389)
---

| | This week, news broke that indicted Senator Bob Menendez is eyeing an Independent run for Senate. The consequences of that could be devastating as Democrats are fighting to hold on to the Senate Majority in November. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81070294/461295858/-1197072038?refcode=2024-03-16-menendez&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=092578b3-99e3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTI1NzhiMy05OWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sobrNqe8o42DYhvXYknVbUbE8Nqh0iPwOHB-l-A_zlU=) If Bob Menendez runs as an Independent, is New Jersey's U.S. Senate seat in play for Republicans? The answer? Not if we win the primary. Here's why:
1. I'm a Democrat who won a district Trump won _twice_.
2. A recent poll shows I am currently appealing to independent voters by far bigger numbers than my competitors.
3. Our grassroots team is stronger than anything New Jersey has seen before, and I know we can take on any challenge and win.

clean_body: This week, news broke that indicted Senator Bob Menendez is eyeing an Independent run for Senate. | | | | This week, news broke that indicted Senator Bob Menendez is eyeing an Independent run for Senate. The consequences of that could be devastating as Democrats are fighting to hold on to the Senate Majority in November. = If Bob Menendez runs as an Independent, is New Jersey's U.S. Senate seat in play for Republicans? The answer? Not if we win the primary. Here's why: 1. I'm a Democrat who won a district Trump won twice. 2. A recent poll shows I am currently appealing to independent voters by far bigger numbers than my competitors. 3. Our grassroots team is stronger than anything New Jersey has seen before, and I know we can take on any challenge and win. But nothing is guaranteed in this race. = = More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: campaigns are won by the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
one grassroots gift at a time
| | |
---
Look, big change starts small.
That's a lesson that my grandmother, Polly Noonan, first taught me decades ago. Well before most women had any political power, my grandmother organized women into a political force in Albany.
By the time I was in elementary school, I was tagging along with her to all kinds of Democratic campaign headquarters, rallies and events. She remains one of my biggest role models — and I carry her wisdom with me to this day. **She taught me that my voice matters, that women’s voices matter and that grassroots activism matters. And she showed me how campaigns are won by the people who put in the work like the volunteers knocking doors, stuffing envelopes, turning out the vote and donating what they can, when they can.**
For decades, first by my grandmother's side and then as a public servant myself, I've seen how those small grassroots actions all add up to victory on Election Day. That's how Democrats defeated the odds in 2022 to defend and even expand our Senate majority. And that's why I know that we can win again in 2024.
With Democrats defending 23 seats, the odds are certainly stacked against us. And after the 2022 red wave in New York, Republicans here are already targeting my seat for defeat. **But when people like you get off the sidelines and chip in even just $3, eventually we'll build a grassroots movement capable of defeating even the GOP's wealthiest megadonors.**
**[So please, will you chip in $3 or $25 or whatever you can spare today to help save our Senate majority by building a grassroots movement one grassroots gift at a time? I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, so these grassroots donations are truly critical to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81071103/461298393/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4901-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQwYTdiMS05YWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJQFsEQHS_TuFSWaJEvVZEiPGQexCh74VBMrbwDFLKw=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81071109/461298399/1575385346?refcode=jtk4901-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQwYTdiMS05YWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJQFsEQHS_TuFSWaJEvVZEiPGQexCh74VBMrbwDFLKw=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81071110/461298400/1575385346?refcode=jtk4901-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQwYTdiMS05YWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJQFsEQHS_TuFSWaJEvVZEiPGQexCh74VBMrbwDFLKw=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

My fellow Americans - this is Lara Trump.

**It 's official. I was JUST voted in as Co-Chair of the Republican National Committee!**

Helping lead the Republican Party is the honor of my life - and I promise you to commit my blood, sweat, and tears to defeat the Radical Democrats and save the country you and I cherish.

_I vow that this RNC will be the most powerful election-winning machine in American history._

_And my list of priorities is simple:**1)** SAVE our Conservative House Majority, **2)** WIN back the Senate, and **3)** ELECT my father-in-law - Donald J. Trump - to the Presidency! _

But the mountains ahead of us are steep: Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats are ramping up their election operation like we've NEVER seen before. Even in the last couple weeks, everything changed:
* Democrats flipped a seat after winning a Special Election in New York
* Our razor-thin House Majority was cut down even further
* Joe Biden opened up 100 field offices in key battleground states
* He hired over 300 campaign staff
* His campaign shattered their best fundraising record to date
* House Democrats raised $100+ million last year
* And the DNC has a THREE-TO-ONE cash advantage

_**[So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you'd donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ix6d2upOhwk2p9OfnAIt4g~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2D2gP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvbGFyYS10cnVtcC1ybmMtY2hhaXItcC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzE0X1BBLUFGUjEuMTEzNTQ3X3QxNDYxMzU2LTE3NTYmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQwMzE0X1BBLUFGUjEuMTEzNTQ3X3QxNDYxMzU2LTE3NTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtYWZyLTIwMjQwMzE2Jnh1bnY9dHYtYWZyLTIwMjQwMzE2VwNzcGNCCmXvvKL1ZUfBTHFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "So as your new RNC Co-Chair, I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME to humbly ask if you’d donate a few dollars today to help usher in the biggest GOP victory our country has ever seen.")**_

I took this position because it kills me to watch our country be run into the ground by the Radical Democrats. So I'm devoting everything in me to make sure they pay the political price for what they've done to America.

Are you with me on this? We could really use your support right now.

name: James Comer
subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b04ed78815f94b08aa593d763b46ce52&_e=Vn41fANJEW05Y1Oyx86O8S_guJG2G3wcwx5mwGm1h7eX_C1D5SajptJiS2eYJQ4R4B67QzU8tx_PzJKP5SWyQWNuRqpgu79_0ZJMMVWm1SHMa82C1alUHuS80yqE-zyRVNBvzCuBSr2QaaQ-GuYRCYTD8JBmmVHkzBztmfh6-mOqKPdZt8xVVoG1p6nYAlKagzC1OUqGvv413OJZymx7wYxyG7hEs1bI1CIgiypS71ZBmfo2hcjyxCijXttd_uyVgr1UnDjp73Ms1J7_gBH7oNtBvXka4yP3WG275KTxnTt9tnxsBMQ1ojlKt9nOR9MqWSyCGPA0WjMas2fttNbKoYidL6D53WX6YNtm9d0hQNo-XKPNdHpLxALlvNRGEiiu)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b04ed78815f94b08aa593d763b46ce52&_e=Vn41fANJEW05Y1Oyx86O8S_guJG2G3wcwx5mwGm1h7eX_C1D5SajptJiS2eYJQ4R4B67QzU8tx_PzJKP5SWyQWNuRqpgu79_0ZJMMVWm1SHMa82C1alUHuS80yqE-zyRVNBvzCuBSr2QaaQ-GuYRCYTD8JBmmVHkzBztmfh6-mOqKPdZt8xVVoG1p6nYAlKagzC1OUqGvv413OJZymx7wYxyG7hEs1bI1CIgiypS71Y3X3MIVeLd5Fco81OBF7ShKNpCAv0maB8mtOXj47lkFBuwDxJiE9MNYT3KTDO2d7jfMKp0tVLnRgUVj9x3fIFbhmkVHB3b6BedGrMNyixa2p01gRDTvLdS-s64F5L1HVZFGhLz7FboP9RhVUcU2fDF)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**

clean_body: In the Biden Family | | Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN conspiracy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, There’s a lot of campaigns out there, but I chose to work with Pat Harrigan because he’s not a career politician. Pat spent his life serving our country as a Green Beret. He’s seen combat, and he’s put his life on the line fighting for our country. When he got back from his final tour of duty, he and his wife started a business that now employs hundreds of hardworking North Carolinians. But above all, he’s a husband and father who wants to build a better world for his children. Pat isn’t running for Congress for his own fame and glory. He’s ready to lead America by: Securing our border and deporting illegal aliens Fostering job growth for a thriving economy Cutting wasteful spending and lowering our national debt This battle-tested conservative is the leader we need in Washington, and he wants YOU on his team. ** Thank you, EdCampaign Manager Pat Harrigan for Congress | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: Christina (personal)
subject: $1 to close the gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
We’re in the final stretch to hit our mid-month fundraising goal before midnight, but we’re still about $1,327 short.

|
Hey Peter,

We’re in the final stretch to hit our mid-month fundraising goal before midnight, and we’re still about $1,327 short. I know this deadline might not sound like a big deal, but we have to reach this goal to make sure we’re in the best position possible heading into our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at the end of this month.

That’s why I’m reaching out to ask if you could pitch in just $1 to help us reach our target. It may seem like a small amount, but if every person reading this email chips in just $1, we’ll blow past our goal in no time.

While Mariannette Miller-Meeks has corporate PACs and special interests funding her campaign, we’re relying on small-dollar, grassroots donors like you to help us win this election in November.

So, can I count on you to donate just $1 today to help my campaign flip IA-01 and take back the House majority? Donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_cb_q1_2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81074642/461308896/180180251?refcode=em24_240316_mm3_fnd_gq_act___cbp_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240316_mm3_fnd_gq_act___cbp_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=a3248d71-9fe3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzI0OGQ3MS05ZmUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZF2i5OmzeUDEN-x1VGK-lEm2kbOA_zSsWEEkAXRRDjk=)**

Thanks so much,

Christina

clean_body: We’re in the final stretch to hit our mid-month fundraising goal before midnight, but we’re still about $1,327 short. | Hey Peter, We’re in the final stretch to hit our mid-month fundraising goal before midnight, and we’re still about $1,327 short. I know this deadline might not sound like a big deal, but we have to reach this goal to make sure we’re in the best position possible heading into our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at the end of this month. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask if you could pitch in just $1 to help us reach our target. It may seem like a small amount, but if every person reading this email chips in just $1, we’ll blow past our goal in no time. While Mariannette Miller-Meeks has corporate PACs and special interests funding her campaign, we’re relying on small-dollar, grassroots donors like you to help us win this election in November. So, can I count on you to donate just $1 today to help my campaign flip IA-01 and take back the House majority? Donate here: = Thanks so much, Christina Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. These results don’t shock us here at Dolan HQ because we know that Matt is the BEST candidate to take on Sherrod Brown. We have seen the grassroots support on the ground continue to grow.

**_This is the most important race in the country, and if the Republican Party does not elect the right candidate, then we stand no chance in November._**

Ohio deserves leadership that will fight for YOU. Leadership that will secure and seal the border and stop the flow of fentanyl into our communities. Leadership that will cut taxes and grow the economy. Leadership that will fund our police, reduce crime, and make our country safe again.

**_That leader is Matt Dolan._**

_Matt has a strong conservative record of accomplishments and always focuses on delivering results for Ohio. America faces a huge challenge moving forward, and Matt Dolan is the only candidate who has proven they can get the job done._

**_As a leader in Ohio, Matt has cut taxes, expanded school choice, protected natural resources, and implemented a pro-growth agenda. Matt Dolan is results-oriented and will be successful in solving problems in the U.S. Senate._**

_Matt Dolan has a plan. This is our chance to push him over the finish line and set the stage for a head-to-head battle with Sherrod Brown._

[**_Will you take five seconds of your time to pitch in to help a principled conservative become the next US Senator from Ohio? **_There is too much at stake here for you to sit on the sidelines. Please join the fight today._**

name: Daniel Pardee
subject: make or break
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | It’s time again for another FEC filing deadline. As Josh’s Finance Director, I just wanted to take a moment and explain why these deadlines are make or break for a campaign.

At the end of each quarter, the Federal Election Commission publishes EVERYTHING each campaign has raised. And the NRCC uses these numbers to gauge their chances of flipping seats and holding on to their majority in November, which impacts where they spend their money and which candidates they’re going after.

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16140?t=1011?refcode=email-20240316&akid=5523%2E5885482%2EX_-0b3 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

AIPAC has a zero tolerance policy for criticizing Netanyahu’s right-wing
government and his horrific war in Gaza. That’s why AIPAC is using
$100,000,000 to try to silence pro-Peace progressives and defeat Ceasefire
advocates like Cori Bush, Pramila Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, and Ilhan Omar.

Our Revolution joined over 20 progressive organizations to launch the
Reject AIPAC campaign. We’re fighting back against $100 million in AIPAC
attack ads, defending our progressive champions in Congress, and urging
the Democratic Party to stop accepting AIPAC’s right-wing money.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16140?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240316&akid=5523%2E5885482%2EX_-0b3 ]Contribute to help us fight back against AIPAC’s $100,000,000 attempt to
silence pro-Peace progressives. Support our work to get the Democratic
Party to Reject AIPAC now!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16140?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240316&akid=5523%2E5885482%2EX_-0b3 ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16140?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240316&akid=5523%2E5885482%2EX_-0b3 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Over 75% of Democratic voters support a permanent Ceasefire now. So why
doesn’t the Democratic Party support a Ceasefire? Because AIPAC is heavily
influencing Democratic policies with their troves of right-wing money.
AIPAC supports insurrectionists, yet the Democratic Party and corporate
Democrats accept donations from AIPAC in order to defeat progressives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16150?t=1052&akid=5523%2E5885482%2EX_-0b3 ][IMG]

AIPAC is still advocating for unconditional military aid to Israel, while
tens of thousands of Palestinian civilians are killed AND Israel is
blocking humanitarian aid to Palestinians in desperate need of food and
water. The Democratic base is not aligned with AIPAC. The Democratic Party
shouldn’t be aligned with AIPAC either.

Bernie said it best: Any progressive that speaks out for the dignity of
Palestinians ends up on AIPAC’s "hitlist."

Progressive champions like Pramila Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman,
Ilhan Omar, AOC, Cori Bush, and others have bravely spoken out against
Israeli war crimes in Gaza. Now, we must stand with them to fight back
against AIPAC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16140?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240316&akid=5523%2E5885482%2EX_-0b3 ]Stand with progressives! Donate today to fuel our work to defend our
strongest champions for Peace and pressure the Democratic party to REJECT
AIPAC.

But you know who wishes we’d forget? My MAGA extremist opponent Nancy Mace. In a recent interview, Nancy told George Stephanopoulos that voters have “moved on” from the horrors of what happened that day. It's a stark contrast to what she said a few days after January 6th happened: "We have to hold the president accountable and ensure he never holds office again." I know you know this, but I need you to hear it personally from me: **any attempt to minimize the severity of what happened on January 6, 2021 is an affront to our democracy.** But I know that change is on its way to the Lowcountry and that together we can make sure Nancy Mace’s failed leadership comes to an end. But you know who wishes we’d forget? My MAGA extremist opponent Nancy Mace. It's a stark contrast to what she said a few days after January 6th happened: "We have to hold the president accountable and ensure he never holds office again." I know you know this, but I need you to hear it personally from me: any attempt to minimize the severity of what happened on January 6, 2021 is an affront to our democracy. But I know that change is on its way to the Lowcountry and that together we can make sure Nancy Mace’s failed leadership comes to an end. clean_body: [ ]Tony Evers Derek, With the General Election now underway, President Biden has taken a very small lead over the criminally indicted disgrace known as Donald Trump – but it’s still far too close for comfort. Trump is running on the most extreme platform in American history, which includes using the military to suppress protestors, ending fair elections, rolling back abortion rights, slashing Social Security and Medicare, crushing workers rights, and more. Wisconsin is likely to be the closest state in the country, and all current and future Americans are counting on us to stop MAGA extremism before it’s too late. [ ]That’s why we need your help closing our $8,421 budget gap before our deadline tomorrow at midnight. With Wisconsin so tight, we can’t afford to miss this deadline because we need to make critical campaign investments right now. Can Tony count on you to pitch in? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. subject: Re: Sign to demand citizenship instead of cages for our immigrant neighbors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Speaking out against dangerous anti-immigrant rhetoric and policies. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWhE3KUtd-3AvUmQV2eqr7CEUMVfu5g0IlU2LDq2Y4e1J8lHjZ_bIrg0T2LPqbVsvfk157a6hmV8PeQcw34TJ45EURqGgx-fuNKU9TmKbuZAsZBwpVOXW39q4MdwljWud2Zpwxf3-7ih1TJKkLJDJ53roQa-4GC_BAcJZDblYdIlB4OrG7PG8uI6F9HzDolR3DjkoCq-LD3ar5SwB_puofoFGraMHa29TrlDl25T8ch9SHqzFoDdtCoOXJi_4naMMLu8TFQj1KzZPSnHnW4UhYhw/44p/Vd3Iv14YQJCHeUYUKWJr5w/h0/h001.VNhMwhBTIJoSZj7MQkQ_ovbu6rl586-m2-EWqdVYDxk)
---
Friend, On both sides of the aisle, our government’s leaders are demonizing migrants and asylum seekers. Last month, I joined immigrants and human rights groups in my district to speak out against hurtful anti-immigrant policies and rhetoric. In last week’s State of the Union address, President Biden used a slur to reference undocumented immigrants and again pushed for the Senate to pass a bill with far-right U.S. border policies to end asylum protections, speed up mass deportations, and lock up more refugees. That bill would spend unprecedented billions of taxpayer dollars to expand notoriously inhumane detention centers (including for-profit prisons that work with ICE) and to profile immigrant families with 24-hour “suspicionless surveillance” technology. We can’t keep using this “prisons first, humanity later” approach to immigration. Instead we need to invest in a functional immigration process that reunites families, welcomes migrants and refugees, and expands pathways to citizenship for the millions of undocumented people who already call this country home. [**Please sign to tell Congress and the White House: We need citizenship and family reunification, not detention and deportations.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HLHjcxS8SWv6yUAs25polmR9dOnEQ6Koe7KzCyuQNLpsUZ9DRDe2DY1D_G1URM0P7h36TeapRGgVmNRgBtSv4xcK0MBV9bOZes7IMwae1IjpiKgHRHFec1NFmfx1NVCPE7Zaz9uhV5UBwLM1GC1IOuj_FAAgFPp2Hx_olfoGhs7YPjviy6LJKzCKmpMbTDhU8Lf1a7Q3dMICrTJAImyda5sL8jU8CuxquDHxuwRuBxfogueIfQ6eEgnj_-QqDrGINfAebF1Tm-j2BhEnL2vttH3B51hi6O40SSQH2xcoRQJTXKIMd1EiLW6G72Qe0N48r7imROIdLxXslgqm8tjIFo8iQk8DjGGVxhJd1_XnLOUHtcbo3VG-ucBr4k0-oIbeB4T62MTg3d_y7q9K5E6QkjK145PEUowEfj4s73EF7Ovx3ueqpTceqm88UsAz4bsm/44p/Vd3Iv14YQJCHeUYUKWJr5w/h1/h001.C2drdbvLKWWoxYuLwUVJW1eh4xAAqcaoNr97_vSCaAE) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HLHjcxS8SWv6yUAs25polmR9dOnEQ6Koe7KzCyuQNLpsUZ9DRDe2DY1D_G1URM0P7h36TeapRGgVmNRgBtSv4xcK0MBV9bOZes7IMwae1IgTWt2-vMgSzXNwS8NOSy5TF20ED-25WcVcyh0fpsbz7-4Vy7F4QNdJbEx9fBMgehQH627F_1P6OcITVqkiDqRY9MKr-2aO1EL3w_Q-hApi1padvXvAz_0yRL1KfhU0tKaqgmGZu3T9W89mH0ih4NxLH4kEBGKlVwq_QcBKjsg6WTATQWMm7TeQa1Q0FZ00YZFltK0-H2vF2g-949xxH0j2ynoNtOrrPXmp66L4wtB5LaV7dC6fNWMr_aCYSDIeqlgg_iKOO6loHe04gfEArHVje0Qu8bgVEIRoiekus89GEoGFqn-eOzZja6HrH0oBduA0Eq907Ll5l6FmOLspPgQ_/44p/Vd3Iv14YQJCHeUYUKWJr5w/h2/h001.0dEAAS1Q8EfFTKuIy_qMr12YgE7o5Xz8d5odME9BmuY)
---
Our immigration system is so broken that many people are waiting 10 to 20 years to get interviews scheduled in order to unite with their family members. That’s the crisis with immigration, not the fact that people want to build a better life in the U.S.
As a local pastor reminded us at the recent gathering in my district for immigrants’ rights: "Each and every one of us is a person of sacred worth and dignity who deserves not only to survive, but to thrive."
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Mar 15, 2024
Subject: Sign to demand citizenship instead of cages for our immigrant neighbors
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
As a former immigration attorney and a daughter of immigrants, I promise to keep speaking up for immigrants’ rights. I’ve been horrified at the dangerous anti-immigrant rhetoric and policies from Democrats in Congress and the White House.
In both bodies of Congress, we’re seeing members voting for xenophobic, fear mongering bills including spending billions of our taxpayer dollars on war and on far-right U.S. border policies to end asylum protections, speed up mass deportations, and lock up more refugees.
President Biden endorsed that bipartisan Senate border bill, invited Trump to “join” him in working on it, and referenced it in last week’s State of the Union address as a priority. In that State of the Union speech, the president called undocumented immigrants “illegals,” prompting a response from human rights groups to affirm that **_No human being is illegal._**
We must decriminalize the deeply human act of migration, affirm the rights of all people, and finally create a real path to citizenship for our immigrant neighbors who’ve lived here for years. As Michigan United explains: **_“We need citizenship and family reunification, not detention and deportations.”_**
[**Add your name today to tell Democrats in the White House and Congress: Don’t pander to far-right racists on immigration. Don’t dehumanize our immigrant neighbors. In my community, thousands of U.S. citizens can’t get their spouses access to a legal pathway to citizenship because of layers of bureaucracy that leave people waiting 10 or 20 years for an interview.
I’m reaffirming the promise I made to the residents of my congressional district when they sent me to Congress: I will continue taking meaningful actions to end hateful Trump-era immigration policies, reunite families, welcome migrants and asylum seekers, and reform our outdated and inhumane immigration system.
President Biden and other Democrats also made campaign promises to reduce deportations, reunite families, protect people fleeing danger, and support the millions of undocumented people who are already living and working in our communities.
But since Trump left office, deportations have increased, and many Trump-era immigration policies have continued or expanded. This “prisons first, humanity later” approach fails our immigrant communities.
The recent Senate bill, which President Biden endorsed and again referenced in his State of the Union address as a priority, would spend an unprecedented amount of taxpayer dollars to expand notoriously inhumane detention centers—including for-profit prisons that work with ICE.
The bill would also send over a billion of our tax dollars for 24-hour “suspicionless surveillance” technology that could be used to profile and harm all immigrant families in the U.S..
Kids are still in cages, and ICE still runs hundreds of abusive jails across the country as part of the world’s largest immigration detention system. Progressives and activists have talked about the need to defund ICE, not send them more money to violate more people’s rights.

clean_body: Speaking out against dangerous anti-immigrant rhetoric and policies. | | | Friend, On both sides of the aisle, our government’s leaders are demonizing migrants and asylum seekers. Last month, I joined immigrants and human rights groups in my district to speak out against hurtful anti-immigrant policies and rhetoric. In last week’s State of the Union address, President Biden used a slur to reference undocumented immigrants and again pushed for the Senate to pass a bill with far-right U.S. border policies to end asylum protections, speed up mass deportations, and lock up more refugees. That bill would spend unprecedented billions of taxpayer dollars to expand notoriously inhumane detention centers (including for-profit prisons that work with ICE) and to profile immigrant families with 24-hour “suspicionless surveillance” technology. We can’t keep using this “prisons first, humanity later” approach to immigration. Instead we need to invest in a functional immigration process that reunites families, welcomes migrants and refugees, and expands pathways to citizenship for the millions of undocumented people who already call this country home. | Our immigration system is so broken that many people are waiting 10 to 20 years to get interviews scheduled in order to unite with their family members. That’s the crisis with immigration, not the fact that people want to build a better life in the U.S. As a local pastor reminded us at the recent gathering in my district for immigrants’ rights: "Each and every one of us is a person of sacred worth and dignity who deserves not only to survive, but to thrive." In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Mar 15, 2024 Subject: Sign to demand citizenship instead of cages for our immigrant neighbors To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, As a former immigration attorney and a daughter of immigrants, I promise to keep speaking up for immigrants’ rights. I’ve been horrified at the dangerous anti-immigrant rhetoric and policies from Democrats in Congress and the White House. In that State of the Union speech, the president called undocumented immigrants “illegals,” prompting a response from human rights groups to affirm that No human being is illegal. We must decriminalize the deeply human act of migration, affirm the rights of all people, and finally create a real path to citizenship for our immigrant neighbors who’ve lived here for years. As Michigan United explains: “We need citizenship and family reunification, not detention and deportations.” In my community, thousands of U.S. citizens can’t get their spouses access to a legal pathway to citizenship because of layers of bureaucracy that leave people waiting 10 or 20 years for an interview. I’m reaffirming the promise I made to the residents of my congressional district when they sent me to Congress: I will continue taking meaningful actions to end hateful Trump-era immigration policies, reunite families, welcome migrants and asylum seekers, and reform our outdated and inhumane immigration system. President Biden and other Democrats also made campaign promises to reduce deportations, reunite families, protect people fleeing danger, and support the millions of undocumented people who are already living and working in our communities. But since Trump left office, deportations have increased, and many Trump-era immigration policies have continued or expanded. This “prisons first, humanity later” approach fails our immigrant communities. The recent Senate bill, which President Biden endorsed and again referenced in his State of the Union address as a priority, would spend an unprecedented amount of taxpayer dollars to expand notoriously inhumane detention centers—including for-profit prisons that work with ICE. The bill would also send over a billion of our tax dollars for 24-hour “suspicionless surveillance” technology that could be used to profile and harm all immigrant families in the U.S.. Kids are still in cages, and ICE still runs hundreds of abusive jails across the country as part of the world’s largest immigration detention system. clean_body: | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | Did you see this? Once again, Trump displays problematic behavior and all of his Republican allies are silent. This is in stark contrast to the compassion and leadership displayed by our current President and all of our Kids First candidates. Children with stutters and other speech impediments are often hesitant to speak in front of their class or in social settings due to fear of bullying and harassment from peers. Trump’s antics could drive those kids further into silence. We can not elect someone with such despicable behavior to our nation’s highest office. We MUST expect more from our leaders. | | Their Future PAC is the only PAC for kids. We will not stand for bullying from any politician, especially the one seeking the Presidency. We teach our kids not to be bullies, and we teach them to speak up if we see bullying. And that’s exactly what we are doing, but we need your help. We need leaders our kids can look up to. Leaders like our endorsed candidates will give kids a voice in Washington and help all children find their voices. name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20for=20Congress=20Team?=
subject: We need a ceasefire in Gaza
body:
| | | | |
---

In Gaza, after nearly 6 months of bombing, famine, and untreated illness, over 31,000 Palestinians have been killed – including 12,500 children. At the State of the Union last week, President Biden called for an “**immediate ceasefire** ,” stressing that humanitarian assistance cannot be a bargaining chip to Israel.
**It’s understandable to feel helpless in the context of such a horrific international crisis. But action can be taken – and one such action is supporting Joseph Alfonso.**
In the race for Western Michigan, Joseph stands alone as **the sole veteran candidate** , making him uniquely qualified to address the horrors of the conflict, and advocate for a lasting peace. To underscore our dedication to a permanent ceasefire, Team Alfonso has worked tirelessly to collect **nearly 1,500 signatures to get Joseph on the ballot and fight for peace.**
**This is not a political issue for Joseph. This is about saving lives.**

| [DONATE TODAY](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=7f9b4f2f0f&e=16d812e81c)

Peter, I have some alarming news and need to share it with you right away:**Donald Trump is in Ohio today to campaign for his handpicked Senate candidate, Bernie Moreno, and we need your urgent support to fight back.**

With Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate, experts at CNN are calling my seat one of the GOP's best pickup opportunities. That's why national Republicans are going all in to defeat me.

Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs already made a record-breaking ad reservation to flood the airwaves with attack ads – and now, Trump is rallying the Republican base and his MAGA mega donors to prop up his handpicked candidate.

With everything from the Dignity of Work to reproductive rights on the line in this race, we have absolutely no room for error. **We've set a goal to raise $100,000 before Trump takes the stage so we're prepared for whatever the GOP throws at us, and I'm counting on folks like you to chip in now:**

Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs already made a record-breaking ad reservation to flood the airwaves with attack ads – and now, Trump is rallying the Republican base and his MAGA mega donors to prop up his handpicked candidate. With everything from the Dignity of Work to reproductive rights on the line in this race, we have absolutely no room for error. We've set a goal to raise $100,000 before Trump takes the stage so we're prepared for whatever the GOP throws at us, and I'm counting on folks like you to chip in now: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = Thank you for your support, Peter. = ******** ****** ****** ****** ****** ******** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. If you'd like to support Defeat Republicans, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for us to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you’d like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click here: Defeat Republicans 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE Unit 15180 Washington, DC 20003

name: Debbie (personal)
subject: the fate of our democracy is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
we deserve better
| | |
---
Friend,
My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. You might know me as a former Congresswoman from Florida, as a gun safety advocate, or as the Democrat running to defeat GOP Sen. Rick Scott and flip the Sunshine State blue.
I’m in this race because the fate of our democracy is on the line. I believe we deserve better than Rick Scott and the many other extremists in Washington.
Families like yours are at the heart of my campaign. That’s why I’m reaching out: **I want to know what’s on your mind, what keeps you up at night, and what you want Democratic leaders to focus on most.****[_So please, will you take my exclusive Democratic strategy survey before midnight tonight? Your feedback is incredibly important to me and will help shape our election year strategy._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81080412/461322824/-971336435?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk942-su-nd&refcode=jtk942-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk5OGM4MmMtYTVlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XtQ-pzmb2Qt9WD9YKIkL55A1Y4r3ZyOmFm1wixepikg=&emci=d00dab67-d8df-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=a998c82c-a5e3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**

---
For the past few years, I’ve watched a minority of extremists push my state down a path of right-wing extremism and divisiveness, all while attacking our cherished democratic institutions.
The far-right leadership in my state has banned books, created an elections police unit to scare voters, attacked LGBTQ+ youth, and left families defenseless against gun violence. In Washington, Rick Scott has pushed for a nationwide ban on abortions, an end to Social Security, and higher taxes on working families.
Unfortunately, this is a trend that’s happening across the country. **It keeps me up at night — wondering what kind of country we’ll leave behind for our children. And I know I’m not the only one.**
But if Democrats like you and me all stand together, we can defeat this dangerous extremism and leave behind a better, kinder country for our children. Families like yours are at the heart of my campaign. That’s why I’m reaching out: I want to know what’s on your mind, what keeps you up at night, and what you want Democratic leaders to focus on most. | | For the past few years, I’ve watched a minority of extremists push my state down a path of right-wing extremism and divisiveness, all while attacking our cherished democratic institutions. The far-right leadership in my state has banned books, created an elections police unit to scare voters, attacked LGBTQ+ youth, and left families defenseless against gun violence. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 3/16/2024
body:
Your daily rundown of REAL news for REAL Coloradans.
Heidi Ganahl introduces the Rocky Mountain Voice, a new conservative news media platform for Coloradans to be the VOICE of your VALUES.
| |
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| Hello, Hope those of you who it affected had a great snow day this week! Here's a breakdown of today's top stories as we head into the weekend. This is the Mountain Minute for Saturday, March 16, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
# TODAY'S TOP STORIES
---
[**No comment: In Weld County, commissioners have removed public’s opportunity to speak at meetings**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
| [ ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
A collection of [residents in Weld County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) argued, during a town hall meeting here Wednesday, they should have an opportunity to express opinions and engage with officials they elected. Recently, though, Commissioner Kevin Ross and a majority of other commissioners [removed public input](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from the Board of County Commissioner meeting agendas. It meant residents could still address the board on agenda items, but not on topics not included on the agenda. “There is no where in state or county law where it says we have to have it,” Ross said. That is true, said Jeff Roberts, executive director of the Colorado Freedom of Information Coalition. Open meetings law does not cover the subject of whether or not a board or commission must allow public comment, in most cases they just happen to, he said. **[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

[**John Fabbricatore Considering Run for CD-4 Special Election**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
BY RMV STAFF, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* John Fabbricatore, a former ICE professional with extensive experience, is considering a run for the upcoming special election in Colorado's 4th Congressional District.

* In a statement released this week, he highlights concerns about immigration enforcement under the current administration, emphasizing the urgency of addressing the border crisis for national security and community safety.

* Fabbricatore said he has recieved support from fellow Coloradans and plans to seek input from the 4th District committee regarding his potential candidacy. He plans to maintain his candidacy for CD6 against Democrat incumbent Jason Crow, ensuring continuity in both races and giving constituents ample opportunity to choose their representatives.

[**READ MORE**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[**Biden’s border in crisis: Records set with 3.2M illegal immigrants, 169 terrorism suspects**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[THE WASHINGTON TIMES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Biden administration recorded the worst year in border security history, with record numbers of illegal immigrants, terrorism suspects, and fentanyl detected, according to the Department of Homeland Security's final numbers for fiscal 2023.

* There was a notable surge at official ports of entry, with Customs and Border Protection encountering 1.1 million unauthorized migrants, double the rate from 2022. Despite efforts to manage arrivals, the overall flow of people continued to rise unabated, posing challenges to Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas' approach.

* CBP seized a record-breaking 27,000 pounds of fentanyl, nearly double last year's seizures and more than five times the rate of 2020, signaling a concerning increase in drug trafficking.

* The number of terrorism suspects detected at the southern border also rose significantly, with 169 individuals flagged in the Terrorist Screening Data Set, surpassing the combined total of the previous six years and indicating heightened security threats.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
[**Hillman: Colorado Democrats are no longer the party of free speech**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[CAPITAL REVIEW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Hillman criticizes Democrats in Colorado for abandoning their previous staunch defense of freedom of speech and expression, attributing this shift to the party's dominance in the state's political landscape.

* He also highlights the limitations on debate within the Colorado House of Representatives, where dissenting voices are stifled by Progressives who prioritize their agenda over constitutional rights. Specific examples include the passage of House Bill 1039, allowing students to dictate how they are addressed in schools, and House Bill 1071, facilitating name changes for felons transitioning gender.

* Democrats are accused of censoring opposition by forbidding the use of certain terms like "deadnaming" and "misgendering" during public hearings, illustrating a broader trend of political speech codes imposed by Progressives.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️** [**Residents want Weld County to declare it is non-sanctuary for illegal immigrants**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **BY BRIAN PORTER | LOCAL, NORTHERN COLORADO | MARCH 14** _There was a time, Weld County Sheriff Steve Reams recalls, when local law enforcement in Colorado had the capacity to better work with federal immigration officers._ **Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com)[@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
# ☘️ DID YOU KNOW?

Although everyone is expected to wear green on St. Patrick's Day, all surviving artworks of St. Patrick show him wearing **blue robes**. It's the reason why through the years, flags, sports uniforms and coat-of-arms featured the colour. As time progressed, green as a national colour grew in favour particularly in the 17th century.
| [ DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Nobody makes a greater mistake than he who does nothing because he could do only a little." - Edmond Burke

name: Hill Harper
subject: Asking for something other than your money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
This is personal to me.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1073%2E62735%2EsxGvaz)
Peter —
Something you learn quickly about running for public office: you have to spend a _lot_ of time fundraising. Every effort to reach folks across the state and talk to voters directly — whether that’s online or on the ground — costs money.
Now, this campaign is _built_ on the premise that we need to get money out of politics. So while sometimes I need to ask you for financial support to help cover the expense of our grassroots efforts — **_I want you to know that you mean so much more to this campaign than the dollar amount you contribute._**
**[That’s why today, I am asking you for something other than your dollar (and far more important to me personally). Will you take a minute of your time today to endorse my people-powered campaign for Senate?](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624/?source=em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624&t=2&akid=1073%2E62735%2EsxGvaz)**
**[SIGN ON »](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624/?source=em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624&t=3&akid=1073%2E62735%2EsxGvaz)**
I’m a single father, a card-carrying union member, a cancer survivor, and a small business owner. I know the challenges that Michiganders are facing _because I’m living through them, too._
So if you look at Congress and don’t see your interests being represented...
If you are angry, frustrated, or disappointed about the blatant lack of action on the issues you care most about...
And if you feel left behind and left out by establishment politicians...
**Please know:_I’m right there with you._ And together, we _can_ do something about it — we just need to win this critical Senate race.**
**[That’s why today, I’m asking you to add your name to our list of community endorsements. This is something you can do today that won’t cost you a cent — and will make a HUGE impact.](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624/?source=em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624&t=4&akid=1073%2E62735%2EsxGvaz)**
**[SIGN ON »](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624/?source=em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624&t=5&akid=1073%2E62735%2EsxGvaz)**
Something’s got to change in Washington, and I am grateful I’ve got you by my side as we fight for the future of our great state of Michigan.
Thank you,
Hill
[](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624/?source=em_HHR_PET_PersonalEndorsement_031624&t=6&akid=1073%2E62735%2EsxGvaz)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=7&refcode2=1073_62735_sxGvaz&akid=1073%2E62735%2EsxGvaz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=1073%2E62735%2EsxGvaz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=1073%2E62735%2EsxGvaz)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)

Something’s got to change in Washington, and I am grateful I’ve got you by my side as we fight for the future of our great state of Michigan. Thank you, Hill

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: We are throwing out the rulebook this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This is the boldest campaign in Missouri history. Will you let me explain?
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I wanted to take some time this morning to tell you a little more about the campaign we’re building to defeat Josh Hawley here in Missouri — and why it’s already the boldest grassroots movement our state has ever seen.
**So before I ask you to[chip in any amount toward our goal of raising 2,500 individual donations before midnight tonight,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44606?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-) will you please let me explain?**
**[ADD A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44606?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-)**
For decades, lying politicians have let massive corporations strip our communities for parts — and Missouri has had a front row seat.
I can’t accept a status quo where politicians who take massive donations from Big Ag tell us it’s normal for billionaires in China and Brazil to buy up our farmland and put hard-working family farmers out of business. And I won’t stand for another twenty years of members of Congress who’ve never worn a uniform sacrificing American lives and tax dollars on forever wars, while refusing to invest into the everyday people who make our country strong.
Out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country.
They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own their careers. And they’ll even raise their fist to look strong before they start running from threats to our democracy.
**We don’t need any more frauds in Congress.** That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. It’s why I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs. **[And it’s why today, I’m asking you to make your first donation of $10 or whatever you think is best toward our goal of raising 2,500 individual donations before midnight tonight. Can I count on you to help us hit our goal, defeat Josh Hawley, and take this seat back for working people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44606?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44607?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44607?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44607?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44607?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44607?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44607?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44606?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-)
---
Our mission of taking power back for everyday people has earned our movement national media attention. And our commitment to running this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, has given us the ability to run the boldest campaign in Missouri history — taking on corrupt political elites like Hawley without hesitation about some mega-donor being upset.
More than just fighting to codify protections for abortion access — **I’m running to end the filibuster so we can actually get it done.**
More than just banning insider trading among members of Congress and their families — **I’m running to put them in jail if they steal from us.**
More than just breaking up Big Pharma — **I’m running to prosecute the insulin cartels who are killing people.**
And more than just rejecting corporate PAC money — **I’m running to abolish corporate PACs altogether.**
This campaign is powered by the people because that’s exactly who I’ll work for in the U.S. Senate — I'll be accountable to real, everyday Americans, not some corporate executive or political machine. We’re throwing out their rulebook and building a grassroots movement to fundamentally change who has power in our country. **And I want you to join our team:**
**[So if you’re ready to help us take back power for everyday people in Missouri and across the country, please add a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can toward our goal today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44606?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-)**
**[ADD A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44606?refcode=em20240316-5062&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-)**
For too long, our country’s corrupt politicians have bought their way into power and maintained a broken status quo. That cycle stops with our movement.
Thanks for being part of it,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240316-5062-footer&t=13&refcode2=5062_614464_nP0Uo-&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-)**
---

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=5062%2E614464%2EnP0Uo-). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: John Kennedy
subject: Porcupine at a nudist colony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
It's no secret that "Bideonomics" has failed to deliver on its promises.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cb5435bbdc5f4f45ad25c6e2f42baa4f&_e=horx3hVsDonIhYX9FoTBcZlLWdhJGKd55sgnwjF-5-4Vm7vDW00waXgFOGRMEbLOfygKS0kao5Jvx50bCdYnbhJKn7jh0-3eOjeJ-sLIWGjAhgbOOKLh9LAw31Quig0cGUm5pm26Vd98i_3JwIAQxlkFFTbRNVwcVasVg-d2guRCu2i3MvR5X4Tm4G4MS1HujZL2382ifV0T6aZmfwF_ndbZ9TczSLXcZ8faq3O6yaokDEhwj5KEqMFDzuqadwSfh00ReopP-Wh2Xr4kXRAY5CQSHLSemAjA7Aa1wUYJ6bZUgpwuSd6bZEwbattay_Car0kMEaCpAoxaJZcXwjRHkgIHqnqWWZJDbRGHCvWki7HqCevC6mjHrBxMKAfoFeu_bBHc_udO2nriMyBYupEgfQ%3D%3D)
---
Folks,

**"Bideonomics" is as welcome as a porcupine at a nudist colony.**

It’s not helping Americans, and anyone who tells you it is obviously a failed history class.

We don't need to be economists to see through that claim.

**_Biden and his administration know more ways to take your hard-earned money than a room full of lawyers._**
| [**STOP BIDENOMICS**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cb5435bbdc5f4f45ad25c6e2f42baa4f&_e=horx3hVsDonIhYX9FoTBcZlLWdhJGKd55sgnwjF-5-4Vm7vDW00waXgFOGRMEbLOfygKS0kao5Jvx50bCdYnbhJKn7jh0-3eOjeJ-sLIWGjAhgbOOKLh9LAw31Quig0cGUm5pm26Vd98i_3JwIAQxlkFFTbRNVwcVasVg-d2guRCu2i3MvR5X4Tm4G4MS1HujZL2382ifV0T6aZmfwF_nZqTRr7zy83vjIYWlxetJRGmchXZ02yv5zhqBevZR3G59Xt-0Iex0XksY8lqG56WiRtjEtH6L7yAON0RKwz5tGcnjIFW2u-UEY_WMAWaIhQWVGKhY1vPO5vSjdOx3DSMxwT6FZwIzhDyBV4o5gwapYaI4xkGU9mtWSrqN0h9rxf8VIPtEcND_HLKLfnMXxgK4w%3D%3D)
---

The impact of Bidenflation alone is staggering, **costing Louisiana families an additional average of $9,912 a year.**

We find ourselves in a vice-grip squeeze, with **monthly mortgages soaring by over 59.2%,** making homeownership an elusive dream for many first-time buyers.
[**STOP BIDENOMICS**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=cb5435bbdc5f4f45ad25c6e2f42baa4f&_e=horx3hVsDonIhYX9FoTBcZlLWdhJGKd55sgnwjF-5-4Vm7vDW00waXgFOGRMEbLOfygKS0kao5Jvx50bCdYnbhJKn7jh0-3eOjeJ-sLIWGjAhgbOOKLh9LAw31Quig0cGUm5pm26Vd98i_3JwIAQxlkFFTbRNVwcVasVg-d2guRCu2i3MvR5X4Tm4G4MS1HujZL2382ifV0T6aZmfwF_ndbZ9TczSLXcZ8faq3O6yaokDEhwj5KEqMFDzuqadwSfYyaM7IVTUrHqqzaUqSg65DXaPd3QVAZR9mHYSVDrL2Sdsl8oKuSPCKkFDEnrHgx9KOmEBB1wfH2ag8zjW4FtNdm0GEYB6F8_qtVfMBEcbE_PMouXK9VKBfvbVm1eRxUGK65NYMEm42Ct8iYCJCLddg%3D%3D)

body:
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#
Derek -
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Derek.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful election ads out there and flipped races for Democrats.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It defeated Trump, took back the Senate, and held the line in the House. It forced Tommy Tuberville to back down. Right now, it’s helping us support Ukraine. And if we keep it up, it will help us win in November.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with this election escalating every day and with Trump ready to tear the Constitution we swore to protect to shreds, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important election cycle in modern American history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective election ads of the cycle, ads that win races seems worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make that donation before our deadline at midnight. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar24.wfDmiq&refcode=em240316-2-30&t=1&akid=24981%2E3013755%2EjPzi4t)

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: Not the news we were hoping to share...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We fell short
#

We hate to bother you with bad news on a Saturday, but we needed to update you on where we stand: We fell short of our mid-month goal.
To be honest, this has us worried.
We set some of our highest goals **ever** this month because we need to finish out the first quarter of the election year strong. Gabby and all of us here at GIFFORDS PAC know that our movement to end gun violence is stronger than ever. Now, it’s up to us to raise the resources to prove our strength to our gun lobby adversaries.
That’s why we’ve set a new goal to raise **$10,000** by the end of the day today to help us reach the goal we missed last night.
[**Can we count on you to rush in a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC? Your support right now would make a HUGE difference.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240316-1-30&t=1&akid=7772%2E3935704%2EyNvlhv)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Republicans hold a razor thin majority in the U.S. House, but those few Republicans are standing in the way of so much progress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
Democrat Will Rollins needs our support.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=38789%2E3422442%2EDAn2rm)
_Hey, this is Katie Porter! While we came up short in California’s Senate primary, I’m not giving up our fight. I hope you’ll take a moment to read the below note about Will Rollins, a Democrat running to flip a red seat here in California, and**[consider supporting him and Truth to Power](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240316-rollins?refcode=em20240316-38789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38789_3422442_DAn2rm&akid=38789%2E3422442%2EDAn2rm)** , the organization I founded to help elect Democrats who reject corporate PAC money._
* * *
Derek, Democrat Will Rollins is running in CA-41, a district that includes Palm Springs and other parts of Riverside County. He ran in 2022 and got *so* close to flipping this district. Now he needs our help to get across the finish line.
I know he’ll be a real champion for working people in Congress. **As a former federal prosecutor who focused on counterterrorism and counterintelligence, he helped prosecute some of the insurrectionists who attacked the Capitol on January 6th**. Now he’s running for Congress to fight back against corruption in Washington and deliver for working families.
Derek, Republicans hold a razor thin majority in the U.S. House, but those few Republicans are standing in the way of so much progress. We must flip the House blue in November, and I’m not full of BS when I tell you this seat is one of our best targets. **Is there anything you can give today to help send Will Rollins to Congress?** Your donation will be split between his campaign and my organization, Truth to Power.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240316-rollins?refcode=em20240316-38789&refcode2=38789_3422442_DAn2rm&akid=38789%2E3422442%2EDAn2rm)
Thanks for considering,
Katie Porter

**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em&t=2&refcode2=38789_3422442_DAn2rm&akid=38789%2E3422442%2EDAn2rm)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=38789%2E3422442%2EDAn2rm).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

| | | Folks, some folks think that the race for Montana’s Senate seat is “personal” to national Republicans—**but it’s more personal for me.**

Most politicians know diddly squat about the challenges facing rural America. But I do, because I’ve lived them.

I’ll keep fighting for the issues Montanans care about until I drop, but this is my toughest fight yet and I can’t do it without your help.

**[I hate asking for your hard-earned money, but if you can throw a couple bucks toward my reelection campaign, I’d really appreciate it. Your donation will be split between my campaign and the DSCC to help us defeat our opponents.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240316-JonTester-TesterDiddlySquatTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240316-JonTester-TesterDiddlySquatTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=13928%2E9716520%2ESlnF5p)**

name: John Rich
subject: I’m not emailing you about my music
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?"

My buddy Kirk Cameron did some research and discovered a shocking truth about the culprit putting disgusting materials in school libraries.

It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help).
It's not even school boards.
It's Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows, Huckleberry Finn, and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7-o5yB9QoTrLmiJUVeWdJQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2FmiP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWpvaG5fcmljaCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cGEmdXRtX3RjPVVDTjItMjAyNDAzMTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9c3RfaGVsbF9pbWFnZTFXA3NwY0IKZe_MvvVlS1S8S1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SGorFHfzair1wjq_ogFXeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2FmiP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWpvaG5fcmljaCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cGEmdXRtX3RjPVVDTjItMjAyNDAzMTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9c3RfaGVsbF9pbWFnZTJXA3NwY0IKZe_MvvVlS1S8S1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

I joined Kirk Cameron recently in Nashville to promote wholesome and age-appropriate book fairs for kids. It's called SkyTree Book Fairs, and Kirk helped jumpstart this amazing organization.

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/g8yFxx8PDEIhZ6Z0ZfoMEQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRn2FmiP0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWpvaG5fcmljaCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cGEmdXRtX3RjPVVDTjItMjAyNDAzMTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dGV4dF9saW5rMVcDc3BjQgpl78y-9WVLVLxLUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

clean_body: Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Friend, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?" My buddy Kirk Cameron did some research and discovered a shocking truth about the culprit putting disgusting materials in school libraries. It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help). It's not even school boards. It's Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows, Huckleberry Finn, and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. ~ I joined Kirk Cameron recently in Nashville to promote wholesome and age-appropriate book fairs for kids. It's called SkyTree Book Fairs, and Kirk helped jumpstart this amazing organization. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~ ~ SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families.
