Our state boasts some of the nation’s very best public school teachers — and they’re educating the kids who will shape North Carolina’s future. But Republican legislators have prevented us from investing in public school funding so that we can pay our teachers what they deserve.
Instead, Republicans in the legislature are diverting $4 billion from our public schools to prop up an unaccountable voucher program.
Peter, Roy is personally committed to ensuring that our teachers and students have the resources they deserve. **That’s why he recently declared 2024 the year of public education in NC.**
**[Do you share Roy’s commitment to our public schools? Let him know if you agree with increasing funding by answering our one-question poll now>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81088331/461339467/2145845267?refcode=ea.a1ef0a4b-ace3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.a1ef0a4b-ace3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWVmMGE0Yi1hY2UzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ZYSGKM1EACTepHMIFIJKCceiBtg9XLjqLNDiV2qqGw=&emci=1145e561-03e3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=a1ef0a4b-ace3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=1049176)**

Friend, I received some HUGE news recently! A new set of polls has me with a huge lead over the Trump-impeaching “conservatives” challenging me in the Republican primary. And I just received President Trump’s complete and total endorsement. I’ve said it once, and I’ll say it again: From the very beginning, my campaign was about winning in November, and that’s how we’ve built this entire operation. **[We cannot take our eyes off of winning in November — the general polls are showing that this will be a *tight* race. ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=737017b2d84f40a8aaa88b45b465fe6d&_e=RZGqK1zlPj6R3g3W2lekz4u4OK_lpnkj_1TbyRRCPhDKzkZFMy3gvbJBdcARmW81GXPgeAQBPfMiLjT58bSxG7oKChcqiM8HZJ0vgiphwAiegF6O6QiPqpJqameVvRMV_0uGJvTGktsubwXQ8fC1FgYukvR6xhrUZdVPMsiIWJNjnDeTpc5Z8VVBctnuq8ug4dhfKk6xg4k6bcBWpS87zTvycgIiS9MmlkgL3GSGutF3yYkyP35f5Zdy5mrwRNMnktZwJIHVZxQqY370Kxcmjz6bKSBVPnc3mKL__LoJ08l8xQcQXJrXr4hDXNM-w8NFJ-26fd_SBoBAlA0LxFBrfBqY2QylpqCRG0IDzbl-7w_tGNhi4wHdT2yjoYCZ3n8BwtIxlF-UMzOm7NdRFy2WSegZcxgdJB1t1uEq-2PwrbFfhqVdpEQ_vjEE0SbpvkaFBqg1AHfYhV35RbaGef-eKg%3D%3D)** Biden-enabling liberal Elissa Slotkin and I are neck-and-neck in just about every poll.

**_[Friend, there’s a long road ahead, but the momentum is on our side. ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=737017b2d84f40a8aaa88b45b465fe6d&_e=RZGqK1zlPj6R3g3W2lekz4u4OK_lpnkj_1TbyRRCPhDKzkZFMy3gvbJBdcARmW81GXPgeAQBPfMiLjT58bSxG7oKChcqiM8HZJ0vgiphwAiegF6O6QiPqpJqameVvRMV_0uGJvTGktsubwXQ8fC1FgYukvR6xhrUZdVPMsiIWJNjnDeTpc5Z8VVBctnuq8ug4dhfKk6xg4k6bcBWpS87zTvycgIiS9MmlkgL3GSGutF3yYkyP35f5Zdy5mrwRNMnktZwJIHVZxQqY370Kxcmjz6bKSBVPnc3mKL__LoJ08l8xQcQXJrXr4hDXNM-w8NFldKiWePb7aNDzhzTLOCculYRLT9WaHETxgKsuB5CQtMxc8BuxeEmaG3kk_xt6-ZWuTmZEly59Ehro3hXVp7w-Dtt6H32c-mekHF_mfVvilU2XHf9WwWr9BsVqBYc0WrvlppFZZE9kb__5V-T3jK12w%3D%3D)_** We’ve got to keep it up. **[**Would you consider chipping in anything at all today to help me defeat Slotkin in November and reclaim the Senate for Republicans?**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=737017b2d84f40a8aaa88b45b465fe6d&_e=RZGqK1zlPj6R3g3W2lekz4u4OK_lpnkj_1TbyRRCPhDKzkZFMy3gvbJBdcARmW81GXPgeAQBPfMiLjT58bSxG7oKChcqiM8HZJ0vgiphwAiegF6O6QiPqpJqameVvRMV_0uGJvTGktsubwXQ8fC1FgYukvR6xhrUZdVPMsiIWJNjnDeTpc5Z8VVBctnuq8ug4dhfKk6xg4k6bcBWpS87zTvycgIiS9MmlkgL3GSGutF3yYkyP35f5Zdy5mrwRNMnktZwJIHVZxQqY370Kxcmjz6bKSBVPnc3mKL__LoJ08l8xQcQXJrXr4hDXNM-w8NFhweoXC3Qi6yzKdKZze-Ks1JEjBk1DuRHzhpAnql3Pw6XDcTJgKUWSXs9uLqmSXhJt52YsElaTOwsUJ1LLVeJBm2SbJv7AAXLHyhtGUsXSoQvKaPE8_l-MbcaFB0hWpdQmzqCNVXpJs4fVPoMYS7YaQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your continued support, Mike Rogers

| | _**“Should I continue sending my child to a public school where they’re falling behind or send them to the only other school around here: a Catholic school?”**_
---
Peter, that’s one of the most challenging questions and decisions some parents face.

**In some areas, parents have only two options:**
** Option 1:** Continue with the current school where the child fails to learn
** Option 2:** Take a chance on a better education at a Catholic school

[ _**What option would you choose if YOU were in this situation?**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bcac90694524b499d2cbf0b1b2c7c31&_e=GC9_ZbZfzvCwHy9IndFbaVQtCDK0zU_ZiMX2tlB6UVQmlk_Dp312GNO0-6W0U7_HVSJP5VcRL5HzrFYknjx39JSZG4DAkAjrdr7E7M6vD1G_x3K_VGCmKgjpkpKW9ahlT73FqJ1G-ExpbdBowoacLR55IA-2IgR1DB0lg2HphFVuZ5PDkCVRrlkIPzjWVqCfBlQNkNsfXRZ7MChMXrbTPctRy0iWA27Z3udt_WIeZDdT3NRiSTKJqom6XIA__omS2Go4oTsbL6NvMzVzpJHhXBmfDhVxekNzttYUyZoPghdpvirydKCBwv3IuIOyv-PBKmSuek6OG-grVxMU0xfaQ4hsedaUgTUGpMOXUXGfgPqf9XvrfxYxl7oVRdYcIbawXfW0cIqqtNz-5l4-cFYmaabUEGLd67CsLIbqJMUOX0v_MDM2IHyQ1ApZQMoAPvvmSrG6W9LWPyG9duWr4VcNyOETx5vGRwQT-mQT7hYez6ybzU_2XRCBstgTMgki0pmp)

[**TAKE THE 2024 CATHOLIC SCHOOL SURVEY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bcac90694524b499d2cbf0b1b2c7c31&_e=GC9_ZbZfzvCwHy9IndFbaVQtCDK0zU_ZiMX2tlB6UVQmlk_Dp312GNO0-6W0U7_HVSJP5VcRL5HzrFYknjx39JSZG4DAkAjrdr7E7M6vD1G_x3K_VGCmKgjpkpKW9ahlT73FqJ1G-ExpbdBowoacLR55IA-2IgR1DB0lg2HphFVuZ5PDkCVRrlkIPzjWVqCfBlQNkNsfXRZ7MChMXrbTPctRy0iWA27Z3udt_WIeZDdT3NRiSTKJqom6XIA__omS2Go4oTsbL6NvMzVzpJHhXBmfDhVxekNzttYUyZoPghdpvirydKCBwv3IuIOyv-PBKmSuek6OG-grVxMU0xfaQ5Rfm9rbQSP1vLUmermpef4W6GlOFIBbK1eJWUooAQRMmsiKb9Ls5TJD7D4LpEOL66YuFoQciqA8tqysx7bBPC34rh2aSCxidpr-_Y7WGDOHD6lOXb4NtbEPUZjC9Lq94kRoQtRWlJFPteX_9Exoacv4YqNeQmlqEmzucvYQXg_S)
---
Peter, Catholic school is the ONLY option for some families. Children deserve to attend the school that best suits their needs. [_**I AGREE >>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bcac90694524b499d2cbf0b1b2c7c31&_e=GC9_ZbZfzvCwHy9IndFbaVQtCDK0zU_ZiMX2tlB6UVQmlk_Dp312GNO0-6W0U7_HVSJP5VcRL5HzrFYknjx39JSZG4DAkAjrdr7E7M6vD1G_x3K_VGCmKgjpkpKW9ahlT73FqJ1G-ExpbdBowoacLR55IA-2IgR1DB0lg2HphFVuZ5PDkCVRrlkIPzjWVqCfBlQNkNsfXRZ7MChMXrbTPctRy0iWA27Z3udt_WIeZDdT3NRiSTKJqom6XIA__omS2Go4oTsbL6NvMzVzpJHhXBmfDhVxekNzttYUyZoPghdpvirydKCBwv3IuIOyv-PBKmSuek6OG-grVxMU0xfaQ6GBgW0d-0QMbn2H2KHA--8hJCXbZD4wXt_KezVSeyTkvnFhm3IhyfU_6HcwyH1ER8_aphIp1C_KbX40iFmtNnrDGNfCZGErZRJszUWgSE0i2EubIF9Fp5kdE8vCnoxoyqP_LTzK-Gqd2rOuBR8Z5GAwyhx8zIjea04FjnxTTCyC)

**But right now, 1.6 million Catholic school students are facing a grave threat:**_the school system they love is under threat of extinction because we don't allow their parents to spend their education tax dollars on their child's school. _
---
[**SAVE CATHOLIC SCHOOLS: TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bcac90694524b499d2cbf0b1b2c7c31&_e=GC9_ZbZfzvCwHy9IndFbaVQtCDK0zU_ZiMX2tlB6UVQmlk_Dp312GNO0-6W0U7_HVSJP5VcRL5HzrFYknjx39JSZG4DAkAjrdr7E7M6vD1G_x3K_VGCmKgjpkpKW9ahlT73FqJ1G-ExpbdBowoacLR55IA-2IgR1DB0lg2HphFVuZ5PDkCVRrlkIPzjWVqCfBlQNkNsfXRZ7MChMXrbTPctRy0iWA27Z3udt_WIeZDdT3NRiSTKJqom6XIA__omS2Go4oTsbL6NvMzVzpJHhXBmfDhVxekNzttYUyZoPghdpvirydKCBwv3IuIOyv-PBKmSuek6OG-grVxMU0xfaQxrJUvQUjnNCYtOzdpXx-JA4mh82oWJcskfC_Cug0Bd01hpRKF6xJdGytQz7ZEUtL2yjMyqH4PF6Y8ZqfA88hbc3QsrTAgofY7c5UbfWYbavbyhl3OPUdkXbfHM-9JlBuP08flCuXgZPcv9AcrJ_tzRllJCJsF-rAcotGREH4OS-)
---
The **American Federation for Children Growth Fund** knows the importance of fighting to ensure EVERY child in EVERY state has access to the BEST education possible, whether that's a Catholic school or another type of school.

[**You can help us ensure families have every education option on the table by taking the 2024 Catholic School Survey.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9bcac90694524b499d2cbf0b1b2c7c31&_e=GC9_ZbZfzvCwHy9IndFbaVQtCDK0zU_ZiMX2tlB6UVQmlk_Dp312GNO0-6W0U7_HVSJP5VcRL5HzrFYknjx39JSZG4DAkAjrdr7E7M6vD1G_x3K_VGCmKgjpkpKW9ahlT73FqJ1G-ExpbdBowoacLR55IA-2IgR1DB0lg2HphFVuZ5PDkCVRrlkIPzjWVqCfBlQNkNsfXRZ7MChMXrbTPctRy0iWA27Z3udt_WIeZDdT3NRiSTKJqom6XIA__omS2Go4oTsbL6NvMzVzpJHhXBmfDhVxekNzttYUyZoPghdpvirydKCBwv3IuIOyv-PBKmSuek6OG-grVxMU0xfaQzlSNkdzMlKegk6ybd38lhSpfgi4q2r4QE_KHf6P5tj5o_W-TycoMGWFSoZYmte9MmR-OF03wmYOsxRvJ2d-IUK4HmjhDo2QDEmhUVfZuYrHKaMm83K9Fe4XFgoC4t5sBa6OVeqENGbwOKXBTe4i2wmQGEzpt-Is8ibGScDwBGF0)

Under Donald Trump’s direction, ultra-MAGA Republicans have embraced fringe conspiracy theories about the integrity of our elections and put our election officials in harm's way. **Even Hillary Clinton is calling out these attacks:** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81090002/461343254/38783913?refcode=em-3.16.24-all_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTA3NmQ0MC1hZWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03SxafpnyTZqLJuRuL8H5nayBv91rTZAQsggq1v5s5A=) Despite our historic 2022 wins electing Democratic Secretaries of State, these threats to our democracy are still very much alive. Anti-democracy elected officials are pushing voter suppression legislation, continue to spread falsehoods about the last election, and are already laying the groundwork to undermine the next one. **Here’s the truth:** our fight to defend democracy is just getting started, and these attacks are going to keep coming. That’s why it’s critical we have grassroots Democrats like you, friend, on our team. Even Hillary Clinton is calling out these attacks: = Despite our historic 2022 wins electing Democratic Secretaries of State, these threats to our democracy are still very much alive. Anti-democracy elected officials are pushing voter suppression legislation, continue to spread falsehoods about the last election, and are already laying the groundwork to undermine the next one. Here’s the truth: our fight to defend democracy is just getting started, and these attacks are going to keep coming. That’s why it’s critical we have grassroots Democrats like you, friend, on our team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS) | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

Friend, I have some alarming news and need to share it with you right away:**Donald Trump is in Ohio today to campaign for his handpicked Senate candidate, Bernie Moreno, and we need your urgent support to fight back.**
With Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate, experts at _CNN_ are calling my seat one of the GOP's best pickup opportunities. That's why national Republicans are going all in to defeat me.

Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs already made a record-breaking ad reservation to flood the airwaves with attack ads – and now, Trump is rallying the Republican base and his MAGA megadonors to prop up his handpicked candidate.
With everything from the Dignity of Work to reproductive rights on the line in this race, we have absolutely no room for error. **We've set a goal to raise $100,000 before Trump takes the stage so we're prepared for whatever the GOP throws at us, and I'm counting on folks like you to chip in now:**

name: Team Avlon
subject: “We need to win this seat, and uniting behind John Avlon is how we get there.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,

Don’t just take it from us. Momentum is growing every day. We’re proud to announce that former Congressional candidate in NY-1, Bridget Fleming, has endorsed John!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/111890/images/BF500.png]

And Bridget’s endorsement is the latest of many. Former congressional candidates Perry Gershon and Jim Gaughran, as well as Assembly Member Fred Thiele and Southampton Town Supervisor Jay Schneiderman have also announced their support for Team Avlon.

It’s clear: John Avlon is the best candidate to build a broad coalition to take on Nick LaLota this fall – and win.

As former Deputy Suffolk County Executive Jason Elan put it, “John Avlon clearly has the momentum in a race Suffolk Democrats can’t afford to lose. I think a fresh face in Suffolk County is not a bad thing for the Democrats.”

It’s time to come together and take the fight to Trump’s MAGA minions. That means holding them to account for their repeated assaults on women’s reproductive freedoms – like a national abortion ban. It means reminding voters that the MAGA chaos machine torpedoed a bipartisan border security bill that conservatives wanted. And it means presenting a common sense set of solutions to actually help Suffolk County families and strengthen the middle class – like bringing back the Child Tax Credit and state and local tax deductions.

That’s how you build a winning coalition. Our best chance this fall is to take Trump flunky Nick LaLota (or George Santos) head on. To do that, it’s going to take all of us.
We know we can win this fight. But we can’t do it alone. This movement is powered by people like you pitching in one donation at a time to make sure we win this seat and Democrats take back the House. Are you with John Avlon? Pitch in today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-em?refcode=em0316]

Donate $10 today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-em?refcode=em0316c&amount=10]
Donate $25 today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-em?refcode=em0316c&amount=25]
Donate $50 today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-em?refcode=em0316c&amount=50]
Donate $100 today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-em?refcode=em0316c&amount=100]

Let’s keep the momentum going!
-Team Avlon

PS: We’ll be sending you regular updates from the campaign team – please make sure to mark this email as important and whitelist info@johnavlon.com [info@johnavlon.com] so you don’t miss any updates! You can always reply to this email with questions or feedback.

PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
John Avlon for Congress
PO Box 1200
Sag Harbor, NY 11963
United States

In fact, he welcomes them into his home with open arms._**

In case you missed it, Trump recently hosted Hungarian prime minister Viktor Orbán at his Mar-a-Lago estate, praising Orbán as a “strong man.”

**Let’s be clear: there’s nothing strong about destroying democracy. Yet, Trump is obsessed with undoing our progress as democratic leaders around the globe. This election is bigger than us. It’s also about our allies abroad.**

**President Joe Biden is the strong leader we need right now.** In a recent rally, President Biden had this reality check for voters: _“You know who [Trump’s] meeting with today, down in Mar-a-Lago? Orbán of Hungary, who stated flatly he doesn’t think democracy works – he’s looking for dictatorship. That’s who he’s meeting with. I see a future where we defend democracy, not diminish it."_

[_**Donald Trump MUST be stopped RIGHT NOW. clean_body: at Mar-a-Lago | | | = Donald Trump loves dictators. In fact, he welcomes them into his home with open arms. In case you missed it, Trump recently hosted Hungarian prime minister Viktor Orbán at his Mar-a-Lago estate, praising Orbán as a “strong man.” Let’s be clear: there’s nothing strong about destroying democracy. Yet, Trump is obsessed with undoing our progress as democratic leaders around the globe. This election is bigger than us. It’s also about our allies abroad. President Joe Biden is the strong leader we need right now. In a recent rally, President Biden had this reality check for voters: “You know who [Trump’s] meeting with today, down in Mar-a-Lago? Orbán of Hungary, who stated flatly he doesn’t think democracy works – he’s looking for dictatorship. That’s who he’s meeting with. I see a future where we defend democracy, not diminish it." = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let’s keep defending democracy, together. One with consequences too.| | | [](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=f5aeff161cc445cb9472a7545a509b8a&_e=h3iuIkZykpQtmfjafaoGHneSdYsXI1Qz28eLfYdTXZGzHz6IAcU7ccoWTqoGPHRnb9kdCbPnLGI44E52n7k6dRaO-ZjxMqt_5aj2P7_eOtakwXeOu6TN6i7zmh_PmKquATx7T3-K96CI6eP6cb62FVfSKrjFzaDbxxUk4RgyHIqCZ_Sbgq0gKENbXul7ADD8P-e_U2SEC8lh7MDI2yaVX0bA4gIR74WAoC1ckv0RLmqNKr0kW0tQp8gSfrVnytrxyg-ozh53_n-kbYkWSvdHTmEyNyr_p_03C1du3i9Wj2DSJgK-T0mxSM_MxAINKETU263p3wQ9DY4hE9S6J_AYAyNpU0rS1UZ-IUgsZuApOno%3D)

Peter, I’ll cut right to the chase - **[**I need every patriot to chip in just $5 to help us win in Florida.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=f5aeff161cc445cb9472a7545a509b8a&_e=h3iuIkZykpQtmfjafaoGHneSdYsXI1Qz28eLfYdTXZGzHz6IAcU7ccoWTqoGPHRnb9kdCbPnLGI44E52n7k6dRaO-ZjxMqt_5aj2P7_eOtakwXeOu6TN6i7zmh_PmKquATx7T3-K96CI6eP6cb62FVfSKrjFzaDbxxUk4RgyHIqCZ_Sbgq0gKENbXul7ADD8P-e_U2SEC8lh7MDI2yaVX5-VOqN92DmSI2S8IkM5UHPYf0LDGrJ59ZHcAwj4ceo-iB4mjZQLwUUAp8Rr0x5qMMQGPgS-EMgBGG9_4In8PsKuLrFsmqJefJQisbhTRT1wcx3L0p2iOtIOrSJLu_IEGJYJM9-ypRrJ49FmHosYnQY%3D)** But first, I want to give you five reasons why we need your urgent help. **1\. Florida Senate elections are some of the closest in the country.** Last election, I won by less than 1% of the vote - and this year could be even closer. **2\. We need real America-First conservatives.** I’ll never betray conservatives by caving to the Democrats and making backdoor deals with Chuck Schumer like Mitch McConnell has continued to do. **3\. Right now, our Democrat opponent is outraising us.** She is building a massive war chest to spread lies. **4\. Elections are expensive, especially in a state like Florida.** We must reach MILLIONS of voters and crisscross our state if we’re going to get our conservative message out. **5\. President Trump needs leaders he can count on in the Senate.** I’ve been his most loyal defender in the US Senate, and I’m not backing down anytime soon. This Senate race truly is make or break, and it will take everything we have to win.

**[**So, will you pitch in $5 now to help us take back our country?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=f5aeff161cc445cb9472a7545a509b8a&_e=h3iuIkZykpQtmfjafaoGHneSdYsXI1Qz28eLfYdTXZGzHz6IAcU7ccoWTqoGPHRnb9kdCbPnLGI44E52n7k6dRaO-ZjxMqt_5aj2P7_eOtakwXeOu6TN6i7zmh_PmKquATx7T3-K96CI6eP6cb62FVfSKrjFzaDbxxUk4RgyHIqCZ_Sbgq0gKENbXul7ADD8P-e_U2SEC8lh7MDI2yaVXzDa3AjDzKMfZ6TLkFLhi9ihxqyY8cUCPbQpttdZ6BDaFHK_LtwrUOvWkglZmNuFxllya2F0yDBQR0G_d1im7kkXqq9Uoxl5qJejYTonZvvOY8cLYGvBNIsl48dA2mr2VSkb6G5iC43lSNIuYSuZR-I%3D)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Hands off Medicare and Social Security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| My celebrity GOP opponent Steve Garvey has lined up beside Donald Trump in threatening the health and retirement security of millions.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5999%2E5257348%2Ee3GWOv)
Derek —
My celebrity GOP opponent Steve Garvey has lined up beside Donald Trump in threatening the health and retirement security of millions. **He announced his intent to cut Medicare and Social Security and give wealthy GOP mega-donors _another_ tax break.**
Steve Garvey's views appear to fall right in line with proposals like MAGA Senator Rick Scott’s plan to sunset ALL federal legislation every 5 years and destroy Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security as we know it (a policy so toxic, even _Mitch McConnell_ refused to go near it).
**In the State of the Union, President Biden vowed to stop _any_ effort to cut Social Security or Medicare or raise the retirement age. I stand with him. No Republican mega-donor should pay a lower effective tax rate than a firefighter or a schoolteacher.**
**[President Biden needs to win re-election with a Democratic Senate majority to protect these programs — rush in $10 to help me fight back against Steve Garvey and Donald Trump’s efforts to cut Social Security and Medicare, and stand with Joe Biden to defend them.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=5999%2E5257348%2Ee3GWOv)**

Derek, here’s how bad the GOP in Congress really is: **_Mississippi Republicans_** want to advance a bill to their governor’s desk that would _expand_ Medicaid** — _finally_ — and utilize the provision put in place under President Obama that helps keep our health care system running. But Republicans in Congress want to stop them.
The GOP spent fifteen fruitless years trying to sabotage and undermine President Barack Obama and then-Vice President Joe Biden’s _Affordable Care Act_.
Despite hundreds of attempts to repeal it and _multiple_ Supreme Court challenges, Obamacare remains the **only** lifeline for countless communities suffering from rural hospital closures, skyrocketing maternal and infant mortality rates, and health care workers who aren’t earning enough to get by.
**In California, we’re experiencing crises of homelessness and mental health** — issues that would only get worse if Steve Garvey and Republicans are able to cut the Social Security checks seniors rely on to keep their housing, and the Medicare and Medicaid mental health services that people need.
**[We need to protect Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security this November. Chip in $10 now to our fight to help defeat Steve Garvey, Donald Trump, and win this race for the United States Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=11&akid=5999%2E5257348%2Ee3GWOv)**
Thanks for all that you do.
— Adam

| | Our grassroots movement is gearing up for November, and we need your support. **My team is setting a goal today to grow our grassroots movement by 150 new donors before Monday.** If Speaker Mike Johnson, Mitch McConnell, and Donald Trump want to come after Democrats, well, their MAGA minions will have to go through _us_. I know we're up for the challenge. [**Can I count on****you****to****help****build this movement today by pitching in to The Blue Wave Project, which****works to****defend the Democratic Senate Majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81093513/461351829/-641752998?refcode=2024-03-16-bwp&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d655819c-b2e3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjU1ODE5Yy1iMmUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fSSvQR-5HOGF1hBJ65scTrTuruKRbywFn3DWt7OxAVs=) MAGA Republicans are coming for our strong Democratic Senate incumbents, who are champions for hard-working Americans:

name: Forward Party
subject: A Hectic Week...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
That is honestly just more of the same.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_37&n=1)
---
Saturday, March 16, 2024 | Happy Friday, Peter -- It has been quite a week. The House voted to ban TikTok. Representative Ken Buck (R-CO) announced he’s leaving the House effective next week instead of waiting until the end of his term because the dysfunction between the parties is so awful. No Labels announced that they're forming a committee to vet and make a decision on their Unity ticket candidates, and RFK Jr. announced that he's in the final stages of selecting a running mate (Mike Rowe, Aaron Rodgers, and Jesse Ventura seem to top the list). Politics shouldn't feel fraught and uncertain all the time. The two-party system, historically, was seen as a source of stability. Now, it's a cause of dysfunction. We need more and better choices. It’s time to fix the division and come together to try and actually solve our problems, instead of just using them as fuel to yell about across the aisle for fundraising and votes. It’s time to find a new way #Forward. __
[****](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=1cvwvvCO6qTx74iWLbNk2R8B3XwM_2QXEVMNH9X-TCCWNozSWSaGvG99pDYYVDrdQKsP6cmKaRkKXbBZHbimzeRytNBBBez2qf4pQLzKdUw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_37&n=2)[**How Will PA Independents Vote In The 2024 Election?**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=EFjlj8gSEASyzVJhm5oKDLyXlVG_dYqMUB7MhYghqz2GKG9MA62c2sFPABiddH2WxOfi4d0i4C0LpYMeFpupUbgjAxRd4rIol8zd5YPbpT0EacTaB66z-bYVP7PZumLdKYoIA5nuZ6PYaGBlvpcmXBsBfTNLllvWsg54Ajf54ws&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_37&n=3) | _Erie Times News_ Pennsylvania Independents are about to have a third choice at the ballot box this November. The Forward Party is growing rapidly in the state and will have a slate of candidates across the state who are focused on bringing the people solutions oriented government that starts in their local communities and doesn’t bow to party interests. [**Defaulsee Sees Path Forward With Forward Party**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=y9mqA6gPSHA2xrlEFE11BnWdoJBXSKGv7bZUbECTjVzMVe_CwaYmgx6D7YXL-CS82O5dWfN_p5hvhsYOw3W-l4r4UHELRiTGe54WEvZg6DCGe9LaTo-RJ3Oi9wWtcPaX&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_37&n=4) | _The Lancaster News_ The Forward Party is offering a sensible alternative to the partisan fighting in South Carolina. “I respect that the two parties have different agendas, but my issue is that they are often controlled by those far right and far left factions. They refuse to work together to solve problems and legislate,” Delfausse said. Read the article to learn more! __
**March 18 | PA FWD March Statewide Meeting** The Pennsylvania Forward Party is holding their monthly statewide meeting on March 18th at 8 pm. Join to learn why 2024 is going to be our biggest year yet, and figure out how you can best support the movement! [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/pa_fwd_march_statewide_meeting_20240318?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_37&n=5) **March 19 | Maryland All-Volunteer March Meeting** The Maryland Forward Party is holding its monthly all-volunteer meeting and you’re invited! Join the team to discuss how you can help organize in the state and push them one step closer to full party recognition. Join them and lend your voice! clean_body: That is honestly just more of the same. | | Saturday, March 16, 2024 | Happy Friday, Peter -- It has been quite a week. The House voted to ban TikTok. Representative Ken Buck (R-CO) announced he’s leaving the House effective next week instead of waiting until the end of his term because the dysfunction between the parties is so awful. No Labels announced that they're forming a committee to vet and make a decision on their Unity ticket candidates, and RFK Jr. announced that he's in the final stages of selecting a running mate (Mike Rowe, Aaron Rodgers, and Jesse Ventura seem to top the list). Politics shouldn't feel fraught and uncertain all the time. The two-party system, historically, was seen as a source of stability. Now, it's a cause of dysfunction. We need more and better choices. It’s time to fix the division and come together to try and actually solve our problems, instead of just using them as fuel to yell about across the aisle for fundraising and votes. It’s time to find a new way #Forward. | Erie Times News Pennsylvania Independents are about to have a third choice at the ballot box this November. The Forward Party is growing rapidly in the state and will have a slate of candidates across the state who are focused on bringing the people solutions oriented government that starts in their local communities and doesn’t bow to party interests. | The Lancaster News The Forward Party is offering a sensible alternative to the partisan fighting in South Carolina. “I respect that the two parties have different agendas, but my issue is that they are often controlled by those far right and far left factions. They refuse to work together to solve problems and legislate,” Delfausse said. Read the article to learn more! March 18 | PA FWD March Statewide Meeting The Pennsylvania Forward Party is holding their monthly statewide meeting on March 18th at 8 pm. Join to learn why 2024 is going to be our biggest year yet, and figure out how you can best support the movement! March 19 | Maryland All-Volunteer March Meeting The Maryland Forward Party is holding its monthly all-volunteer meeting and you’re invited! Join the team to discuss how you can help organize in the state and push them one step closer to full party recognition. March 19 | Columbus Area Organizing Call Columbus Forwardists are having their monthly organizing call to plan how the Ohio Forward Party can grow in Columbus and central Ohio. Join them and lend your voice! March 21 | Mansfield Area Forward Meetup - Ohio The Forward Party of Ohio is meeting with all its Mansfield and mid-Ohio members to learn more about Forward, figure out how you can get involved, organize and plan for the next month, and more. Meeting is in person at the Mansfield Richland County Public Library at 6pm. March 26 | Pittsburgh Candidate Launch The Pennsylvania Forward Party is proud to announce a slate of candidates running for statewide office. Join the party and hear from Forward National leadership, local PA Forwardists, our new candidates, and more! The Pittsburgh launch event will begin at 9:30 am at the Thomas J Gallagher Overlook on Mount Washington. March 26 | Philadelphia Candidate Launch The Pennsylvania Forward Party is proud to announce a slate of candidates running for statewide office. Join the party and hear from Forward National leadership, local PA Forwardists, our new candidates, and more! Details forthcoming on the exact when and where for this historic event! March 26 | Harrisburg Candidate Launch The Pennsylvania Forward Party is proud to announce a slate of candidates running for statewide office. subject: Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
To all Joe Biden supporters, please don't click away from this important message. | | |
---

🔵 Peter -- 🔵 To all Joe Biden supporters, please don't click away from this important message.

Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make your first $5 donation to the Biden-Harris reelection campaign? Especially today.

What if we told you that Trump has easily swept through the Republican primaries, which means it's us against him this November?

_Think for a second about all the times you've been thankful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in 2020. Now think for a second about how winning this next election is far from guaranteed._

What if we told you that as you read this, Trump is likely raising HUGE sums of money from MAGA Republicans?

And what if we told you that while Trump relies on the MAGA right and outside spending organizations to fund his campaign, almost all of our donations come from lots and lots of people like you chipping in -- often in response to emails like this?

We know... we know. It doesn't feel like one donation itself can do a lot. But this week, President Biden is receiving lots and lots of donations from people like you who want to reelect him and keep Trump out of office. **Now they're hoping you'll do the same.**

[Can President Biden count on you to contribute your first $5 to help him defeat Donald Trump? It adds up fast when we're all chipping in.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tCu5zo5UDj_0UiGoPEQMuBwIfr5CI6cvgPr7x2SujELzeDx7uf0f9w8SpMy5-vYlOuRjqEP215Dor6Ulh1_00USDyrB_Zy7KQiTc1sNhwmB2zqfJF2qNHIsvkokqRiOpX--uuqn1cZ0BIt5NulLNpfZr4rqoBUpaaej9sfx1MLQkkW9bZfo4IecAQxROubpgOvBX2f2b0i-fin8T7-BwvmC6SnjVvyOmBIlzTaeN2irJ5tJdz7dCi-hjR032dmYWo37FJbBDzEDGZWxJcharKep9Jh60FEtcR6ghRB5v-il7tx0a98RFQdS80oCTVfSspEN2GrTzQDXnhlWzwdrwFw6Ad_LuL2EwZqjMOJCCkJg_d7s3_QMaAbNyBJx-JaeZO/44p/J8L77GMTSxu2tjfkQcbkAQ/h0/h001.onYlW1bWSmm8jwY8vGLiVhnCDpgMeEKeKAfPuIPzXnA) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make your first $5 donation to the Biden-Harris reelection campaign? Especially today. What if we told you that Trump has easily swept through the Republican primaries, which means it's us against him this November? Think for a second about all the times you've been thankful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in 2020. Now think for a second about how winning this next election is far from guaranteed. What if we told you that as you read this, Trump is likely raising HUGE sums of money from MAGA Republicans? name: Adam Schiff
subject: In Trump’s crosshairs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Team —
The Associated Press called it — we’re on to November in a matchup against celebrity Republican Steve Garvey. But that’s not all that happened:
Donald Trump swept nearly every Super Tuesday contest, and Nikki Haley dropped out — clearing the path for Trump’s third GOP presidential nomination.
Donald Trump has kept his focus on me with relentless attacks — at his MAGA rallies, in interviews, and in his feverish posts on social media.
Why? Because no one has done more to stand up to that corrupt president and hold him accountable for his many abuses of office.
Team, the first attacks of the general election have already started, and we need to raise $1,000,000 to have the resources to respond. Rush an urgent contribution of $10 split between Seth Moulton and our campaign to help me fight back. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donald Trump’s attacks on me aren’t really about me — personal in nature though they may be.
He will attack anyone willing to stand up to him, to uphold the oath of office we all swore, to tell the truth in the face of his unending assault on the truth.
And it’s up to all of us to fight back.
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

name: Josh Randall
subject: Josh Randall for US Senate update
body:
Hello again subscribers,

We are VERY grateful for the positive feedback and encouragement we
receive, along with the many sincere questions that continue to come in.

New state delegates have been selected and our team of volunteers have
started our text and call outreach to encourage delegates to
consider voting for Josh and to get them information. If you want to help,
we would love to have you join us in gathering delegates to our team. It’s
been a neat experience speaking with people from all over the state.

We continue to run our race fully backed by volunteers. We strongly believe
in volunteerism. It is the key to persuasion and is absolutely essential to
winning the hearts of people. We hope each of you will reach out and spread
our platform to those in your social circles. There is an amazing power in
word of mouth campaigning. Some try to buy today’s votes with tomorrow’s
inflation, but just throwing more money into an election or government
agency doesn’t address underlying behavioral/cultural problems. And we have
cultural problems in DC.

We recently added a “letter to Utahns” on our campaign website. We’ve
included this message below and would be thrilled if you could pass the
message along, to as many Utahns as possible.

*New message added to the website:*

Dear Utahns,

Washington DC needs an infusion of faith, family values, and fiscal
discipline. We need to balance our budget and secure our border.

Balancing a budget is complex and the solutions are not always popular. To
make it happen the federal government must return to its core functions as
explicitly laid out in the Constitution. We need large, sweeping changes to
the culture of DC. I will work with right-minded Congressmen to re-allocate
1 to 1.5 million federal employees to the private sector, eliminate
unconstitutional agencies and programs, and privatize or send the remainder
of them back to the states.

If our Senators continue compromising on debt ceiling suspensions,
continued resolutions and appropriations that exceed our revenues, the
citizens of our country will lose faith in those who are holding the purse.
Faith is perhaps the greatest need we have in this country. Faith in God,
faith in our country, and faith that we can foster greater unity and
progress for the generations to come.

I will help restore that faith. I will not forsake our country’s faith in
God, compromise our family values, or set aside our Constitution. I know
how to tackle the complex issues we’re confronted with, and perhaps more
importantly, I will work non-stop to persuade 99 other Senators to join me
in doing it.

Utah can make the difference if we have two strong senators that know what
makes our state and country great. Our senators must know how to articulate
Utah’s Republican platform in persuasive ways, overcoming false narratives,
and restoring faith in the free market democratic system of government that
has produced the most innovative and successful nation in the history of
the world. God bless America.

*Upcoming Events:*

*Today: Town Hall in Tooele*

*Monday: Forum in Farmington*

*Tuesday: Meet and Greet in Weber County*

*Thursday: Virtual Meeting*

*Saturday: Box Elder Lincoln Day Lunch, and Vision of America in Utah
County*

Please see the events tabs on the website for the most up to date
information on events Josh will be at. We have virtual calls, in person
town halls, and events sponsored by others. We also plan to be in
Washington County on April 9th for a Meet and Greet and Senate debate at
Dixie Tech and will work on having a town hall while we’re out there.

Please reach out if you'd like to request an event in your area.

https://www.electjoshrandall.com/events-1

*Josh is different*
The longer we are in this race, the differences become more apparent and we
realize how much Josh is uniquely qualified and prepared to help in DC with
the issues our country faces. *Attached is a document with some questions
Josh has responded to recently by email. It is a quick copy/paste so please
excuse any typos.*

*Thanks again for all your effort in helping to send the right person and
the right values to DC.Brianna Randall*

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: We’re having trouble with cash flow

body:

body:
Update for dpwillis67@gmail.com - No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2ce977ef28&e=567664f14c)
Hope you're doing well! Just wanted to make sure you didn't miss out on the latest episodes of the **No Doubt About It Podcast** with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti.
In case you missed it, on Monday's episode, we had a hilarious time poking fun at the media's enthusiasm in painting Joe Biden as the best he's ever been. [**Check out this clip:**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5b122f12c0&e=567664f14c)
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4e45a35e7c&e=567664f14c)
| [STREAM MONDAY’S EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8579fda4a6&e=567664f14c)
---
| | | | | | | | | And on Thursday's episode, we got real about the state of the economy for working families with Paul Horvath from Orchard Global. It's a reality check that offers valuable insights and suggestions on navigating these challenging times.****[**In this clip Paul details how higher food prices are hitting working families especially hard:**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=11a05c1da0&e=567664f14c)
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cecc91b737&e=567664f14c)
| [STREAM THURSDAY’S EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ee71530560&e=567664f14c)
---
Want to stay up to date on this week’s upcoming shows? Visit our [website](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6e51e976aa&e=567664f14c) or subscribe on our [YouTube Channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=12b997670e&e=567664f14c).
Enjoy the rest of the weekend and make sure to turn into our show this Monday. We’re talking about the State Police officer who was shot and killed in the line of duty this weekend with Jeremy Vaughn, a fellow State Police officer, who was shot in the line of duty two years ago.
Mark & Krysty

Mark & Krysty | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2024 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: An Unforgettable Virtual Experience:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
As a valued supporter, your presence at this event is paramount.

|
---
| | | **[As a valued supporter, your presence at this event is paramount.](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_event_3_16_24_a5&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_event_3_16_24_a5&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
[You’re invited](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_event_3_16_24_a5&n=3) to an unforgettable virtual experience with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Campaign Manager Amaryllis Kennedy in honor of Women’s History Month.
Hear from Mr. Kennedy about the women who have been influential in his life and explore the issues facing women today as Amaryllis Kennedy leads a fireside chat. Several special guests will participate including actress Drea de Matteo, influencer Jessica Reed Kraus and Warrior Mom, Tracy Slepcevic.
[Please join us for an informative and heartwarming hour.](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_event_3_16_24_a5&n=4)
Event Details:
| Date: Sunday, March 24th, 2024
---
Time: 5:00 - 6:00 PM PST
Location: **Virtual Only**
Ticket: $24
[RSVP Now >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_event_3_16_24_a5&n=5)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_event_3_16_24_a5&n=6)
_This event is fully virtual._ Whether you're at home, in the office, or on the go, you won't miss a moment of this enlightening dialogue. Once registered, you'll receive a link on the day of the event, granting you access from anywhere with an internet connection.
[Reserve your spot today](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_event_3_16_24_a5&n=7) and be part of a transformative discussion that shapes the future of our nation!
[RSVP Now >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_event_3_16_24_a5&n=8)
Don't miss this rare opportunity to engage with Mr. Kennedy and our esteemed guests.
See you there!
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_event_3_16_24_a5&n=9)

Don't miss this rare opportunity to engage with Mr. Kennedy and our esteemed guests. See you there! Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

Hi there, it's Paul Begala. I've spent my life helping Democrats win tough elections alongside folks like my buddy James Carville. So you can trust me on this: **If you care _at all_ about defending our Senate majority in 2024, you need to invest in Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's campaign right now to help flip Florida blue.**
| | [Donate (and have it DOUBLED)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81095644/461358308/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk954-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjcxMmI2NTEtYjdlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giHnFpA5NfY3GUoKCuOhgVW_HQ0Y9PebLf_AfkqYqpo=)

It's simple math: Democrats have a narrow 51-49 Senate majority — and now that Joe Manchin is retiring, we're all but guaranteed to lose our seat in West Virginia. **That means that even if we defend _every other Democratic seat_ (and I'm talking about incredibly tough states like Montana and Ohio), we could STILL lose our majority. Our only viable path forward is flipping a red seat blue. **
I know we can do that here in Florida. Rick Scott is ranked as one of the top 10 most vulnerable senators in the nation, and brand-new polling shows that this race is already neck and neck. [**So please, if you care about defending our Senate majority, will you rush $5 or more before 11:59 p.m. to help my friend Debbie flip this seat blue and save our Senate majority? A generous group of donors has agreed to 2X-MATCH donations — so right now is the best time to give!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81095645/461358309/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk954-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjcxMmI2NTEtYjdlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giHnFpA5NfY3GUoKCuOhgVW_HQ0Y9PebLf_AfkqYqpo=)

The first $25,000 received from this email will be matched._ | | | [DONATE $5 (can become $10)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81095646/461358310/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk954-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjcxMmI2NTEtYjdlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giHnFpA5NfY3GUoKCuOhgVW_HQ0Y9PebLf_AfkqYqpo=)

It's hard to overstate just how vulnerable Rick Scott is. He's made a name for himself in Washington by pushing policies that are way out of touch with voters — everything from banning abortions to sunsetting Social Security and Medicare. He only won this seat by a mere 10,033 votes — just 0.12%. _(And that's after he outspent his Democratic rival by $50 MILLION!)_ In fact, he's never won a race by more than 1.2%.
On the other hand, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a proven leader with a strong record for working families. She's got a winning message, and the polling data shows Florida voters are ready to rally behind her.
But unfortunately, it's not that simple: Rick Scott is a self-funded, Trump-endorsed megamillionaire. He spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat in 2018.

This time around, he's already shelled out a massive $3 million in attack ads — that's more than any other GOP Senate candidate so far. In all of my years working with campaigns, I've rarely seen that level of spending this early on in a campaign. It means he's scared of Debbie. But it also means he's dead set on stopping her campaign.
**This race will come down to one thing:_cold hard cash_. Experts everywhere know that Debbie can win, but only if grassroots people like you invest in her campaign so that she can go up against Rick Scott. That's why a generous group of donors has agreed to match donations for a limited time — but according to ActBlue, you haven't stepped up to double your gift! [Please, will you donate $5 (worth $25) right now to make sure that Debbie isn't outspent in this critical race? The entire future of our Senate majority is on the line here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81095650/461358314/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk954-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjcxMmI2NTEtYjdlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giHnFpA5NfY3GUoKCuOhgVW_HQ0Y9PebLf_AfkqYqpo=) **
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81095651/461358315/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk954-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjcxMmI2NTEtYjdlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giHnFpA5NfY3GUoKCuOhgVW_HQ0Y9PebLf_AfkqYqpo=)
---
This is already shaping up to be a tough — but winnable — race, so Debbie needs people like you on her team.

Thank you so much for taking the time to read this email.

With gratitude,

Paul Begala
|

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: how doughnuts will save our Senate majority 🍩

body:
|
#
_Hi, this is Senator Tina Smith. My friend Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running for the U.S. Senate and asked to reach out. Her message is below:_
* * *
Friend, this is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell in Florida. I'm about to ask you to help me hit my end-of-month goal. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.

| | **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=11b6cb0669a24f5e96073f394aaaa5fb&_e=migRjNBbU2RiaY3r_YKGRDHnRW8MHf8OJCcslEjnJEU1Zqjhm7AgeCMZlUXPLQiiTyjargL9wAwNVZ9Xuo-MuBO5U_qcifSGrXqe06ly6sheS5KEUzsPnIhest1nagASSCldBc0ULLHlcGHuRmwdhJGePrrfb_kbKmz8yJX5MfML0JzJQ5Dje4qD3JmXKfpjlfhB2u-wVBOvIYq_Xr0bUC_wVlc57PgDnAxNW8lFwom7dGcbbiotJru2Q_Qwx_CuF2-VE1PdBLIj6Fnnnbpra1u3R4t75oVq9blh3F-pAb-1jr_QVkN9Sg_cht6orAdptEYAk0-Oex9gkvmUxVSzO6qmw34RUrHUe68MP6YNhiFZowj-IY2Q-SbWKCVu5OqFvyhjPjt07uU4N4uMDC1F-Q%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November.Democrat policies have brought America to its knees.There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California.Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And that’s why I’m running for Senate.**_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.**And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do.But there is no way I can pull it off without you.**[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=11b6cb0669a24f5e96073f394aaaa5fb&_e=migRjNBbU2RiaY3r_YKGRDHnRW8MHf8OJCcslEjnJEU1Zqjhm7AgeCMZlUXPLQiiTyjargL9wAwNVZ9Xuo-MuBO5U_qcifSGrXqe06ly6sheS5KEUzsPnIhest1nagASSCldBc0ULLHlcGHuRmwdhJGePrrfb_kbKmz8yJX5MfML0JzJQ5Dje4qD3JmXKfpjlfhB2u-wVBOvIYq_Xr0bUC_wVlc57PgDnAxNW8lFwokBHXsfCkcSDbecBiAnG4bPibQhyjmox_y2_4GRoXc0hZXsmpGJ4N2AHMUZnAKiUc2V2fPTLjEob9vdyolWxG6extohRECuhLZ8vO8NM3GM-VV7DrBUQsZ4t6Xpa1y836ZjkZJyRnn1WyzlZaRoItakz4M0n4U34KFeR3RtfO9qPA%3D%3D)** I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before.They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California...I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_.I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians.When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff...**...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow American,If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees......well, as they say, “Those were the days.”But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you. | | | As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November.Democrat policies have brought America to its knees.There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California.Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And that’s why I’m running for Senate.We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do.But there is no way I can pull it off without you. I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before.They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California...I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win.I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians.When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff......we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Derek,

With the General Election now underway, President Biden has taken a very small
lead over the criminally indicted disgrace known as Donald Trump – but it’s
still far too close for comfort.

Trump is running on the most extreme platform in American history, which
includes using the military to suppress protestors, ending fair elections,
rolling back abortion rights, slashing Social Security and Medicare, crushing
workers rights, and more.

Wisconsin is likely to be the closest state in the country, and all current and
future Americans are counting on us to stop MAGA extremism before it’s too late.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Feb2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.5&t=1002&akid=6649%2E1827488%2EVtE9Uw ]That’s why we need your help closing our $8,421 budget gap before our

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: New attack ad against Summer Lee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The Pennsylvania Democratic primary election is just over one month away,
and as expected, right-wing PACs are ramping up their attacks against
progressive incumbent Rep. Summer Lee in Pittsburgh.

This week, “Moderate PAC” launched a new TV ad against Summer, accusing
her of pushing an “extreme socialist agenda” and promoting her opponent.

To this point, Moderate PAC has been solely funded by GOP megadonor and
billionaire Jeff Yass — the BIGGEST donor in the 2024 election cycle who’s
dropped $46.4 million so far.

Yass formed his PAC for this exact reason: to go after progressives like
Summer who fight for bold, progressive change and an end to the status quo
that benefits corporations and the wealthy few like Yass.

Time is running out for us to build the resources needed to defend
Summer’s seat and keep her fighting for the working people of Pittsburgh
in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240316-sl.8aQY4J&refcode=em20240316-33834&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=33834%2E1203867%2E3oF1Sa ]Can you split a contribution of $5 or more right now to
fuel Summer’s campaign and Justice Democrats’ work to re-elect her this
year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240316-sl.8aQY4J&refcode=em20240316-33834&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1020&akid=33834%2E1203867%2E3oF1Sa ]Contribute $5

Let’s come together to keep this Republican billionaire’s handpicked
candidate out of Congress and send Summer back to Washington to keep
fighting the good fight.

In solidarity,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240316-33834-footer&t=1021&refcode2=33834_1203867_3oF1Sa&akid=33834%2E1203867%2E3oF1Sa

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=33834%2E1203867%2E3oF1Sa

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Jon Tester
subject: sure as hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81097121/461363393/1231903508?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_240316_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiMTUzYTM5LWJiZTMtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-bICDKvrTeGK67UwdMRqvMDXNLIPUf2aImBDUzoerIU=)
My name is Jon Tester.
I'm the Senate's only working dirt farmer. I lost three fingers in a meat grinding accident when I was younger. I get a $12 flattop haircut. Most of my shirts are stained with dirt.

With Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate, experts at CNN are calling my seat one of the GOP's best pickup opportunities. That's why national Republicans are going all in to defeat me. Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs already made a record-breaking ad reservation to flood the airwaves with attack ads – and now, Trump is rallying the Republican base and his MAGA mega donors to prop up his handpicked candidate. With everything from the Dignity of Work to reproductive rights on the line in this race, we have absolutely no room for error. We've set a goal to raise $100,000 before Trump takes the stage so we're prepared for whatever the GOP throws at us, and I'm counting on folks like you to chip in now: =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Martin Heinrich will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support. name: Jason Crow
subject: My 45th birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

It’s Jason. I know it’s a Saturday, but I couldn’t wait to thank you.

I celebrated my 45th birthday yesterday. Along with the usuals (a good playlist paired with an Old Fashioned) my staff surprised me with a card signed by grassroots supporters from across the country.

Seeing notes from folks like you made my birthday special. Representing Coloradans is an honor of a lifetime, and I don’t take this privilege for granted.

I’m in this fight because there is still so much that needs to get done.

We need to defend our democracy.

We need to crack down on dark money.

We need to protect our rights.

We need to lower costs and level the playing field.

And we need to bring civility back to our politics.

My time in combat taught me to never back down from a fight, and I don’t intend to stop now. Ushering in a new generation of servant leadership starts with us.

For my (belated) birthday, I hope you’ll join me in splitting a donation to my friends at the Colorado Democratic Party. Your gift will go toward winning the closest of races, expanding our Democratic majority in Colorado, and electing service-oriented leaders — from the White House down to the statehouse. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-cdp?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Jason Crow and the Colorado Democratic Party and processed immediately:

SPLIT $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-cdp?amount=10&express_lane=true]
SPLIT $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-cdp?amount=25&express_lane=true]

SPLIT $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-cdp?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-cdp]

Thank you!

— Jason Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

subject: re: Emilia’s note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
This our last chance to show our strength before we head into the general election.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81097863/461366212/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.03.16_b1_ts_oos-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzQwZDU0ZS1iZWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QfbG8HHavRSFpEsKNmDl4fTU19-qkcgHcwEzZ_0cs8=) Peter, did you see Emilia’s note from yesterday?

**With just three days to go before the primary election, it’s critical that we work together to show our full strength.**

This is our last chance to show the power of the grassroots team we’ve been building since 2022, Peter, and we can’t afford to leave anything on the table.

**[We need your help to show our Republican opponents and their right-wing mega donors that we’re ready to win in November. So please, will you donate today to help us reach our $10,000 goal before Tuesday night?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81097864/461366213/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.03.16_b1_ts_oos-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzQwZDU0ZS1iZWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QfbG8HHavRSFpEsKNmDl4fTU19-qkcgHcwEzZ_0cs8=)**

Thank you,

_Team Sykes_

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Emilia Sykes**
Date: Fri, Mar 15, 2024
Subject: Reflecting on the days ahead Hi Peter,

You’re going to be hearing from my team a lot over the next few days, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why. But if you don’t have time to read my full note, [**will you chip in just $5 to help me reach my primary fundraising goal before the polls close on Tuesday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81097865/461366214/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.03.16_b1_ts_oos-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzQwZDU0ZS1iZWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QfbG8HHavRSFpEsKNmDl4fTU19-qkcgHcwEzZ_0cs8=) | [**CHIP IN $5!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81097866/461366215/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.03.16_b1_ts_oos-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzQwZDU0ZS1iZWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3QfbG8HHavRSFpEsKNmDl4fTU19-qkcgHcwEzZ_0cs8=)
---
The primary election is on Tuesday, March 19, **which means that in just 4 days, we’ll find out exactly who we’re up against.**

**But here’s the truth, Peter:** No matter which Republican candidate wins on Tuesday, their goal will be the same: _Flip OH-13 red, head to Congress to be another vote for the extreme Republican agenda, and pass dangerous legislation like a national abortion ban._

**We’ve worked too hard to have all of our progress turned back, Peter. Together, we’ve built a coalition of working people from across Northeast Ohio who know that our communities are worth fighting for – and now it’s time to kick into high gear.**

[**It’s critical that we show our full strength as we head into the general election – that’s why my team and I have set a $10,000 fundraising goal. ## [** _WEEKEND READ: The Collapse of Credentialism_**](https://ssspl.mjt.lu/lnk/AWAAADo9LS8AAc4Cvu4AA5vbC1wAAYDOz7cAnf7RACZcGQBl9d2fkQ9O5zRVSa-U1A7WE4xsfAAjuaE/2/79C8hr2i5RzLHpnrq1NVyA/aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVwcmlja2x5cGVhci5vcmcvdGhlLWNvbGxhcHNlLW9mLWNyZWRlbnRpYWxpc20vP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1XRUVLRU5EJTIwUkVBRCUzQSUyMFRoZSUyMENvbGxhcHNlJTIwb2YlMjBDcmVkZW50aWFsaXNtJTIwKDIpJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1tYWlsamV0)

For many years, the United States has been effectively a technocracy, run by unelected “experts.” Former Harvard president Claudine Gay’s fall from grace may mark the end of that era.

Technocrats have long told us what we can and can’t do, what we’re allowed to own, what our kids must learn in school, and so on. For the most part, we never voted for any of that, yet we have gone along docilely, not noticing or not caring or, at best, unwilling to make waves.

The result has been the rise of self-selected “experts,” the credentialed class, who exist primarily to impose their will on others. Their ranks have swelled recently with the exponential growth of government and education bureaucracies and the emergence of “academic” programs designed not to increase knowledge but to feed those bureaucracies.
| [READ MORE](https://ssspl.mjt.lu/lnk/AWAAADo9LS8AAc4Cvu4AA5vbC1wAAYDOz7cAnf7RACZcGQBl9d2fkQ9O5zRVSa-U1A7WE4xsfAAjuaE/4/guLl6_IUfI2UXSA9vn-CTA/aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVwcmlja2x5cGVhci5vcmcvdGhlLWNvbGxhcHNlLW9mLWNyZWRlbnRpYWxpc20vP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1XRUVLRU5EJTIwUkVBRCUzQSUyMFRoZSUyMENvbGxhcHNlJTIwb2YlMjBDcmVkZW50aWFsaXNtJTIwKDIpJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1tYWlsamV0)

# **NOTABLE QUOTES**
**Archbishop Carlo Maria Viganò** wrote regarding the globalist Covid-19psycho-pandemic farce: “These murderers will soon find themselves answering for their crimes, if not before the tribunal of the world, then certainly before God.”

**James Comer (R-KY ) House Oversight Committee Chair:** “Without firing a single bullet, the Chinese Communist Party is waging war against the U.S. by targeting, influencing, and infiltrating every economic sector and community in America.”

**New York Times:** The top Senate Democrat, the highest-ranking Jewish elected official in the United States, spoke from the Senate floor to condemn Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and call for elections to replace him.

**Senator Tom Cotton (R-Ark.):** “Chuck Schumer’s demand for new Israeli elections is inappropriate and offensive. Israel is a close ally and a healthy, vibrant democracy. The last thing Israel needs is the ‘foreign election interference’ that Democrats so often decry here.”

**Elliott Abrams contributor to Council Foreign Relations:** What is a colony? The dictionary definition is “an area over which a foreign nation or state extends or maintains control.” Today Sen. Chuck Schumer tried to turn the State of Israel into one—an American colony. In a Senate speech he demanded new elections in Israel and said Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is an “obstacle to peace.” Schumer also decided that “The Netanyahu coalition no longer fits the needs of Israel after Oct. 7.” Schumer concluded that “The world has changed – radically – since then, and the Israeli people are being stifled right now by a governing vision that is stuck in the past.”

# **MORE ARTICLES**
### [** _Experts Predicts England Banning Puberty Blockers for Kids Will Save Lives_**](https://ssspl.mjt.lu/lnk/AWAAADo9LS8AAc4Cvu4AA5vbC1wAAYDOz7cAnf7RACZcGQBl9d2fkQ9O5zRVSa-U1A7WE4xsfAAjuaE/7/aiBy63qepT2StwLVZbABoA/aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVwcmlja2x5cGVhci5vcmcvZW5nbGFuZC1iYW5uaW5nLXB1YmVydHktYmxvY2tlcnMtZm9yLWtpZHMtd2lsbC1zYXZlLWxpdmVzLWV4cGVydHMtcHJlZGljdC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVdFRUtFTkQlMjBSRUFEJTNBJTIwVGhlJTIwQ29sbGFwc2UlMjBvZiUyMENyZWRlbnRpYWxpc20lMjAoMikmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW1haWxqZXQ)
England’s National Health Service has declared that there’s not enough evidence of “safety and clinical effectiveness” for children and young people to be given puberty blockers to treat gender dysphoria.

“Puberty blockers (gonadotrophin-releasing hormone analogues) are not available to children and young people for gender incongruence or gender dysphoria, because there is not enough evidence of safety and clinical effectiveness,” the NHS notes on its site.

“From the age of 16, teenagers who’ve been on hormone blockers for at least 12 months may be given cross-sex hormones, also known as gender-affirming hormones.”

The NHS explicitly states that these hormones cause irreversible changes, including maturing girls’ development of breasts, the breaking or deepening of a person’s voice, and temporary or even permanent infertility.
### [**_Conservatives Building Their Own "Get-Out-the-Vote" Machine in Key Battleground States_**](https://ssspl.mjt.lu/lnk/AWAAADo9LS8AAc4Cvu4AA5vbC1wAAYDOz7cAnf7RACZcGQBl9d2fkQ9O5zRVSa-)
The commitment to GOTV efforts has to be year-round, and conservative ground game leaders are finally waking up to that fact.

You’d be hard-pressed to find a more energetic group of go-getters than the army of vote wranglers in the Students Learn Students Vote Coalition. SLSV, which bills itself as the “national hub & largest nonpartisan network in the country dedicated to increasing student voter participation,” is definitely dedicated.

But the coalition, which is at best “nonpartisan” in name only, is just one of a litany of leftist groups tirelessly and cooperatively working around the nation, particularly in the election-deciding battleground states, to elect Democrats.
### [**_Liz Cheney Covered Up Trump’s Push For National Guard On J6 In Political Memoir_**](https://ssspl.mjt.lu/lnk/AWAAADo9LS8AAc4Cvu4AA5vbC1wAAYDOz7cAnf7RACZcGQBl9d2fkQ9O5zRVSa-U1A7WE4xsfAAjuaE/9/HV9DsFoa2CJ_)
In her memoir, former Rep. Liz Cheney, R-Wyo., falsely framed former President Donald Trump as the mastermind of the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, with claims that the commander-in-chief resisted calls to deploy the National Guard. The Federalist exclusively reported on Friday that the vice chair of the since-disbanded Select Committee on Jan. 6 even suppressed evidence showing Trump actually pushed for more troops.

In her December book, Oath and Honor: A Memoir and a Warning, Cheney outlined how the select committee discovered the White House was warned about the potential for violence in the run-up to Jan. 6, 2021. The chapter titled “They Knew” said the committee learned of warnings through records obtained by the Secret Service.

clean_body: Social Security Scam, the CCP is already at War with U.S., Banning Puberty Blockers, Conservatives GOTV Efforts, and more! | | | | | | For many years, the United States has been effectively a technocracy, run by unelected “experts.” Former Harvard president Claudine Gay’s fall from grace may mark the end of that era. Technocrats have long told us what we can and can’t do, what we’re allowed to own, what our kids must learn in school, and so on. For the most part, we never voted for any of that, yet we have gone along docilely, not noticing or not caring or, at best, unwilling to make waves. The result has been the rise of self-selected “experts,” the credentialed class, who exist primarily to impose their will on others. Their ranks have swelled recently with the exponential growth of government and education bureaucracies and the emergence of “academic” programs designed not to increase knowledge but to feed those bureaucracies. | NOTABLE QUOTES Archbishop Carlo Maria Viganò wrote regarding the globalist Covid-19psycho-pandemic farce: “These murderers will soon find themselves answering for their crimes, if not before the tribunal of the world, then certainly before God.” James Comer (R-KY ) House Oversight Committee Chair: “Without firing a single bullet, the Chinese Communist Party is waging war against the U.S. by targeting, influencing, and infiltrating every economic sector and community in America.” New York Times: The top Senate Democrat, the highest-ranking Jewish elected official in the United States, spoke from the Senate floor to condemn Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and call for elections to replace him. Senator Tom Cotton (R-Ark.): “Chuck Schumer’s demand for new Israeli elections is inappropriate and offensive. Israel is a close ally and a healthy, vibrant democracy. The last thing Israel needs is the ‘foreign election interference’ that Democrats so often decry here.” Elliott Abrams contributor to Council Foreign Relations: What is a colony? The dictionary definition is “an area over which a foreign nation or state extends or maintains control.” Today Sen. Chuck Schumer tried to turn the State of Israel into one—an American colony. In a Senate speech he demanded new elections in Israel and said Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is an “obstacle to peace.” Schumer also decided that “The Netanyahu coalition no longer fits the needs of Israel after Oct. 7.” Schumer concluded that “The world has changed – radically – since then, and the Israeli people are being stifled right now by a governing vision that is stuck in the past.” | PLEASE SUPPORT OUR SPONSORS | | | MORE ARTICLES England’s National Health Service has declared that there’s not enough evidence of “safety and clinical effectiveness” for children and young people to be given puberty blockers to treat gender dysphoria. “Puberty blockers (gonadotrophin-releasing hormone analogues) are not available to children and young people for gender incongruence or gender dysphoria, because there is not enough evidence of safety and clinical effectiveness,” the NHS notes on its site. “From the age of 16, teenagers who’ve been on hormone blockers for at least 12 months may be given cross-sex hormones, also known as gender-affirming hormones.” The NHS explicitly states that these hormones cause irreversible changes, including maturing girls’ development of breasts, the breaking or deepening of a person’s voice, and temporary or even permanent infertility. The commitment to GOTV efforts has to be year-round, and conservative ground game leaders are finally waking up to that fact. You’d be hard-pressed to find a more energetic group of go-getters than the army of vote wranglers in the Students Learn Students Vote Coalition. SLSV, which bills itself as the “national hub & largest nonpartisan network in the country dedicated to increasing student voter participation,” is definitely dedicated. But the coalition, which is at best “nonpartisan” in name only, is just one of a litany of leftist groups tirelessly and cooperatively working around the nation, particularly in the election-deciding battleground states, to elect Democrats. In her memoir, former Rep. Liz Cheney, R-Wyo., falsely framed former President Donald Trump as the mastermind of the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, with claims that the commander-in-chief resisted calls to deploy the National Guard. The Federalist exclusively reported on Friday that the vice chair of the since-disbanded Select Committee on Jan. 6 even suppressed evidence showing Trump actually pushed for more troops. In her December book, Oath and Honor: A Memoir and a Warning, Cheney outlined how the select committee discovered the White House was warned about the potential for violence in the run-up to Jan. 6, 2021. The chapter titled “They Knew” said the committee learned of warnings through records obtained by the Secret Service. MUST SEE VIDEOS | ABOUT THE PRICKLY PEAR The Prickly Pear () is focused on delivering timely, fact-based news, and citizen opinion that reflects our mission to “inform, educate and advocate about the principles of limited government and personal liberty.”Please follow us on Twitter for all our latest content. | | | | | Copyright © 2024. Hey! We hope this email finds you well and that you’re having a great weekend. Earlier this month, we announced an ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal of raising $150,000 from grassroots supporters like you. As we enter the second half of March, we just wanted to reach out to explain why it’s so important that we keep up the pace on fundraising. Asking people to spare any part of their income is not something we take lightly, so we wanted to share why we hope you’ll make a contribution to help us stay on track this quarter. **Early support matters, especially for down-ballot candidates.** Every race is unique, but each of them will need to make important priority decisions that will affect their odds. Things like staffing, campaign tools, advertising budgets, and other line items all have a major impact when it comes to reaching voters. In some races, the difference between electing a climate champion or maintaining the status quo may come down to a handful of votes. **That’s why we can say in no uncertain terms that whether you’ve contributed $1.00 or $10,000+, you're the driving force behind our work, and your involvement has a direct impact on the outcome of the races we work on.** **[In light of that, could you contribute any amount before Sunday?
