Things like staffing, campaign tools, advertising budgets, and other line items all have a major impact when it comes to reaching voters. In some races, the difference between electing a climate champion or maintaining the status quo may come down to a handful of votes. That’s why we can say in no uncertain terms that whether you’ve contributed $1.00 or $10,000+, you're the driving force behind our work, and your involvement has a direct impact on the outcome of the races we work on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Before we sign off, we also want to acknowledge that not everyone can contribute to every email or text we send out, and many reading this have already made a contribution recently. If that’s you, we totally understand if you can’t contribute today. Thanks so much, Jane PAC Digital Team PS: For those who would prefer to contribute their time instead, please keep an eye on your inbox for more updates on the horizon — our candidates will need all the help they can get making phone calls to voters, knocking on doors, and more between now and Election Day. | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: According to a recent Emerson poll, Jon Tester and I are locked in a neck-and-neck race for Senate in Montana. The poll has Tester at 44%, with my campaign drawing in 42% and 14% of undecided voters! | Fellow Conservative, I’m not sure whether you’ve seen the latest polls – which indicate AN EXTREMELY TIGHT RACE – but believe me when I tell you that this race is ours to lose. My Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, is about as liberal as they come and if re-elected to another six-year term, will be nothing more than a puppet who rubberstamps the Biden/Harris liberal agenda. This race isn’t going to be an easy one to win. Tester has raised over 20 million dollars, and DC Democrats have already committed to spending another 45 million more supporting his campaign. If you don’t need to hear any more from me today, here is a unique link to donate: I will never take your generosity for granted. made by conservatives across the country allows us to reach more voters, and mobilize resources to retire two-faced Jon Tester. For every dollar we raise, Tester raises three to four dollars. That means if we’re ever going to stand a chance of accumulating the resources our opponent’s campaign will have, we must work three times as hard. When patriots like you sit on the sidelines, it puts our movement at risk. But Please let me know if I can count on you to contribute $3, $5, or even $10 today. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Republican for U.S. Senate, Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA | Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81098295/461367763/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240316_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQ5OWU4MjMtYmZlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p0033RF7YBhe-mLByy_c82Jx37DTFXim6Tq-xv8OUCg=)
---
Hi Peter, So much is at stake in the 2024 election — and none is more pressing than access to reproductive health care. Across the country, _we’re witnessing endless attacks on women and our most fundamental rights._ Republicans in Congress, including David Schweikert, have voted to ban abortion with no exceptions, ban IVF, and even voted against the right to contraception. Andrei and I struggle to explain to our daughter how this can be happening and what it means to her future. **We need to elect leaders who will protect women’s rights, not vote to take them away. And there’s nobody in this race who compares to Andrei’s 25-year record of fighting for women and their access to reproductive freedom.** When he was Chair of the Arizona Democratic Party, Andrei helped lead the fight against GOP Governor Jan Brewer’s 20-week, no exceptions abortion ban – **what Planned Parenthood Federation of America called the “most extreme abortion ban in the United States.”** In Washington, he helped Congressional leaders craft the strategy to stop George W. Bush and Republican Senators from forcing through extreme judges. And as a business owner, in the wake of the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , Andrei ensured that all his employees would have access to reproductive health care— no matter where in America they lived. **This is not a new fight for Andrei.** It’s one he’s been fighting for decades, and it’s a big reason why he’s in this race. As I’ve said before, if you’re waiting to make your contribution when the election is closer, I get it, but please understand that your donation today goes a lot further than the one you make right before Election Day. Your donation today enables Andrei’s campaign to continue to grow its momentum through the primary and compete with extremist David Schweikert’s dark money donors. **[Peter, I assure you there is no better person you want to defend your rights in Congress than Andrei. He’s a proven champion of reproductive rights and has the record and vision to win and deliver on all the issues that matter most to you and your family. No matter the amount, your donation today is greatly appreciated and goes a long way in ensuring Andrei can win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81098296/461367764/-1011897668?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240316_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQ5OWU4MjMtYmZlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p0033RF7YBhe-mLByy_c82Jx37DTFXim6Tq-xv8OUCg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81098297/461367765/-1011897668?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240316_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQ5OWU4MjMtYmZlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p0033RF7YBhe-mLByy_c82Jx37DTFXim6Tq-xv8OUCg=)

name: Biz
subject: A moment to reflect
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Moments like this one are a perfect reminder as to why we do this important work.
|
---

We know you’re busy, friends. Whether it’s getting the kids out the door, making sure you’re ready for the next big work meeting, or trying to fit in a long-overdue outing, we can all relate to life getting in the way. But sometimes we need to take a step back and reflect on how far we’ve come.
**Here at All On The Line, we’re taking a beat to express our gratitude for the role this amazing grassroots team has played in our recent victories.**
From Wisconsin’s new state legislative maps, to Louisiana’s newly drawn congressional district, to fairer maps in New York, and other victories — we are so proud of what we’ve accomplished together. Because of you, our democracy is stronger and more representative.
**Moments like this one are a perfect reminder as to why we do this important work.**
[**They’re also a reminder that this work is far from finished. Help us build on this momentum by adding a donation to AOTL to recommit to redistricting today! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81098333/461367890/-353581726?refcode=20240316_AOTL_F_BizReflect_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkMGY1ODAyLWJmZTMtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hWxbI1uEXPi3kuo8xNeLb8J4Ri5PyxxVSQhxzZp7AkU=)

When we launched AOTL, we knew that it would be a tough road to build a more representative democracy. Partisan organizations had spent decades gerrymandering and they were invested in not seeing any of it undone.
But we got to work. And there’s no question that today, our system is more representative and the maps are fairer than they were when we began.
If you’re reading this, I’m so grateful you showed up to helped build our grassroots operation — none of these victories would have been possible without the support of thousands of folks just like you.
**So take a moment from the hustle and bustle of your day and join us in sharing a moment of pride for all that we’ve done in such a short span of time.**

clean_body: Moments like this one are a perfect reminder as to why we do this important work. | We know you’re busy, friends. Whether it’s getting the kids out the door, making sure you’re ready for the next big work meeting, or trying to fit in a long-overdue outing, we can all relate to life getting in the way. But sometimes we need to take a step back and reflect on how far we’ve come. Here at All On The Line, we’re taking a beat to express our gratitude for the role this amazing grassroots team has played in our recent victories. From Wisconsin’s new state legislative maps, to Louisiana’s newly drawn congressional district, to fairer maps in New York, and other victories — we are so proud of what we’ve accomplished together. Because of you, our democracy is stronger and more representative. Moments like this one are a perfect reminder as to why we do this important work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = When we launched AOTL, we knew that it would be a tough road to build a more representative democracy. Partisan organizations had spent decades gerrymandering and they were invested in not seeing any of it undone. But we got to work. And there’s no question that today, our system is more representative and the maps are fairer than they were when we began. If you’re reading this, I’m so grateful you showed up to helped build our grassroots operation — none of these victories would have been possible without the support of thousands of folks just like you. So take a moment from the hustle and bustle of your day and join us in sharing a moment of pride for all that we’ve done in such a short span of time. = – Biz President of All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. # [Did You See This Viral Video?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=142646939&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQyNjQ2OTM5LCJpYXQiOjE3MTA2MTI0MzAsImV4cCI6MTcxMzIwNDQzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5V3PqnZunVSWqqrbVhVLDDrV0quoVpE7fjlu9TIgU7w)
### Freedom Caucus Chairman Adam Morgan Breaks the Internet
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/d785fa45-54de-44cd-8165-c3cf9dbb5143?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| Mar 16
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d785fa45-54de-44cd-8165-c3cf9dbb5143?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=142646939&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQyNjQ2OTM5LCJpYXQiOjE3MTA2MTI0MzAsImV4cCI6MTcxMzIwNDQzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5V3PqnZunVSWqqrbVhVLDDrV0quoVpE7fjlu9TIgU7w)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvc2Zjbi9wL2RpZC15b3Utc2VlLXRoaXMtdmlyYWwtdmlkZW8_.jaMKrEiamEhDHv2YLOnnEdBuOXlNc_32Po0pQA-WhCE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/did-you-see-this-viral-video?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Friends,
This week, a video of South Carolina Freedom Caucus Chairman Rep. Adam Morgan went viral for his passionate and principled take down of a billion-dollar tax giveaway.
**WATCH:**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/db0f5b20-4a31-4124-a8e8-f39ec8dbc761?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Millions of Americans watched and shared, saying "This is the type of leaders we need!"
We agree.
Rep. Adam Morgan's speech caught lightning in a bottle. He is one of a growing group of 163 conservative state lawmakers, connected through the State Freedom Caucus Network, who are just as passionate and principled as Rep Adam Morgan.
They are patriots like **Colton Moore** from Georgia, **Aaron Bernstine** from Pennsylvania, **Austin Smith** from Arizona, **Heather Scott** from Idaho, **Tina Mulally** from South Dakota, **Beryl Amedee** from Louisiana, and **Rick Brattin** from Missouri.
**But these leaders can 't boldly stand to save America alone.** They need to know that millions of their fellow Americans stand beside them when they go toe-to-toe against crony government policies and corrupt lobbyist-backed deals.
Stand with these conservative state leaders today by donating to the State Freedom Caucus Network!
[DONATE NOW](https://substack.com/redirect/f99725b1-02c8-41f9-bb6f-5e2d519f9b57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We need your help. Our goal is to raise up the next generation of conservative leaders who are serving in State Legislatures. Leaders who are unapologetically fighting for the people, not lobbyists. They are fighting for truth, not spin, and they are fighting for freedom, not compromise.
Join with us to support and embolden leaders like Rep. Adam Morgan.
[DONATE NOW](https://substack.com/redirect/f99725b1-02c8-41f9-bb6f-5e2d519f9b57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/2421f3ce-edcb-474e-984a-e2c2fe0fe8bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
#### Invite your friends and earn rewards
If you enjoy State Freedom Caucus Network, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe.
[Invite Friends](https://substack..XVhrxrulIJvrYDjn9nBpInvdxFrZ9FijkmB4uIF00EI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Republican Primary Election News 2024 - Please Read & Share!
body:
> Hello Shelby County Republicans and other conservatives,
>
>
> It’s election time again.
>
>
> Here are some things you may want to know before you go vote.
>
>
> **When and Where to Vote**
>
>
> You can vote early at the Board of Elections tomorrow (Sunday), March 17, 2024 from 1:00pm to 5:00pm.
>
>
> Early Voting Location:
> Shelby County Board of Elections
> **REAR BUILDING ENTRANCE**
> 230 E Court St
> Sidney, OH 45365
>
>
> There is no voting on Monday, March 18, 2024
>
>
> On Election Day (Tuesday, March 19, 2024), the polls are open from 6:30am to 7:30pm.
> You must vote at your assigned Voting Location on Election Day.
> You cannot vote at the Board of Elections on Election Day.
>
>
> **What is on the ballot?**
>
>
> The best way to know is to download “your” sample ballot which will be specific to the precinct in which you live.
>
>
> (1) Visit <https://lookup.boe.ohio.gov/vtrapp/shelby/vtrlookup.aspx#>, (2) search for your name, and (3) click on “Sample Ballots” to see yours. Because this is a Primary Election, you will need to (4) select the “Republican" ballot.
>
>
> Whether you do that or not, the next section provides information on county-wide and above races and issues.
>
>
> **How Should I Vote?**
>
>
> In General Elections, we provide slate cards to make sure you know who the Republicans are on the ballot, and we obviously encourage you to vote for the Republicans. But this is a Republican “Primary” Election. Every candidate on the Republican ballot is a Republican, so it is up to individual voters to figure out which Republican is best for “them”. But, we’re here to try to help you find the information you need. This is explained in greater detail in the handout we provided at the Meet the Candidates night and in the opening monologue in the videos for that event. They are linked below.
>
>
> Link to the Meet the Candidates night handout:
> <https://drive.google.com/file/d/125Q5eyB4Up4cktMK7PlhSCKZLFTzbgMT/view?usp=drive_link>
>
>
> Link to Video #1: <https://youtu.be/OUJngu7beC4>
>
>
> Link to Video #2: <https://youtu.be/pP8_SV6Yka4>
>
>
> Donald J. Trump is the only one left in the Republican Presidential Primary for President, so that should make your choice for At-Large Delegate and District Delegate pretty easy.
>
>
> The next two races are critical, but let me set the stage a bit before I discuss those. Some people may be perfectly happy with the Ohio Republican Party (ORP) and some may not. I will provide reasons why many I speak to are **not** happy with the ORP, and we can move on from there.
>
>
> Many believe that the Ohio Republican Party is in shambles right now. We have a former Speaker of the Ohio House serving a 20 year prison sentence. We have a former Chairman of the Ohio Republican Party serving a 5-year prison sentence. We have a 67-member super-majority in the Ohio House of Representatives, but 22 of those 67 “Republicans” betrayed their colleagues and colluded with the Democrat minority to elect our current “Republican Speaker of the House” so he could implement a more centrist agenda that the Democrats preferred. Those Blue-22 “Republicans” (including the Speaker of the House) have control of millions in “Republican” campaign money and they are using it to get the Blue-22 re-elected by smearing their truly conservative, truly Republican, challengers. Many believe that the Ohio Republican Party is in critical need of reform.
>
>
> If you agree with my description of the ORP in the previous paragraph, then you will likely be looking for an outsider showing potential for reform in the two races that follow.
>
>
> If you are perfectly happy with the way the ORP is functioning, then you will likely be looking for someone who is already well engrained in the current political structure in the two races that follow.
>
>
> That should help you pick the best candidate for you in these next two races.
>
>
> US Senate Race
>
>
> Matt Dolan
> 19 years in office; Currently a State Senator; endorsed by DeWine/Portman/Blessing
> Also backed by: <https://dolanforohio.com/endorsements/>
>
>
> Frank LaRose
> 14 years in office; Current Secretary of State; endorsed by Turner/Uecker/Lipps
> Also backed by: <https://www.franklarose.com/endorsements/>
>
>
> Bernie Moreno
> Never held office; endorsed by Trump/Vance/Jordan
> Also backed by: <https://berniemoreno.com/endorsements/>
>
>
> First US Senate debate:
> <https://fox8.com/news/ohios-republican-u-s-senate-debate-how-to-watch-what-to-expect/>
> Second US Senate debate (You can view up to 5 videos without an account):
> <https://spectrumnews1.com/oh/columbus/news/2024/02/20/ohio-senate-debate-forum-spectrum>
> Third US Senate debate:
> <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LBWIq6YaeQo>
>
>
> State Central Committee Race
>
>
> The State Central Committee is essentially the Board of Directors of the Ohio Republican Party.
> If you love the party as it is, you will likely want the incumbent to retain his seat.
> If you want ORP reform, you will likely want the challenger.
>
>
> Keith Cheney (long-time incumbent; espouses his pride in the ORP he helped build)
> <https://keithcheney.net/>
> Jake Eilerman (challenger running on a transparency, accountability, and reform platform)
> <https://jake4ohio.com/>
>
>
> Now for the more local races; two County Commissioner seats are up for grabs
>
>
> County Commissioner Race #1
> John Adams
> Philip Barhorst
> Mack Knupp
>
>
> County Commissioner Race #2
> James Goettemoeller
> Bruce Metz
> The Sidney Daily News covered these races and candidates pretty well.
>
>
> We (the local party) held a candidate forum featuring these races.
> Videos and a handout from that event were linked above.
>
>
> We have one county-wide levy for the Sidney-Shelby County Health Department.
> This is a “renewal” of an existing tax after a requested increase failed last November.
>
>
> There are several issues/levies on the Sidney City ballots, with lots of info in the SDN.
>
>
> Likewise, there are numerous other issues/levies in other precincts around the county.
>
>
> Getting a sample ballot as described above is the best way to be aware of those.
> If you consider yourself to be computer challenged, shoot me an email fairly soon at [cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com) and I’ll try to email your sample ballot to you.
>
>
> Most of the local races and issues were covered very well in the Sidney Daily News in the last 2 months.
> If you don’t get the SDN, maybe your closest library will have copies you can review.
>
>
> Please don’t hesitate to email me at [cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com) if you have questions. I’ll do my best to get you the answers you need.
>
>
> Cheers,
> Dan Cecil
> Chairman, Shelby County Republican Party
> [cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com)
> (937) 206-2970
>
>
**Please forward to Friends & Family!

Many believe that the Ohio Republican Party is in critical need of reform. If you agree with my description of the ORP in the previous paragraph, then you will likely be looking for an outsider showing potential for reform in the two races that follow. If you are perfectly happy with the way the ORP is functioning, then you will likely be looking for someone who is already well engrained in the current political structure in the two races that follow. That should help you pick the best candidate for you in these next two races. US Senate Race Matt Dolan 19 years in office; Currently a State Senator; endorsed by DeWine/Portman/Blessing Also backed by: <> Frank LaRose 14 years in office; Current Secretary of State; endorsed by Turner/Uecker/Lipps Also backed by: <> Bernie Moreno Never held office; endorsed by Trump/Vance/Jordan Also backed by: <> First US Senate debate: <> Second US Senate debate (You can view up to 5 videos without an account): <> Third US Senate debate: <> State Central Committee Race The State Central Committee is essentially the Board of Directors of the Ohio Republican Party. If you love the party as it is, you will likely want the incumbent to retain his seat. If you want ORP reform, you will likely want the challenger. Keith Cheney (long-time incumbent; espouses his pride in the ORP he helped build) <> Jake Eilerman (challenger running on a transparency, accountability, and reform platform) <> Now for the more local races; two County Commissioner seats are up for grabs County Commissioner Race #1 John Adams Philip Barhorst Mack Knupp County Commissioner Race #2 James Goettemoeller Bruce Metz The Sidney Daily News covered these races and candidates pretty well. We (the local party) held a candidate forum featuring these races. Videos and a handout from that event were linked above. We have one county-wide levy for the Sidney-Shelby County Health Department. This is a “renewal” of an existing tax after a requested increase failed last November. There are several issues/levies on the Sidney City ballots, with lots of info in the SDN. Likewise, there are numerous other issues/levies in other precincts around the county. Getting a sample ballot as described above is the best way to be aware of those. If you consider yourself to be computer challenged, shoot me an email fairly soon at mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com and I’ll try to email your sample ballot to you. Most of the local races and issues were covered very well in the Sidney Daily News in the last 2 months. If you don’t get the SDN, maybe your closest library will have copies you can review. Please don’t hesitate to email me at mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com if you have questions. I’ll do my best to get you the answers you need. Cheers, Dan Cecil Chairman, Shelby County Republican Party mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com (937) 206-2970 **Please forward to Friends & Family!

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Thanks a lot. Really.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Hey there, Peter.
Just wanted to thank you for wading through all the emails and sticking with me over the last week or so.
It’s been a big rush ever since Kyrsten Sinema let everybody know she wouldn’t be running for re-election — we’ve pulled in a ton of support that is going to be critical to winning this race.
But those people never would have joined us if folks like you hadn’t been with us already. Your support, even just following along with me, it’s helped us stay in this race.
And it’s because of you that we’ll defeat Kari Lake, take back this seat, and hold the Senate.
So, thank you. As a kid who grew up sleeping on the floor of the living room because we couldn’t afford another bedroom, this really means a lot to me.
It’s humbling, and I won’t forget it.
Ruben
🌎 BEFORE YOU GO 🌎
We all know Ruben needs the support of a huge team behind him to win, and a ton of people have joined this team over the last two weeks. So, whether you’ve endorsed Ruben before or whether this is your first time, [**can you add your name to say that you support Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em240316_Personal_Endorse/?source=em240316-1-30&refcode2=2081.734936.1kTdAO&akid=2081%2E734936%2E1kTdAO)
[ENDORSE RUBEN](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em240316_Personal_Endorse/?source=em240316-1-30&refcode2=2081.734936.1kTdAO&akid=2081%2E734936%2E1kTdAO)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=2081%2E734936%2E1kTdAO). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2081%2E734936%2E1kTdAO). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=2081_734936_1kTdAO&akid=2081%2E734936%2E1kTdAO)

name: James Carville
subject: If we lose PA, we blow a gasket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to re-elect my dear friend Bob Casey.

| Carville here.

**I’ve got to tell you: If we lose Pennsylvania, Democrats will blow a gasket.**

THIS IS IT. The whole country stands right here on the tipping point, and there’s absolutely no way we keep the Senate without PA. That’s just a fact.

That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to re-elect my dear friend Bob Casey. But at the same time, Mitch McConnell and his cronies are doing everything in THEIR power to flip this seat and retake the Senate majority.

They’re gearing up to flood PA with millions upon millions of dollars in attacks, and Bob’s opponent has the resources to self-fund his campaign. We can’t compete with that kind of money without your help, Peter. Bob is counting on grassroots support to keep PA and the Senate blue.

[_**With the future of the country depending on Pennsylvania, will you split a donation between Bob’s campaign and Fight for Porgess today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81099350/461371570/-887798292?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxOGQ1MzU3LWMxZTMtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FhT1MCjgbRFKlRK6atCwgk0zOU-ObjX2GFRT1A1Jpvg=)

clean_body: That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to re-elect my dear friend Bob Casey. | Carville here. I’ve got to tell you: If we lose Pennsylvania, Democrats will blow a gasket. THIS IS IT. The whole country stands right here on the tipping point, and there’s absolutely no way we keep the Senate without PA. That’s just a fact. That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to re-elect my dear friend Bob Casey. But at the same time, Mitch McConnell and his cronies are doing everything in THEIR power to flip this seat and retake the Senate majority. They’re gearing up to flood PA with millions upon millions of dollars in attacks, and Bob’s opponent has the resources to self-fund his campaign. We can’t compete with that kind of money without your help, Peter. Bob is counting on grassroots support to keep PA and the Senate blue. = | = | = | = | = | = Every donation gets us closer to winning this November, so help us bring it home. – James Carville * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. | | |

We did it, friend: I officially became the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Texas!
I am so grateful to my fellow Texas voters and grassroots supporters like you for entrusting me with this honor – I will not let you down.
I'm ready to outwork Ted Cruz to win this thing because the stakes of this election are too high not to. From voting rights to abortion, our freedoms are under attack. Everyday costs are still too high. Simply put: Texans cannot afford six more years of Ted Cruz.
That’s why this campaign is so important. Two recent polls showed us tied with Cruz, and I know we can win this race – but I need you with me to do it. So I have to ask, friend: **[Will you donate $5 or $25 right now to help me and Kirsten Gillibrand keep up tonight's momentum all the way through Election Day? The real race begins right now, friend, and it's going to be a tough fight. But don't worry – I've been an underdog my whole life. I know what it takes to beat the odds and win a tough fight.
I'm a fourth generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom who sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. I never knew my dad but thanks to my community of teachers, coaches and counselors at the YMCA, who helped my mom, aunt and uncle raise me, I had the opportunity to chase my version of the American dream.
Without them, I never would've made it to the NFL, gone to law school, become a civil rights lawyer, served in the Obama administration or run against a 22-year GOP incumbent and won, becoming the first Democrat to ever represent TX-32 in Congress.
**And thanks to them, I am where I am today: the official Democratic nominee who has the chance to become Texas’ first Black Senator.** The chance to finally defeat Ted Cruz and give Texans the committed leadership we deserve.
With experts calling Ted Cruz the most vulnerable GOP Senator in the country and two polls showing us TIED, the only thing that could hold us back is resources.
It’s true that everything is bigger in Texas, and this campaign is no exception. It’s going to take the biggest grassroots movement Texas has ever seen to beat Ted Cruz. **Ted Cruz already has more than $6.5 million in the bank to attack me with, so please:**

I'm a fourth generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom who sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. I never knew my dad but thanks to my community of teachers, coaches and counselors at the YMCA, who helped my mom, aunt and uncle raise me, I had the opportunity to chase my version of the American dream. Without them, I never would've made it to the NFL, gone to law school, become a civil rights lawyer, served in the Obama administration or run against a 22-year GOP incumbent and won, becoming the first Democrat to ever represent TX-32 in Congress. clean_body: Kyrsten Sinema, NOT RUNNING! | Friend, This is the most important email you will receive all day. Kyrsten Sinema is NOT running for Senate in Arizona. It 's officially a one-on-one race. There will only be two candidates on the ballot running for Senate in 2024: my RADICAL opponent, Ruben Gallego, and me. It's all or nothing for Arizona, America first, or America last. Ruben 's a radical in every sense of the word. He would be a massive departure from the representation we have had in Arizona. He votes with Joe Biden 100 percent of the time, supported the Iran Deal, sanctuary cities, defunding the police, and voting rights for everyone pouring across the border. He even called the border wall 'stupid.' If we lose in Arizona, this entire country will be on a kamikaze mission toward total destruction. It 's now or never to step up and save this country before it's too late. | I 'm offering you an opportunity to make a difference in the most important Senate race of the year. According to recent reports, liberal mega-donors have already put millions of dollars down to stop me from winning on Election Day. $1, $5, it all matters. We need to show the left we're fed up and ready to Take Back America. PLEASE -- RUSH A DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT!** Thank you, Kari Lake Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Of course…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Peter,
Earlier this month, my opponent endorsed Donald Trump. This came as a surprise to no one .
This year, Ciscomani lined up with Trump to abandon our border communities — despite them desperately needing more support to handle the current crisis.
Next year, if they win in November, Ciscomani will line up with Trump to ban abortion nationwide.
That’s because Ciscomani will always side with Trump’s agenda. He's showing where his loyalties lie, and it’s not with the people of southern Arizona.
I’m proud to be endorsed by incredible organizations like Planned Parenthood, Sierra Club, EMILY’S List, the National Education Association, UFCW, Moms Fed Up, End Citizens United, Giffords PAC, and more — as well as by inspiring leaders like Senator Mark Kelly, House Minority Whip Catherine Clark, and Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes.
I will always put AZ-06 first in office. Will you help my campaign hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal so we can win in November and get Ciscomani out of office by donating now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_031624_Trump_act]

This year, Ciscomani lined up with Trump to abandon our border communities — despite them desperately needing more support to handle the current crisis. Next year, if they win in November, Ciscomani will line up with Trump to ban abortion nationwide. That’s because Ciscomani will always side with Trump’s agenda. He's showing where his loyalties lie, and it’s not with the people of southern Arizona. I’m proud to be endorsed by incredible organizations like Planned Parenthood, Sierra Club, EMILY’S List, the National Education Association, UFCW, Moms Fed Up, End Citizens United, Giffords PAC, and more — as well as by inspiring leaders like Senator Mark Kelly, House Minority Whip Catherine Clark, and Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. I will always put AZ-06 first in office. Will you help my campaign hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal so we can win in November and get Ciscomani out of office by donating now? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] Thank you, Peter, Kirsten [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

Alaska is beautiful, Peter.
I am reminded of that whenever I get the chance to travel around this great state and talk to folks about what we're fighting for. I'm excited to release another update with you. This Alaska-First movement means so much for both Alaska and America. It's time to bring our conservative ideals BACK to Congress, and remind Washington that we will always fight for what's right. Thanks for all you do,

clean_body: | | | | | Alaska is beautiful, Peter. I am reminded of that whenever I get the chance to travel around this great state and talk to folks about what we're fighting for. I'm excited to release another update with you. This Alaska-First movement means so much for both Alaska and America. It's time to bring our conservative ideals BACK to Congress, and remind Washington that we will always fight for what's right. Thanks for all you do, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | We have the momentum with the support of conservative leaders in Alaska and across the country. They're on Team Dahlstrom and I cannot wait to join them to help get America back on track! ✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska ✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson ✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik ✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise ✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer ✅ Winning for Women PAC | | | In January, I endorsed President Trump. On March 5th , he overwhelmingly won the Alaska Republican Party's Presidential Preference Poll with 88% of the vote. Alaskans stand behind our former president and his pro-Alaska and pro-American Energy policies. | | Guess what? We have new gear in stock! Stop by the store using the link below. Show your support for our conservative movement with the best Republican gear in the State of Alaska. | The work that the Alaska Republican Party is doing to hold Mary Peltola accountable is essential. Just last month, Mary Peltola spoke to the Alaska Legislature about the success of the Willow Project and how amazing it is for Alaska. Yet her words seem hypocritical. It's her party that is continuing to suffocate Alaska under endless executive actions and fought to kill the very project she claims to have supported. Not to mention the many other projects her party has killed. Check out the work AKGOP is doing by clicking the picture below. | Thanks for tuning in to another Dahlstrom Dispatch! With your support, we can restore Alaska's conservative voice to congress. Can't donate? No problem. There are many ways that you can get involved. Check out some volunteer opportunities below. | | | | Was this email forwarded to you? If so, below to sign up for our Dahlstrom Dispatch and never miss a beat! | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

subject: 8 states have enacted new STRICTER voter laws

2024 is the _most important election of our lifetime._

And even in 2024 they keep making it harder for people to participate in their fundamental right to vote. **Eight states have enacted stricter voter ID laws since the 2020 election, disproportionately deterring marginalized communities from participating in our elections process.**

Moreover, with 1 in 6 voters residing in anticipated battleground states, the outcome of this year’s elections depends on the participation of **_every_** eligible voter.

**_Vote to Live has been working since 2016 to ensure that every Black voter is registered and ready to vote._**

But we cannot do it alone. We need your help starting right now to raise the resources we need to ensure we show up in force at the polls in November. We need to raise $7,500 by the end of the week. ****[**Can you chip in just $10 to help us overcome these undemocratic voter ID laws?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvDGJileMI-6xN4gUpzMK8jJAN0D_31Lm1buPTcUbbchVV9qklZn64CMK926RdtwpSu25r1y0rjmtFCV-u-mpuYVNdtFua98Dlb7bDN6BkTUnSpaUISudWvILB2o_ihwOIlLgMzNE8gBJDaZv5G25gIE2o-PAkwYvPkHFVYoPefEKPR0qUjdLfqXd3bkzUDrAUmPV7uLIvka0Zm09kSUQ0Dac9q1HOZRXGD_YjN7ochWKUWzKHBweyykyLgKdqxek_zpGvozNfyYbEnOnLjk92TAdB3ncuaUNndIrQ7papKl3bUjbyg5lvklvkj5M7jw9UDUxNDLUUSoEOrtKLAT4v75RJLvoLBo7FEbucL0TBtY00ok7mh1Q6R4IWbt2X972Yiu38mfumSPQdbjIOIhVRbnkZ_zUU2HQfSQR8ftYTJDw/44p/8IbNFBeHRQm-9YUlrxbm7Q/h3/h001.EeZMNQ9IjEn-VjHtfdfLHHQhhVSPTcEfvDB1NaWfck0)**** | | [DONATE ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvDGJileMI-6xN4gUpzMK8jJAN0D_31Lm1buPTcUbbchVV9qklZn64CMK926RdtwpSu25r1y0rjmtFCV-u-mpuYVNdtFua98Dlb7bDN6BkTUnSpaUISudWvILB2o_ihwOKZYwfJzJ8hrHpZopMXOEoJzGQNH495hmMIcf3FoNHLFmt36ECYnVTSW-IvNjErtINwtOrBtHsBqCkLnv-YSobuSNa6MWHLcFxm8WVnEHrjgtuAga6DU-gvMAnFSmZnwD4ooGovYlNhxcQT-_3mFwRxoz3DjQ6ECtiAANuqJzg2OfJ7j_64J-AYDqvXk0Q-q6127H6LUVeJiTJruLMHVxUMnwcxhPtuqSnaDyawgseoeWQkiEFCzRcc35nvEFIYQ0epq_q-voCgVj6bHdlijNKWfzToq635CV-kSIOd1-eqxw/44p/8IbNFBeHRQm-9YUlrxbm7Q/h4/h001.4rQZY79EG4pAJqUnQoEMjdP-lxgoKvgeFUg5snvJJvg)

* * *

If every Black person eligible to vote voted this year, we would see historic and winning outcomes for leaders committed to standing with our communities up and down the ballot.

We cannot be passive and have critical parts of our lives decided for us. How we eat, where we sleep, make our money, take care of our children and literally breathe depend on how we choose to fight for our lives at the ballot box.

That’s why we are launching the VOTE TO LIVE campaign. VOTE TO LIVE is our commitment to register as many eligible voters as possible: first-timers, young people, and folks who have been unknowingly purged. This is our fight to ensure folks are registered, ready and able to take back so much of what’s been deprived — this year and beyond.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtdMKDM6bXsw3QmrE2evp3JtlfP0OVen5DfG3mqxKu9pEF0n2B6pIFeE2vLZ5dHngCZWmWAx047tzkKklfRNPB592iaWDHdGxFO0338_SFu8aAJku5PE_sCZV7W5RQPUbWSFB7bvZ4pqkvv8rHZaM7NnmM_ZWWkVlK5eM8ZIZGM85zQdu7b3sn26QK5fYdPzVogF_Y_T_w3ix1RqrGQQmlUqT5itH3Vm3wUajRVeGNiMiI0OTNz6IlwrNjjxNS5-gZmqW6SKWVSmGfe9OCTCeIHxHawXyo8u4o4oG6sIiqeKNmmBWVMgCcnefAToLT6LRLY_ioiqOykM7S_pZvbZkAuclJAo2C7zZqXHLlMJSMHFnpxetz-uF7u5MbQ9oD6Z4VGSXcPHD2ZVk-TZ0I8R3NvXDC1Tn3YWPqkOhltcUJCz0KdQAaDMSvoGEOA1P4qN2qCMjbGldMt8xfbB_jdqZao/44p/8IbNFBeHRQm-9YUlrxbm7Q/h6/h001.I_h2BprJNqZloCdohHDZYSlFRFxx47mctTzjTnRz8IU) VOTE TO LIVE, a 501c3 campaign created by The Collective Network, will take a two-pronged approach to engaging Black voters this election: first through innovative and distributed voter registration initiatives and through an extensive voter education effort. The goal of the VOTE TO LIVE campaign is to register as many voters as possible before Election Day. By coupling voter registration and voter education activities, VOTE TO LIVE aims to inform the Black community of the importance of their vote, how to protect and cast their ballot under changing legal and political circumstances, and how voting fits into a broader political and civic engagement strategy to build power for our communities. As a result, The Collective Network believes Black voters will be better prepared to register to vote, cast their ballots to maximize their vote, and remain engaged beyond the election.

To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by The Collective Education Fund; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective's Vote To Live, please .

name: Wes Moore
subject: Our democratic values
body:
Friend,

With Trump as the official GOP nominee, and other extremists on the ballot this November, our democracy is at stake.

We saw what happened in 2020 — Trump spewed lies about the election results, incited an insurrection, and showed no remorse. We know he’s going to spend the next 10 months fighting for himself and himself alone.

To have a presidential candidate who calls themselves a “patriot” purely for political gain is not just offensive, it's something that absolutely makes my blood boil — because I know what real patriotism is.

That’s why this election, I am working hard to support the Biden administration and highlight the work they have done to support all of us. From Day One, President Biden took on the challenge to lift the American people from a pandemic and revitalize our local economies by supporting small businesses.

Recently, I had the honor to spend time in Georgia to support President Biden and Vice President Harris — and what I saw on the ground was strong energy supporting this administration. People are unifying behind President Biden because results matter, and results are exactly what President Biden brings — we’ve seen 14 million new jobs and some of the lowest unemployment rates in our nation’s history.

I know what it feels like to be told you can’t do something — it’s happened all my life. President Biden is no stranger to that.

But, I’m here to tell you, he knows what created this country, what built it up, and what will make it last. The last four years have shown us President Biden has what it takes to create a better future for all of us.

All I have to say is: four more years of President Biden.

Elevate,
Wes

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Mazie
subject: Take a deep breath
body:
|
#
Peter, Sorry to email you on a Saturday, but we needed to let you in on an important update for our campaign. **Last night was our mid-month fundraising deadline — the last fundraising target we have before our huge FEC end-of-quarter deadline at the end of this month. Typically, we see a huge surge of support during these big milestones, but last night, we saw a dip._A big one._** It’s not a moment for panic, but we need to find a way to make up ground quickly. Dark money billionaires spent over **$1.4 million** in Hawaii in 2022, and if they think that our grassroots support is drying up, they could get the impression that Mazie’s seat is up for grabs. We only have a few weeks to change their minds, because we’ll be reporting our Q1 fundraising numbers to the FEC in just a few weeks, and it’ll be available for everyone to see. And we mean _everyone._ **Now take a deep breath — because here’s the good news:** The biggest measure of our grassroots strength isn’t _how much_ we raise, but _how many_ donations we receive. And that means your donation today, _no matter the amount_ , can help us gain back the upper hand and show that we’re not going anywhere while Republicans attack our democracy and our fundamental rights. **Peter, before you get back to your weekend, will you add a donation of any amount to help us close the gap? Here’s a personal link just for you:****[secure.actblue.com/donate/hirono-em-march2024-catchup&supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81101626/461379410/1349703860?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240316_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmU5NTJjNS1jOWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpNyRpGk7dUkP5DXzkG2zwJKi0ht3vfSBfM7O-vTZ1Y=)** Thank you, Team Mazie

name: Colin Allred
subject: It's official: I'm the Democratic nominee for Senate in Texas

I’m a fourth generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full-ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where my wife, Aly, and I are now raising our family.
**I ran for Congress in 2018 because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream. I also saw that our democracy was in peril and wanted to be part of protecting it. No one gave me a chance in that race, but I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent. Since then, I'm proud to have been named the most bipartisan member of the Texas delegation.**
_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ firing Ted Cruz and being the voice all Texans need in the Senate. We're already better off than we were in 2018, with experts calling Cruz the most vulnerable GOP Senator in the country, and two polls in a row showing us tied. I'm not saying it will be easy, but with you on my grassroots team, I know we can get it done.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a General Election Founding Donor and help reach our ambitious $1 million goal. We need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz, and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, rush $10, or whatever you can spare, to help Adam Frisch and me win, defeat Ted Cruz, and give Texans and Coloradans the leadership we deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81102262/461381565/-1247850162?refcode=em20240316pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=8a1b1406-cee3-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTFiMTQwNi1jZWUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Imlz0V_--GazV2QkpOHASElpmwOuB0yHItB_sFLA9IM=)**
Thank you so much for being a part of my team. Your support has gotten me this far, and it's why I know we can win.
Let's do this,
Colin Allred

**This race isn’t going to be an easy one to win. Tester has raised over 20 million dollars, and DC Democrats have already committed to spending another 45 million more supporting his campaign. **

I will never take your generosity for granted. **[Every donation](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=92e1c49071bf41e0aac48b0fbb9cacc2&_e=LVQ4Cwuof1tYmMeJhRerp0RKzH94bcqXkskVaS141ZiRbj3NDTA_KS_qRnBg6xL6J_Xmrdg2eUewvHCyn1sHTjCE2Ji72GlRQPPj4tuXrS9XFvVBMQbWLMyFyCZbaGI6DU5pnwVPu9PPLTzLFyDqr8iK8TLiy2189Yi2kS2ev_XXlPVo1Hj5BKW2Y6LbdioQGbHI6Xp9QTokEj8hHPt6UaXr77dRN3GjQnqaYRfnn7okqkQPTHzmPDhJ2aTEq8N6ayEJXjj3fqWEzVqrEILikd5fKXFlwDw3jNGRa0EPSQ8EDeXOKw0l0AcFPCZUT38I2GtdsnznoUULZcx5pTrD3gkpUrdX3fHhYXumda0HtGSuhXRB3_LUTYBG_6AJkA2-c92MNQe_7FRo-s2rD4m_EByAmgN-r4w7ikFVe1rKZSk%3D)** made by conservatives across the country allows us to reach more voters, and mobilize resources to retire two-faced Jon Tester.

Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=327c2ea2785444eb904880e8e2ff0f54&_e=0LH5kZREwl7KPFiWzY6htgZ9XyVl93FaFetjNcjge6FXnNJG2lgklZyn9hQNAR4ezv4ZlJMyRM7wdpwVA4_6xJisIrjdbYcDLcZM1AHItBRvmXKt4-002-VHeUOBbVG5D_DDzwCuUKX8Gb36w5kZjEJiym1gJSeVL9HyhJpYhusOE0Ogu45hWmNMytoRD5SaI9z74h8IVF7zlqBBHI0PraGnfcVEdeHF5rffW5Jqwak3zKz4jxDryu7jhYcVS1nfV5cJ1ofS8ryHnSf6rhBTkqySw8WqzGCvdSLUzUiN8sQ7BBPTRwHWi1UufBZVGLXRhYmC0zcYniwg9D6Nd2q3wgOprGOa6KqwW3IqmaxNdIQ6SOopwW1hYy4djdc_2Ox6UveF4CvyfgiYr7yLj0qmce_ZWy9DRp8WsHMmPXiX0B0%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=327c2ea2785444eb904880e8e2ff0f54&_e=0LH5kZREwl7KPFiWzY6htgZ9XyVl93FaFetjNcjge6FXnNJG2lgklZyn9hQNAR4ezv4ZlJMyRM7wdpwVA4_6xJisIrjdbYcDLcZM1AHItBRvmXKt4-002-VHeUOBbVG5D_DDzwCuUKX8Gb36w5kZjEJiym1gJSeVL9HyhJpYhusOE0Ogu45hWmNMytoRD5SaI9z74h8IVF7zlqBBHI0PraGnfcVEdeHF5rffW5Jqwak3zKz4jxDryu7jhYcVS1nfjXgL6qX1YxbNV3gOS_73pzJgsfww-cvesECCFMy7BCYziEAbe6NNDfDpGWBDtgazyEqAlJGbTahPmi5nU9wRdJw3Qp__2TQIa-Uohey8k-R6gNcvWHognUzSf8Lz_Vm75fMsCJwVAANdxNbEInKE8h4NSVCxYvgUrV-e5s-j99Q%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 .

name: Josh Harder
subject: A story about my brother
body:
Why I do this work.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81103569/461385307/-1463099547?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgzY2E0ZjUtZDNlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7HCA6CU_iCBWYCGGxh1LGbsU45kBwMYwPeZOZEFT73A=) | Peter, Today I want to tell you about my brother David and his impact on my life. David was born 10 weeks premature and spent the first two years of his life in and out of hospitals. We are so incredibly thankful to the doctors and nurses who supported our family and helped him have a full recovery. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81103570/461385308/1387576770?&refcode=E7514-20240316-PediatricBeds-Image-HealthCare&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgzY2E0ZjUtZDNlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7HCA6CU_iCBWYCGGxh1LGbsU45kBwMYwPeZOZEFT73A=)** Afterwards, my parents received a medical bill over 100 pages long. If it weren’t for my dad’s health insurance, we would have been in huge trouble. When I saw my Republican Congressman vote to take away healthcare from people like my brother, I knew I had to do something about it. So I decided to run against that Republican in 2018. And in a surprise victory, I won. **Now I have the opportunity to fight for kids and families in our exact situation. Just this year, I was able to secure $4 million for St. Joseph’s Medical Center in Stockton so we can expand care for parents and their babies. I’m really excited about this because it’s going to double the number of pediatric beds and make sure every kid can get the healthcare they need.** This is why I do this work, because it matters. As for David, he graduated from Stan State and he’s doing great! **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81103571/461385309/1387576770?&refcode=E7514-20240316-PediatricBeds-Image-HealthCare&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgzY2E0ZjUtZDNlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7HCA6CU_iCBWYCGGxh1LGbsU45kBwMYwPeZOZEFT73A=)** Thank you for giving me the opportunity to continue serving and making a difference. \- Josh [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81103572/461385310/1287215685?refcode=E7514-20240316-PediatricBeds-SB-HealthCare&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgzY2E0ZjUtZDNlMy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7HCA6CU_iCBWYCGGxh1LGbsU45kBwMYwPeZOZEFT73A=)

clean_body: And I need your help to get there. Fellow American, Our Party's presumptive nominee President Trump chose me to lead Republicans to victory in key races across the country, and with the November elections on the horizon, there's no time to waste. Democrats are mobilizing, harnessing their resources to challenge our candidates and our ideals at every turn. They are strategic and well-funded, but we have something they lack: a powerful community of principled Conservatives like YOU. As Chairman of the Republican Party, I've authorized a critically important Fundraising Goal to help register new voters, push voters to the polls, and take advantage of every opportunity to run up our margin in key states. I'm committed to ensuring that our party's future aligns with your values and vision, but the Radical Left threatens to destroy the freedoms and principles that have made this nation great. That's why I put together the Goal to give Patriots like YOU an opportunity to make a real-time impact. Can I count on you to step up, Fellow American? Thank you, Michael Whatley Chairman, Republican National Committee Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Republican for U.S. Senate, Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA | Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Violence against election workers is violence against democracy
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friends,
I’m writing to you because I’m deeply concerned about the increase in threats to election officials that we are already seeing this year. We cannot protect our democracy unless we can ensure the safety of the workers who keep our democracy running.
You're familiar with what happened in December 2020, when I found my house surrounded by armed protesters as I was trying to put my then-four-year-old son to bed.
In January of this year, an anonymous online account threatened election officials in 23 states that explosives had been hidden in capitol buildings to "make sure you all end up dead." Fortunately, the FBI later determined this to be a hoax.
And just recently, Missouri Secretary of State Jay Ashcroft was "swatted" - an attempt to trigger a massive and often life-threatening law enforcement response in response to a falsified alleged violent crime. And again, fortunately, cooler heads prevailed in his situation and no one was physically harmed.
There have been four swatting attempts since December on top election officials. And I'm only mentioning a few cases. From reports of intimidation at the poll worker level to the plot to kidnap Gov. Whitmer, this violence is threatening the core of our democracy.
That's why in Michigan, we've led the way to protect the hardworking men and women who helped run the most secure and transparent elections in our history, including our historic 2024 primary election. It's a state crime to threaten or intimidate an election official, but it's clear we need more protections at a federal level.
We have to remain vigilant against these threats to our election workers -- because they are a threat to our elections themselves. Violence against election workers is violence against our elections -- and violence against our democracy itself.
I'm grateful for everyone who works so hard in Michigan and around the country to defend our democracy, but they shouldn't have to feel like they're putting their lives or safety on the line just to do their jobs.
That's why I just testified in Washington about the need to increase the security of our elections and protect our election workers. This work to defend our democracy will take all of us.
If you agree with me, please add your name and stand with the heroes who work so hard to protect our elections today >>

https://secure.ngpvan.com/XluH_VKa5Emy0weaIcNsiA2

Thank you for all that you do to defend our democracy.
-Jocelyn

Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO Box 21368
Detroit, MI 48221

fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

body:

They claim to be protesting the military operations in Gaza, _but their real goal is to wake up my neighbors, harass my family, and attempt to intimidate me because I am a conservative Republican and a threat to the far-left network working to transform our country._ **[Again - I won’t be intimidated by these leftist malcontents and their liberal paymasters. But I need your help to stand strong and fight back. I know getting an email like this while you’re trying to go about your Saturday — and probably thinking about something other than politics — isn’t likely to brighten your mood. And truth be told, I’m not sitting here with the world’s biggest smile on my face either!
The simple fact is, the attacks have started earlier in KS-03 this year, and we have to adjust our strategy accordingly — which, I’m sure to your frustration and definitely to mine, means we need to increase our fundraising goals.
I want you to know that I’m more committed than ever to making progress on the work I came to Congress to get done — protecting abortion rights, defending our democracy, and making life better for folks in every corner of Kansas.
If you’re still with me, I’d appreciate any help you can provide. But regardless of whether you’re able to chip in right now, I’m grateful that you’re on this team and glad to have you in my corner.
Thanks, and have a great rest of your day.
-Sharice

name: Bob, Jacky, and Tammy
subject: PA, NV, WI
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Election experts agree that our three Senate races could determine control of the Senate this year
| | |
---
Hi Peter, it’s Bob Casey, Jacky Rosen, and Tammy Baldwin.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81104536/461388719/-169367255?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk258-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODM3YzRiZi1kZGUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=naq8r7E26xnGLCA1OEsAC-1FjfBs1uo42AK1lTMAbbQ=)
The road to the White House and the Senate majority runs right through Pennsylvania, Nevada, and Wisconsin — and all eyes are on our campaigns.

Election experts agree that our three Senate races could determine control of the Senate this year. And with an open seat in West Virginia, Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to flip the Senate majority.

That means if any one of us loses this November, it’s almost guaranteed that the GOP will reclaim the Senate majority and enable Republicans to enact their dangerous right-wing agenda. _We can’t let that happen._
But protecting our seats won’t be easy. As Republicans look to flip the Senate majority and the White House, they’ll throw the kitchen sink at us to flip our states red.

That’s why we’re teaming together to win this “Battle for the Battlegrounds” and keep the Senate majority (and the White House!) out of the hands of the GOP — but we can’t do it without you.

body:
\------------------------------- - - - - - - - - quick vid update |
---
| | No joke...

I'm sitting in the sun, watching my chickens run around, while reflecting on the recent weeks in the Idaho legislature.

It's been a mix of wins and losses.

This has really highlighted the importance of electing REAL conservatives on May 21st, with the Republican primary election just two months away.

So, I decided to make a quick impromptu video about my thoughts.

[Click here to see it now](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=55c266a954&e=dea908e0fe "see it now")

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=55155289b5&e=dea908e0fe)

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.**

Are you still hesitating to join X (Twitter)? It's much more entertaining than Facebook, and conservatives can actually express themselves without facing censorship (for the most part). Come on, sign up and join the party!

body:
| | | [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9c6cb0b02ed14772ac49f6e023169b0c&_e=1Y7EQNhnhoh17QhKENn-DoRcucKl22AZBFF_LEgpEERoGMq_M2r-e0nyqpy3gYY1971Oncjh_uO2KbeyVvxJ5Mducgg-s1IcqWIbtVcKmU8xIRa9zSnJlykyOnYECo0itvz0FNEp24GIzMcJiKCcKy92cq8HxYfumOuO9jpct2RvD3BrR8bxhqrKl4vvOr96YcMDHVaEUrmzIKhJsF0ok9yVso9aoQz3538gWkhu3C_IJRJgTdsczv5BVp-nCAbXaolAsruYdtAYFvNBdjHnkw%3D%3D)

I used to defuse underwater mines big enough to sink an aircraft carrier, so a mob of radical-left Dems doesn't even make me flinch.

Fellow Patriot, this is Captain Hung Cao, retired Navy Special Operations Officer & I need to ask for your help.

One month ago I announced that I'm officially running for the U.S. Senate in Virginia. But Fellow Patriot, I didn't see your response.

Truth is, I'm running again because I'm not done fighting for this country.

I fled communist oppression in Vietnam and forged a life for myself through the American Dream.

I owe this country my life. Serving as a U.S. Senator would be the least that I could do. But the Democrat establishment doesn't want to see that happen.

**They HATE that I 'm an immigrant who made a name for myself without their victim mentality. I'm a threat to their entire narrative, which is why they'll spend MILLIONS of dollars to shut me down.**

My campaign could be over before it even gets off the ground.

**[If you're going to give $5 or $10 this election cycle - make it count, make it today. subject: Biden Rejects Secret Service Protection, AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The political establishment will stop at nothing to prevent Kennedy from being on the ballot.

|
---
| | | **[The political establishment will stop at nothing to prevent Kennedy from being on the ballot.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_3_16_24_nd3&n=1)

---
Dear Peter,
Our campaign's 5th request for Secret Service protection has been officially denied.
Kennedy for President COO Mike Sanders drafted a letter to the Congressional Protection Advisory Committee, where he cited numerous dangerous threats against Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and his family.
One such incident took place in Los Angeles after our private security team apprehended Adrian Aispuro, who falsely identified himself as a U.S. Marshal and demanded to meet with Kennedy while carrying a loaded handgun, along with a second firearm and ammunition.
Homeland Security guidelines dictate that major presidential candidates who poll with at least 15% support for major candidates or 20% for independent candidates for at least 30 consecutive days should have security.
_Kennedy has been polling _above_ those numbers for months!_
Homeland Security Director Alejandro Mayorkas's response provides no explanation:
_"Based on the facts and the recommendation of the advisory committee, I have determined that Secret Service protection for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is not warranted at this time."_
>>>>>Considering the Kennedy family's extensive history of tragedy, including Robert F Kennedy Jr.’s father and uncle, the decision not to provide Secret Service Coverage is beyond shocking.<<<<<
Apparently, the Biden Administration and the political establishment would rather force our campaign to spend millions on security than field organizing, signature collecting, and advertising!
Please support Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s campaign today. Not only do we have expensive security costs—$2 million a month!—but we also need to spend more than $20 million to obtain ballot access in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.

clean_body: The political establishment will stop at nothing to prevent Kennedy from being on the ballot. | | | | | Dear Peter, Our campaign's 5th request for Secret Service protection has been officially denied. Kennedy for President COO Mike Sanders drafted a letter to the Congressional Protection Advisory Committee, where he cited numerous dangerous threats against Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and his family. One such incident took place in Los Angeles after our private security team apprehended Adrian Aispuro, who falsely identified himself as a U.S. Marshal and demanded to meet with Kennedy while carrying a loaded handgun, along with a second firearm and ammunition. Homeland Security guidelines dictate that major presidential candidates who poll with at least 15% support for major candidates or 20% for independent candidates for at least 30 consecutive days should have security. Kennedy has been polling above those numbers for months! Homeland Security Director Alejandro Mayorkas's response provides no explanation: "Based on the facts and the recommendation of the advisory committee, I have determined that Secret Service protection for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is not warranted at this time." >>>>Considering the Kennedy family's extensive history of tragedy, including Robert F Kennedy Jr.’s father and uncle, the decision not to provide Secret Service Coverage is beyond shocking.<<<<< Apparently, the Biden Administration and the political establishment would rather force our campaign to spend millions on security than field organizing, signature collecting, and advertising! Please support Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s campaign today. Not only do we have expensive security costs—$2 million a month!—but we also need to spend more than $20 million to obtain ballot access in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. The political establishment will stop at nothing to prevent Kennedy from being on the ballot. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

body:
It's time to wake up.

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=35bcd3886e984f0b89fb2b917a45d9cc&_e=RShxTgT__GI68io0yTWR9g4ii20YtCiGG6rQeux5qQ2v-ZM4qFH6-e3VwqPkGmpnF5hqLBPWHJQFmphm0v3FhMmM_7bXa1S6u1zoB5OYNXM_Trn2kDhY5EPTu7I3C6PPKivMieeYY86qZsPNz7s9Hzfrsj7zCE6LPSZmuTarcnE1oGVC8JqQZn-G8ONHb7gkp5sH2f6nvfGIMBeaRL-T8nMnKE3SqY2A5FZbttc0tlKUxJ9B8e0twYcIjZTpBhAIYlOy0g1pcTFhwK_hp5kOwhgedO9fg2PA8ww60mOskxWBWq3iUOrZ6S-IVahOWz__8_wCkB8mXzwTRF70rBPqSBDqvIAR3VxDO6xI57F1zs_uSiLPe-P_s2IRYtjnXkX9Eprj5X5vHb81rkSsAwpw1Q%3D%3D)
---
**Enough is enough.**

Friend, I know I don't need to remind you that our border is **under attack.**

There's one topic at the top of Americans' minds this November: **our southern border crisis.**

**It 's time for President Biden to wake up.**

Dozens of Americans have been killed by illegal immigrants every year of Biden's Presidency, and still, he refuses to take any action to secure the border.

****How many more Americans have to be struck down in their prime before he takes action?****

| [ **STOP THE BIDEN BORDER CRISIS** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=35bcd3886e984f0b89fb2b917a45d9cc&_e=RShxTgT__GI68io0yTWR9g4ii20YtCiGG6rQeux5qQ2v-ZM4qFH6-e3VwqPkGmpnF5hqLBPWHJQFmphm0v3FhMmM_7bXa1S6u1zoB5OYNXM_Trn2kDhY5EPTu7I3C6PPKivMieeYY86qZsPNz7s9Hzfrsj7zCE6LPSZmuTarcnE1oGVC8JqQZn-G8ONHb7gkdWFm4t1DPVGGvmMRbpOQ1aqJ2OR6zh5EaL8h13UeHiYenSqaHgYnttgqdBtN3Gx6w1dVg8tIwCtX4WLRfZFX9HZPMI89VGL8o9uvMLcd_Cn3AEvG_V1XcTSwbgT4KFrHCBMQBU5MBoE6RG3UqJf-Ex9HyYx7ltcLDzpnC9Ydc_in3-njnkk0BKeZzuu1koa0)
---
[ **DONATE TODAY** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=35bcd3886e984f0b89fb2b917a45d9cc&_e=RShxTgT__GI68io0yTWR9g4ii20YtCiGG6rQeux5qQ2v-ZM4qFH6-e3VwqPkGmpnF5hqLBPWHJQFmphm0v3FhMmM_7bXa1S6u1zoB5OYNXM_Trn2kDhY5EPTu7I3C6PPKivMieeYY86qZsPNz7s9Hzfrsj7zCE6LPSZmuTarcnE1oGVC8JqQZn-G8ONHb7gkdWFm4t1DPVGGvmMRbpOQ1aqJ2OR6zh5EaL8h13UeHibdkXacEtabTeSNkrx6eColw6Dgwchq7cofRQys-oYiW0MY-F-OM5jbHtfCSr2IMe52b4X7IoTTvobWyPxuQJz14UbuBAdqvDSkHH8pkBn1rY9VwSmIUrOszhRVk-Zz7OpM42c62KMHKCJc_q74yjdT)
---

The time for new leadership is now.

**We need to protect our neighborhoods, our kids, our friends, and our family members.

**It 's time for our president to step up and secure our southern border.****

Friend, can I count on you to demand action from President Biden?

[ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=35bcd3886e984f0b89fb2b917a45d9cc&_e=RShxTgT__GI68io0yTWR9g4ii20YtCiGG6rQeux5qQ2v-ZM4qFH6-e3VwqPkGmpnF5hqLBPWHJQFmphm0v3FhMmM_7bXa1S6u1zoB5OYNXM_Trn2kDhY5EPTu7I3C6PPKivMieeYY86qZsPNz7s9Hzfrsj7zCE6LPSZmuTarcnE1oGVC8JqQZn-G8ONHb7gkp5sH2f6nvfGIMBeaRL-T8nMnKE3SqY2A5FZbttc0tlKUxJ9B8e0twYcIjZTpBhAIVGSYLE0vuPC3Sul9DBMoIw1a4LYpbUVa_J4x1dB0MopX2c90g54r3zTtmT1mGWXSme1pyU-623xi-SR9DoDs-VRJmrPlDore9Z5bZjqt9jijNZrJq71oRw34aFHrw_v2Yg01xQEA9PZ7xaE05E374g%3D%3D)

clean_body: It's time to wake up. | Enough is enough. Friend, I know I don't need to remind you that our border is under attack. There's one topic at the top of Americans' minds this November: our southern border crisis. It 's time for President Biden to wake up. Dozens of Americans have been killed by illegal immigrants every year of Biden's Presidency, and still, he refuses to take any action to secure the border. **How many more Americans have to be struck down in their prime before he takes action? | The time for new leadership is now. We need to protect our neighborhoods, our kids, our friends, and our family members. It 's time for our president to step up and secure our southern border. Friend, can I count on you to demand action from President Biden? | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: I have a question for you, Peter

body:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Peter, Lucas Kunce’s finance director.
I’m reaching out to ask what it would take for you to add your first donation of ANY amount toward our goal of raising 2,500 individual donations before midnight tonight.
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44612?refcode=em20240316-5063&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5063%2E614464%2E0ulpZA)**
What if I told you that just $5 today could help us defeat Josh Hawley — the GOP’s most vulnerable incumbent U.S. Senator running for re-election in 2024 — and elect Lucas Kunce, a 13-year Marine veteran and true warrior for working people?
Or what if I said multiple polls have already confirmed that Lucas and Hawley are in a neck-and-neck race for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, and that your investment into our campaign right now could be what helps us tip the scales come November?
What about the MILLIONS national insiders and corporate mega-donors have dumped into our race over the last year? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, so our grassroots campaign needs your support more than ever.
Or what if I told you that we’re just dozens of donations away from hitting our goal of raising 2,500 individual online donations before tonight’s midnight deadline?
**DC insiders are doing everything in their power to re-elect Josh Hawley and keep their grip on this U.S. Senate seat, so we’re counting on your help to fight back and get Lucas’ election-winning message in front of voters.**
**[So Peter, can you add your first donation of absolutely any amount toward our goal of raising 2,500 individual donations before midnight tonight?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44612?refcode=em20240316-5063&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5063%2E614464%2E0ulpZA)**

Peter
Team Lucas Kunce
