clean_body: CNN put us on their list of ‘Top 10 Senate Seats Most Likely to Flip’ in 2024. So did The Hill, Roll Call, AND Real Clear Politics. The bottom line is clear: Pennsylvania is a must-win Senate battleground in 2024 , and nobody knows that better than the Republicans trying to flip this seat. Last quarter, Bob’s mega-millionaire GOP opponent outraised us. He has national Republican mega-donors on his side. And right-wing PACs are already spending millions of dollars trying to unseat Bob. The GOP is spending money against us, AND the race is tightening. A new poll shows our lead slipping. We need to fight back to keep PA blue -- and the work we need to do is funded by people like you. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. Thank you, Bob Casey for Senate

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The filibuster’s biggest fan is retiring
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=1963%2E4032634%2EiwzQI3

Mitch McConnell is officially retiring after a long career of defending
the rights of the filibuster in Congress.

With this update — and with how other Senate races are shaping up across
the country — we have renewed momentum in our fight to finally abolish the
filibuster once and for all.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/EMZ20A_FIL_E_20240316_V1S1?refcode=EMZ20A_FIL_E_20240316_V1S1&t=1006&akid=1963%2E4032634%2EiwzQI3 ]Add your name if you agree: It’s time to officially end
minority rule in our government and abolish the racist and archaic
filibuster rule for good. Let’s keep raising our voices and pushing for
this progress together.

The American people are sick and tired of hearing that the policies that
are so overwhelmingly popular among voters — voters who voted for a
Democratic majority — can’t get passed because, well, a minority of
Senators disagree with it.

It has been used most recently to prevent Democrats in the majority from
passing abortion protections and passing federal voting rights.

The thing is, the filibuster is found nowhere in the Constitution. Here’s
how it’s become a reliable tool for the anti-democracy minority today:

For a vote on a bill to take place in the Senate, a few things have to
happen:

* A bill is brought to the Floor
* Senators debate the bill
* Senators end debate
* Senators vote on the bill, majority wins

That’s the way the Founders intended it to go, at least. Here’s the hitch:
In 1806, Aaron Burr — yes, the one who killed Alexander Hamilton in a duel
— said the Senate had too many rules and should get rid of some.

One rule that got tossed in the trash can? The rule that said any Senator
could propose a vote that would cut off debate. Senators didn’t see a need
to keep this rule on the book, so they tossed it.

That means step #2 (Senators debate the bill) could, in theory, go on
forever — if enough Senators were willing to speak long enough on the
floor in debate.

For years, business generally went on as usual. No one wanted to be “that
guy.” But then, Senator John Calhoun realized he could exploit this rule
change to seize more power for southern slave-holding states. He was among
the first to attempt to stop the Senate from voting on legislation by
filibustering.

In 1917, President Wilson — tired of a Senate that was obstructing more
than voting — pressured the Senate to pass a rule to make sure debate
wouldn’t hold up voting forever and ever.

The Senate responded with a rule, called Rule 22 — also called a “Cloture
Vote.” It looked like the other rule Aaron Burr had thrown in the trash
can, except for one enormous difference: To end debate, Rule 22 required a
supermajority, or two-thirds of the Senate.

Rule 22 didn’t solve the problem of endless filibustering. It encouraged
gridlock. Because now, a small minority in the Senate could force a bill
to get through two votes. A supermajority vote to end debate, and then a
simple majority vote to pass the bill. It made no sense.

The effects were almost immediate. The year after the Senate established
Rule 22, an Anti-Lynching bill was introduced. A small group of Senators
hell-bent on upholding white supremacy decided to flex the new rule and
filibuster the legislation.

The law — which would make the heinous act of lynching Black Americans a
crime — took 100 years to overcome the filibuster, and didn’t become law
until 2022.

During the Jim Crow era, southern Senators continued to use the filibuster
as a tool to block civil rights legislation — and only civil rights
legislation.

Today, the filibuster is more common than ever — to keep blocking civil
rights legislation, voting rights, abortion protections, federal minimum
wage increases, climate action, workers’ rights, anti-gerrymandering
laws....you name it.

It’s bone-deep enraging that a majority of Democratic Senators cannot pass
legislation that the majority of Americans support because of this rule.

It’s bone-deep enraging that Americans have just needed to accept the
filibuster as “the way it is.”

It’s bone-deep enraging that organizers and voters have fought so hard to
make progress on these issues only to hit a wall every single time.

I reject this. This is not how democracy works.

There’s finally a crack in this wall — and this is a moment to fight with
everything we’ve got.

So I’m fighting like hell to make sure Democrats win in November and we
expand our Senate majority. With that, we can finally end the filibuster,
and pass legislation that the majority of Americans are calling for — like
abortion protections, voting rights, gun safety laws, and so, so much
more.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/EMZ20A_FIL_E_20240316_V1S1?refcode=EMZ20A_FIL_E_20240316_V1S1&t=1007&akid=1963%2E4032634%2EiwzQI3 ]Add your name to say you’re in this fight: Now is the time to end the
filibuster.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

subject: Biden is surging, but it’s still very tight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you
see the team’s message about Joe Biden gaining momentum in the polls?

While it’s great to see some good news, the reality is that polls are
still very tight and with our democracy on the ballot, we can’t leave
anything to chance.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Feb2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.5&t=1001&akid=6651%2E1827488%2Eqgm1uy ]Can we count on you to rush a donation to help us close our $5,319
budget gap before our deadline tomorrow at midnight?

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Feb2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.5&t=1002&akid=6651%2E1827488%2Eqgm1uy ]Tony Evers
Derek,

With the General Election now underway, President Biden has taken a very small
lead over the criminally indicted disgrace known as Donald Trump – but it’s
still far too close for comfort.

Trump is running on the most extreme platform in American history, which
includes using the military to suppress protestors, ending fair elections,
rolling back abortion rights, slashing Social Security and Medicare, crushing
workers rights, and more.

Wisconsin is likely to be the closest state in the country, and all current and
future Americans are counting on us to stop MAGA extremism before it’s too late.

body:
# [#] Hi, I just wanted to reach out personally as we approach our mid-month fundraising deadline.

At the end of this month, we are up against our first FEC filing deadline of 2024. This deadline is an opportunity to show the NRCC the tremendous amount of grassroots support behind this campaign. They will stop at nothing to elect far-right extremist Mary Jo-Ann Guinchard, but I refuse to let that happen.

My mission of upholding Jersey Values wouldn’t be possible without your continued support, and I have no doubt that together we can keep up this momentum heading towards November.

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6007%2E5257348%2ER2HyXc ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek, have
you seen this headline?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em_recurring.xcOa4c&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240316_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6007%2E5257348%2ER2HyXc ]NBC News: Wealthy self-funding candidates could hold the key to GOP
hopes of taking the Senate

Across the country, the National Republican Senatorial Committee has
recruited mega-wealthy candidates to run against Democratic incumbents in
crucial Senate races in Ohio, Montana, Wisconsin, and beyond.

California is no different — the GOP thinks they hit a home run with Steve
Garvey, who has a high name ID and personal wealth to fund his campaign.

Since Adam doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, he is counting on the
support of this grassroots team to fuel his campaign for the U.S. Senate.
And today, we have an especially important ask:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=mar2024_abs_em_recurring.0ydDKa&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240316_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=6007%2E5257348%2ER2HyXc ]Derek, will
you start a monthly recurring contribution to Adam’s campaign? Knowing we
can count on you to pitch in $3, $10, or $25 each month goes a long way to
help us uplift Adam’s campaign and stand up to Garvey’s personal wealth.

Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through
ActBlue.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1763?c0=mar2024_abs_em_recurring.E5F5VW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240316_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=6007%2E5257348%2ER2HyXc ]DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3271?c0=mar2024_abs_em_recurring.Yj-Wl0&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240316_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=6007%2E5257348%2ER2HyXc ]DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=mar2024_abs_em_recurring.McEQi_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240316_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=6007%2E5257348%2ER2HyXc ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Running a campaign in a state as large as California isn’t easy — or
cheap.

To make sure voters across California’s 58 counties know what Adam stands
for, we need your support.

To uplift Adam’s vision for a greener, cleaner planet.

To share his plans to increase affordable housing in California.

To let voters know what he’s going to do to defend our democracy from
demagogues like Trump, unstack the Supreme Court, and protect voting
rights.

When you make a monthly recurring gift to Adam’s campaign — we can do all
of this and more. We can talk to more voters across the state, order more
yard signs, and run our ads more frequently.

Your continued support also means we can respond quickly and forcefully
when the GOP spreads lies about Adam’s record — which we can count on them
doing now that he’s running against Steve Garvey for the general election.

The LCV works to advance equitable policy and support legislators who are stepping up to protect our environment and our democracy.
Sustainable farming solutions and a clean and healthy environment are critical to communities across IL-13, and without clean air, water, soil, and natural resources — our communities and our economy are at risk.
Every person has a right to clean air and safe drinking water, and by investing in our clean climate infrastructure, we’ll not only protect every community, but we’ll also bring green and clean energy jobs that help families put food on the table.
[**So please, pitch in before our deadline tomorrow night and help us reelect a climate champion in IL-13.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81105722/461392353/888116784?recurring=8&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240316_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBmNWVkNC1lNmUzLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-NQBFtR3EmLaeShvrJQetCEf-dH-UHaXFeL5NNzkXc=)

| | _Friend,__ __I’ve had some time to think over what we all heard from President Biden last week, and frankly, it is not sitting well with me._ _My honest thoughts:_ _First and foremost, when you are the President of the United States—the leader of the free world—the buck stops with you. I lost count of how many times Joe Biden pointed the blame of his own administration's failures at others, instead of being an accountable leader for all Americans._ _On Day 1 in the Oval Office, Joe Biden reversed successful immigration policies, leading to the catastrophe we have seen unfold and scatter throughout our nation. No longer is this just a border issue—Biden’s reckless policies have made America less secure. And there is no one but Joe Biden to blame for this._ _Additionally, President Biden mentioned American Energy in his 1 hour and 7 minute long speech precisely zero times. That is inexcusable. Our energy independence is what makes America strong, keeps us secure, and brings good paying jobs to American workers._ _Furthermore, the President’s remarks on the economy were completely out-of-touch with the reality that Americans are living in. He applauds himself for saving the economy and taming inflation while working families continue to struggle with sky-high prices for their everyday goods and services. Wage growth has failed to keep up with inflation, stripping Americans of their hard-earned dollars._ _I could go on and on. But the bottom line here is this: America deserves so much more than what we heard in the House chamber. Our country was hoping for honesty, humility, and an inspiring boldness so we can all move forward, rather than an uninspiring campaign speech. _ _America sees right through it, as do I._ _I cannot stress enough how critically important it is that every American harnesses the frustration they felt watching that poor performance, and use it to fuel the fight to get our country back on track. Republicans MUST take back the White House, flip the Senate, and grow our House Majority._
---

**Tom Kean Jr.** is the proud husband to his bride, Rhonda, and the proud father to two daughters. Their family resides in the wonderful city of Westfield, New Jersey. Tom’s dedication and commitment to public service was inspired at a young age by his grandfather who served in the U.S. House of Representatives, and his father who served as Governor of New Jersey. Throughout Tom’s life, he has followed in their footsteps while setting forth his own path of public service—now serving as a first-term **Congressman for New Jersey’s 7th District.** **_Kean's mission is simple:_**** For New Jersey. For America. For _All Of Us_ >. Last cycle, NJ-07 was one of the KEY districts responsible for flipping the House from Democrat Rule. In 2024, you can bet the Radical Left will be gunning for Kean in their efforts to take back Congress. clean_body: Can I share my honest thoughts? | | | | | | | Friend, I’ve had some time to think over what we all heard from President Biden last week, and frankly, it is not sitting well with me. My honest thoughts: First and foremost, when you are the President of the United States—the leader of the free world—the buck stops with you. I lost count of how many times Joe Biden pointed the blame of his own administration's failures at others, instead of being an accountable leader for all Americans. On Day 1 in the Oval Office, Joe Biden reversed successful immigration policies, leading to the catastrophe we have seen unfold and scatter throughout our nation. No longer is this just a border issue—Biden’s reckless policies have made America less secure. And there is no one but Joe Biden to blame for this. Additionally, President Biden mentioned American Energy in his 1 hour and 7 minute long speech precisely zero times. That is inexcusable. Our energy independence is what makes America strong, keeps us secure, and brings good paying jobs to American workers. Furthermore, the President’s remarks on the economy were completely out-of-touch with the reality that Americans are living in. He applauds himself for saving the economy and taming inflation while working families continue to struggle with sky-high prices for their everyday goods and services. Wage growth has failed to keep up with inflation, stripping Americans of their hard-earned dollars. I could go on and on. But the bottom line here is this: America deserves so much more than what we heard in the House chamber. Our country was hoping for honesty, humility, and an inspiring boldness so we can all move forward, rather than an uninspiring campaign speech. America sees right through it, as do I. I cannot stress enough how critically important it is that every American harnesses the frustration they felt watching that poor performance, and use it to fuel the fight to get our country back on track. Republicans MUST take back the White House, flip the Senate, and grow our House Majority. | | | | There will be a handful of extremely close races that come down to the wire this cycle that will decide it all for Republicans—mine being one of them—and we need to muster all the support we can get...now. | | | | Your support is integral in our fight for a brighter, safer, more prosperous America. Thank you for your time and be safe, Tom | | | | | | Tom Kean Jr. is the proud husband to his bride, Rhonda, and the proud father to two daughters. Their family resides in the wonderful city of Westfield, New Jersey. Tom’s dedication and commitment to public service was inspired at a young age by his grandfather who served in the U.S. House of Representatives, and his father who served as Governor of New Jersey. Throughout Tom’s life, he has followed in their footsteps while setting forth his own path of public service—now serving as a first-term Congressman for New Jersey’s 7th District. Kean's mission is simple: For New Jersey. For America. For All Of Us >. Last cycle, NJ-07 was one of the KEY districts responsible for flipping the House from Democrat Rule. In 2024, you can bet the Radical Left will be gunning for Kean in their efforts to take back Congress. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2024 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is:** Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@TomKean.com.

subject: The luck of the candidate ☘️
body:
It's green season: St. Patrick's Day, green light to my candidacy, and asking for money (because I'm a candidate)

View this email in your browser (https://us17.campaign-archive.com/?e=3d27610f3d&u=377cebd307a6b880bd19996d8&id=038dc7d421)

** Chasing the Rainbow
------------------------------------------------------------
The signs of spring are all around us. The cardinals and blue jays that call my backyard home are busily going about their routines, while the roses come into bloom and the dogwoods blaze brightly in the woods.

The beginning of spring is one of my favorite times of year. Everything and everybody begins to wake up and shed the winter slumber. It is a time of energy, a time of growth, and a time for looking ahead to the things to come. Nowhere has that been more true than here at the campaign.

During the first week of the month, March 7th specifically, I qualified as a candidate for the United States House of Representatives in Georgia's newly drawn 7th district. It's official folks! The race is on! And, it is on to November, as I did not draw a primary opponent.

Last week, my team and I focused on the nitty-gritty background work that form the infrastructure of any good campaign. I am proud to let you know that the website: christianforga7.com is up and running and I encourage y'all to check it out.

Another exciting development is we have established and will soon be launching our texting campaign. The goal is to give us a tool to update our supporters in real time about key events or critical moments in the campaign. Keep an eye on your phones over the course of the next week.

Spring is also a time when people turn their eye to fashion, so I am pleased to let you know that we will be receiving our first shipment of what I am sure will be the hottest fashion item of the season - Bob Christian for Congress t-shirts are on the way! These are going to go fast, folks, so stop by any of the public appearances listed below, and grab yours soon.

Finally, all through these first two weeks of March I was able to continue visiting with and meeting Democrats across the district. Forsyth County's monthly breakfast saw a packed room with nearly a dozen new faces. I met a very passionate and focused group of Democrats in Lumpkin County. In Dawson County, I had the honor of witnessing the first Democrat in over two decades register as a candidate for County Commission. And, to top it all off, I was recently named the 1st Vice-Chair for the District Committee.

As you can see, it has been a busy couple of weeks, and this is just the beginning folks. Time flies, and there is very little time to rest on the campaign trail, so over the course of the next two weeks you will start to see a lot more of me out and about while I continue to visit people around the district to let them teach me how to be their Representative. I look forward to meeting all of you.

In closing, I want to say thank you. Thank you to my supporters, thank you to my team, thank you to my family. Without all of you none of this would have been possible. Through your dedication and generosity we have come far and will go further still. All the way to Washington D.C.!

SB 233 - School Vouchers - This bill just cleared the GA House and is now one step away from moving to the Governor's desk. We have one last chance to voice our displeasure. Please, call your State Senator and let them know we need kill this bill and continue to support a strong public education.

Supreme Court - SOTUS will be hearing oral arguments for several high profile cases, including the mifepristone injunction this month and the Trump immunity claim next month. This is not a call to action, per se, but more a call to be aware. The court has an excellent website at supremecourt.gov.

Sine Die - The final day of the Georgia legislative session is coming up on March 28. Be prepared for a flurry of news and calls to action as the legislature wraps up 40 days of incredibly hard work. The best sources of information on developments is usually your favorite Representative or Senator's newsletter. If you are not signed up for one, I encourage you to do so.

Saturday, March 16 - Breakfast with Cherokee Dems - IHOP, Canton, GA

Tuesday, March 19 - Beer with Bob live on TikTok, 6 - 6:30pm @christianforga7 (last week we set a campaign record with 1,138 viewers!)

Saturday, March 23 - Politics Talk with the Cherokee Dems, Canton GA

Sunday, March 24 - Forsyth County Town Hall featuring local, state, and federal candidates, 4 - 5:30pm, Sharon Forks Library

Tuesday, March 26 - Beer with Bob live on TikTok, 6 - 6:30pm @christianforga7

Tuesday, March 26 - Drinks with Lumpkin County Democrats, Dahlonega, GA

Thursday, March 28 - Forsyth County State of the County, Cumming, GA, 10:30am - 1:30pm.

Thursday, March 28 - Dinner with Cherokee Democrats, Canton, GA

**[I am 400% impact matching every donation before the end of the day to gain major ground on the Radical Left!](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=4190c860f13244b5a58689f4a191e382&_e=t3bhlAiO29VTpwSB1T8qnIGfOCSlJzPEWceOSTip--x5QfuUZsHqAh_9wLvSZT-tZqMCfpf3icY1EV6uJa2TGJVFWjaeTYUK17uhILtKRF5-ETG4-lxbKHu8GoquFKKyP3sy972alTxwjzbo-zMX1oNOwT9JRlgJvJbb6Kf_WkSpDw9i6TMz8AQ1hHzybw-s3Sru0EcSiLMo7lyM0VypG6Onkz54pbzI-QyaasTzEguLXQQtIyeGg9VavWH6gyv6CmeNlwLJAFECJVhPrOUoUTCAcKKiCYddqSMSTRt7oyd1C3Gf021sAk8Jd0eBoderuHQOAoF4ft0IA2Ru0jagnaOXjl9YBmyvNSOkNo2y_jb_cQzb3eiRGSriebDhHaDzqubL5SBjdhqfFvWzbZU0yLwO3mqVIzL3zDe3yQF21ZA%3D)**

clean_body: It's time. | Friends, It’s time for an honest conversation. The Democrats are outraising me, I’ll state the obvious. Let me be clear: this is still anyone’s election despite the Democrats outraising me and other Republicans across the country last Quarter. If there’s one thing that I (a hillbilly) know how to do best, it’s getting scrappy. I’m not going down without a MAJOR fight. I hope you aren’t either. The Radical Left might be outraising us, but I KNOW that they have nothing to celebrate - and I’m determined to keep it that way this November. Best, JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc.
